uniques.name: {variant:1}(10-15)% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills
explicitModifiers: Items and Gems have (10-15)% reduced Attribute Requirements

uniques.name: Abberath's Hooves
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 7 Abberath's Fury when Equipped
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
The Goat King knew not of war,
of the lands and laws he trampled.
The Goat King knew only joy
at turning life to ash.

uniques.name: Abberath's Horn
implicitModifiers: Adds (1-2) to (3-4) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds (4-6) to (8-12) Fire Damage to Spells
explicitModifiers: Gain 10 Life per Ignited Enemy Killed
uniques.flavourText:
The Goat King drank the smoke and ate the flames
as his ruin spread across the land.

uniques.name: Abhorrent Interrogation
explicitModifiers: (20-25)% chance to inflict Withered for 2 seconds on Hit
Enemies take 4% increased Elemental Damage from your Hits for
each Withered you have inflicted on them
Your Hits cannot Penetrate or ignore Elemental Resistances
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Oshabi, Avatar of the Grove
uniques.flavourText:
"We have methods of interrogation the Inquisitors only dream of."
- Marcus, Brotherhood Liaison

uniques.name: Abyssus
explicitModifiers: Adds 40 to 60 Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
When you have slain all of your enemies,
what is left to fear?

uniques.name: Actum
explicitModifiers: Critical Strike Chance is (20-30)% for Hits with this Weapon
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
Better to act without thought
than to think without action.

uniques.name: Admiral's Arrogance
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% chance that if you would gain Rage on Hit, you instead gain up to your maximum Rage
+(1-3) to Level of all Melee Skill Gems
uniques.flavourText:
"The long and venerable lineages of the Oriathan nobility tended
to produce Admirals with, shall we say... quick tempers."

uniques.name: Advancing Fortress
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 12 Fortify
explicitModifiers: Reflects (71-90) Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
uniques.flavourText:
"A man cowers behind his walls.
A woman carries her fortress with her.
In heart, in mind, in hand."
- Sekhema Deshret

uniques.name: Aegis Aurora
explicitModifiers: Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block
(10-20)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
uniques.flavourText:
Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.

explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of all Lightning Spell Skill Gems
uniques.flavourText: One for each corner of the great Vinktar Square.

uniques.name: Agnerod West
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Adds (5-15) to (100-140) Lightning Damage to Spells
+2 to Level of all Lightning Spell Skill Gems
uniques.flavourText: One for each corner of the great Vinktar Square.

uniques.name: Ahkeli's Meadow
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Aul, the Crystal King
uniques.flavourText:
Where once had stood a village, lay naught but splinters.
Some had once been her home.
Some had once been her creations.
Some had once been her family.

This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Ahkeli's Mountain
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Ahuatotli, the Blind
uniques.flavourText:
Fleeing the destruction set upon her home,
the Clayshaper sought safety in the clouds of ash above.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Ahkeli's Valley
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Kurgal, the Blackblooded
uniques.flavourText:
The river, once fertile and fresh,
and flowing briskly to the sea,
now stood, stained, at a standstill.
Dammed by the coagulating dead.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Ahn's Contempt
explicitModifiers: Gain (8-12)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage while at maximum Power Charges
You take 50% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes while you have no Power Charges
uniques.flavourText:
"To touch it is to be overwhelmed with the need to carve your name into history.
A face no one remembers, yet once you have seen it, you will never forget."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 48

uniques.name: Ahn's Heritage
explicitModifiers: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
+2% to all maximum Resistances while you have no Endurance Charges
You have Onslaught while at maximum Endurance Charges
uniques.flavourText:
"It's not Karui, Azmeri or even Vaal in origin,
but one thing is certain. It is very, very old."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 46

uniques.name: Ahn's Might
explicitModifiers: +50% Global Critical Strike Multiplier while you have no Frenzy Charges
+(400-500) to Accuracy Rating while at Maximum Frenzy Charges
uniques.flavourText:
"Impossibly heavy, yet the ancient edge is as keen as any modern blade's.
A reminder that, in the end, when we lie in the bellies of worms,
it is what we make that makes us."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 47

uniques.name: Ahuana's Bite
implicitModifiers: Gain (6-8) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
explicitModifiers: Adds (30-40) to (60-70) Cold Damage to Attacks
Enemies Chilled by your Hits have Damage taken increased by Chill Effect
Chill Enemies as though dealing (60-100)% more Damage
uniques.flavourText: The last Queen of the Karui gave up power willingly.

uniques.name: Akoya's Gaze
explicitModifiers: Life Leech from Exerted Attacks is instant
uniques.flavourText: Fight in the traditional Way, or not at all!

uniques.name: Al Dhih
implicitModifiers: 3% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: Enemies Taunted by your Warcries Explode on death, dealing 8% of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage
Warcry Skills' Cooldown Time is 4 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
"When the hyena howls thrice
death is sure to follow."
-Maraketh Wisdom

uniques.name: Alberon's Warpath
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 80 Chaos Damage to Attacks
Summoned Skeleton Warriors are Permanent and Follow you
Summon Skeletons cannot Summon more than 1 Skeleton Warrior
uniques.flavourText:
Alberon walked among the accursed,
and they welcomed him.

uniques.name: Algor Mortis
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% chance to Sap Enemies in Chilling Areas
Enemies in your Chilling Areas take (25-35)% increased Lightning Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from the Simulacrum Encounter
uniques.flavourText: Winter's white blanket swaddles all.

uniques.name: Allelopathy
uniques.flavourText:
"Nothing is more natural than competition.
One feasts, another starves.
One blossoms, another withers.
And one cannot catch the golden sunlight
without casting a bitter shadow."
- Cadiro Perandus

uniques.name: Allure
implicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: You gain Phasing for 10 seconds on using a Vaal Skill
uniques.flavourText:
What drives us to kill, to carve and to shred?
What drives us to drink the seething souls of the dead?
What drives us to love and to hold, but still go amiss?
What drives us to leave this world for the Abyss?

uniques.name: Alpha's Howl
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems
16% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
uniques.flavourText:
Nature respects the strong
And paints the snow red
With the blood of the weak

uniques.name: Amanamu's Gaze
explicitModifiers: Minions have +6% to Damage over Time Multiplier per
Ghastly Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +30%
uniques.flavourText: The Liege of the Lightless seeks dominion over the surface dwellers.

uniques.name: Ambu's Charge
explicitModifiers: Gain up to maximum Endurance Charges when you take a Critical Strike
Your nearby party members maximum Endurance Charges is equal to yours
uniques.flavourText: Nothing stops the pain like a courageous rush into battle.

uniques.name: Amplification Rod
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Intensify
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Spell Echo
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Controlled Destruction
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: If it's worth doing once, it's worth doing twice.

uniques.name: Anathema
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Cast a Curse Spell
Your Curse Limit is equal to your maximum Power Charges
uniques.flavourText:
Enraged by the incompetence of mortals
The demon-lord opens a gateway
Unleashing a litany of pain upon the world.

uniques.name: Anatomical Knowledge
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to Maximum Life per 3 Intelligence Allocated in Radius
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Once you understand how your body truly works
you can't help but treat it better.

uniques.name: Ancestral Vision
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value
uniques.flavourText:
The spirits of our ancestors guided us from the Archipelago to the continent.
Inextricably, the purity of our souls is linked to the ones who came before us.

uniques.name: Ancient Skull
explicitModifiers: Minions have 50% increased Critical Strike Chance per Maximum Power Charge you have
Minions can hear the whispers for 5 seconds after they deal a Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
Primordial rage slumbers, waiting for the call
of the stars to return and swallow the world.

uniques.name: Ancient Waystones
explicitModifiers: 60% reduced Cost of Aura Skills that summon Totems
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"The Vaal left a thousand warnings behind.
We ignored every single one."
- Siosa, the Last Scholar

uniques.name: Andvarius
uniques.flavourText: Danger is the price of wealth.

uniques.name: Annihilation's Approach
explicitModifiers: Take 6000 Fire Damage per Second while Flame-Touched
Gain Adrenaline when you become Flame-Touched
Lose Adrenaline when you cease to be Flame-Touched
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Pray that the flames find fascination,
for the true end follows when the great eye closes.

uniques.name: Apep's Rage
implicitModifiers: Adds (90-130) to (140-190) Chaos Damage to Spells
explicitModifiers: Poisons you inflict deal Damage (30-50)% faster
Lose 40 Mana when you use a Skill
uniques.flavourText:
Apep's poison entraps, encircles,
and engulfs the leaking mind of Man.

uniques.name: Apep's Slumber
explicitModifiers: +3% to all maximum Resistances while Poisoned
Regenerate 80 Energy Shield per Second per Poison on you, up to 400 per second
uniques.sourceText: Opening Grove Vessel in Toxic Grove
uniques.flavourText:
The heart grows slow,
the spirit grows strong.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Awakening

uniques.name: Apep's Supremacy
explicitModifiers: (30-50)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
You take Chaos Damage instead of Physical Damage from Bleeding
+3% to all maximum Resistances while Poisoned
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Apep's Slumber via Vial of Awakening
uniques.flavourText: Give him your body, and your burdens will follow.

uniques.name: Apex Mode
explicitModifiers: Spells have 10% reduced Critical Strike Chance per Intensity
Spells which have gained Intensity Recently gain 1 Intensity every 0.5 Seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Unbreakable in Contract: Breaking the Unbreakable
uniques.flavourText: Maximum power fueled by science gone mad.

uniques.name: Apparitions
explicitModifiers: Minions have +(2-5)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
When you create life from nothing,
sometimes things get a little stuck in between.

uniques.name: Arakaali's Fang
explicitModifiers: 100% chance to Trigger Level 1 Raise Spiders on Kill
uniques.flavourText: All children must eat.

uniques.name: Araku Tiki
explicitModifiers: +(150-250) to Evasion Rating while on Low Life
Gain Elusive on reaching Low Life
You have Phasing while on Low Life

uniques.name: Arborix
explicitModifiers: Bow Attacks fire 2 additional Arrows if you haven't Cast Dash recently
(20-30)% increased Attack Speed if you haven't Cast Dash recently
(100-160)% increased Evasion Rating if you've Cast Dash recently
(20-30)% increased Movement Speed if you've Cast Dash recently
Travel Skills other than Dash are Disabled
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Through droughts, fires, floods and frost,
the ancient giants stand resolute,
while deep in the rich, dark earth,
their grasp stretches ever farther.

uniques.name: Architect's Hand
explicitModifiers: Source: Opening Fortified Casket in Defense Research Lab
Upgrade: Upgrades to Slavedriver's Hand via Vial of Dominance
Skills used by Traps have (10-20)% increased Area of Effect
Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also Apply to Trap Throwing Speed
uniques.flavourText:
Great works take time.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Dominance

uniques.name: Arn's Anguish
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Minimum Endurance Charges instead apply to Minimum Brutal Charges
Maximum Brutal Charges is equal to Maximum Endurance Charges
Gain Brutal Charges instead of Endurance Charges
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText: The tortured thinker is made heavier by the weight of his guilt.

uniques.name: Ascent From Flesh
explicitModifiers: You have Phasing if Energy Shield Recharge has started Recently
uniques.flavourText:
A single step forward
Snap free from the prison
Reborn into freedom eternal

uniques.name: Asenath's Chant
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack with a Bow, with a 0.3 second Cooldown
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Asenath's mind was as quick and nimble
as the fingers that drew her bowstring.

uniques.name: Asenath's Gentle Touch
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Temporal Chains on Hit
Non-Aura Curses you inflict are not removed from Dying Enemies
Enemies near corpses affected by your Curses are Blinded
Enemies Killed near corpses affected by your Curses explode, dealing
3% of their Life as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText: Cool the head and cool the blade.

uniques.name: Asenath's Mark
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack with a Bow, with a 0.3 second Cooldown
uniques.flavourText:
Asenath's mind was as quick and nimble
as the fingers that drew her bowstring.

uniques.name: Ashcaller
implicitModifiers: Adds (1-2) to (3-4) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
25% chance to Trigger Level 10 Summon Raging Spirit on Kill
explicitModifiers: Adds (20-24) to (36-46) Fire Damage to Spells
10% chance to Cover Enemies in Ash on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
"We do not command fire.
Ngamahu lends it, and Hinekora returns it."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Ashes of the Stars
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Skill Gems
+(20-30)% to Quality of all Skill Gems
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.

uniques.name: Ashes of the Sun
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Ashrend
explicitModifiers: (75-150)% increased Physical Damage with Ranged Weapons
-(30-60) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
uniques.flavourText: The blasted oak stands forever.

uniques.name: Asphyxia's Wrath
explicitModifiers: Gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Hexes Transfer to all Enemies within 3 metres when Hexed Enemy dies
uniques.flavourText:
Mist of breath
Icing to lips and throat
As the warm ones choke and fall
Upon the frozen wasteland.

uniques.name: Assailum
explicitModifiers: Socketed Non-Channelling Bow Skills are Triggered by Snipe
Socketed Triggered Bow Skills gain a 0.05 second Cooldown
+(14-20)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage while Channelling
uniques.flavourText: A moment of calm before the battle can end the war.

uniques.name: Assassin's Haste
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: A quick step can advance great plans.

uniques.name: Astral Projector
explicitModifiers: Nova Spells have 20% less Area of Effect
Nova Spells Cast at the targeted location instead of around you
uniques.flavourText: The body stands, but the spirit soars.

uniques.name: Astramentis
explicitModifiers: -4 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
uniques.flavourText:
Mindless rage will shake the world,
Cunning lies will bend it.
Reckless haste will break the world,
And into darkness send it.

uniques.name: Atziri's Acuity
explicitModifiers: You have Vaal Pact if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText:
"The heart is the herald.
It will tell me when it is best to strike."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Disfavour
explicitModifiers: +30% to Quality of Socketed Support Gems
25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText:
"I do not believe in disguising my disappointment."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Foible
explicitModifiers: Items and Gems have 25% reduced Attribute Requirements
uniques.flavourText:
The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.
-Jaetai, Vaal Advisor

uniques.name: Atziri's Mirror
explicitModifiers: 50% reduced Duration of Curses on you
+10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while not Cursed
+20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while Cursed
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"As long as I see death in my mirror, so will Wraeclast."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Promise
explicitModifiers: Gain (5-8)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain (5-8)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice
uniques.flavourText:
"Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Reflection
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText:
"As long as I see death in my mirror, so will Wraeclast."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Reign
explicitModifiers: Vaal Skills have (15-20)% increased Skill Effect Duration
Vaal Skills have (15-20)% chance to regain consumed Souls when used
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
Atziri went to great lengths to ensure her immortality,
but nothing is eternal.

uniques.name: Atziri's Rule
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Queen's Demand can Trigger Level 20 Flames of Judgement
Queen's Demand can Trigger Level 20 Storm of Judgement
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.

uniques.name: Atziri's Splendour
implicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Vaal Skill Gems
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Atziri's Step
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice
uniques.flavourText:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: Augyre
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Every 16 seconds you gain Elemental Overload for 8 seconds
You have Resolute Technique while you do not have Elemental Overload
100% increased Physical Damage while you have Resolute Technique
uniques.flavourText:
When the world spins out of control,
the safest place to be is in the centre.

uniques.name: Aukuna's Will
explicitModifiers: Raised Zombies have (80-100)% increased maximum Life
Raise Zombie does not require a corpse
Your Raised Zombies count as corpses
uniques.flavourText: The Black Sekhema's trial had only just begun.

uniques.name: Aul's Uprising
explicitModifiers: Nearby Enemies have 10% reduced Stun and Block Recovery
Nearby Enemies have 10% reduced Stun and Block Recovery
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Aul, the Crystal King
uniques.flavourText:
It was not his fearlessness or ferocity, nor his tactical genius,
it was his leadership that earned Aul, the Last King, his crown.

uniques.name: Aurseize
uniques.flavourText: Wealth is not to be borne lightly.

uniques.name: Aurumvorax
uniques.flavourText:
Many a collector of rarities discovered to his dismay
that the intelligent spirit in this sword
does not like to share its master's attention

uniques.name: Auxium
explicitModifiers: Chill Effect and Freeze Duration on you are based on 100% of Energy Shield
(20-25)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills per Power Charge
0.2% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana per Power Charge
uniques.flavourText: As long as the soul is unfettered, so is the body.

uniques.name: Axiom Perpetuum
implicitModifiers: Adds (2-3) to (5-6) Fire Damage to Spells
explicitModifiers: Adds (2-3) to (5-6) Cold Damage to Spells
Adds 1 to (10-12) Lightning Damage to Spells
uniques.flavourText: The worst of Axiom were imprisoned by more than iron.

uniques.name: Azadi Crest
explicitModifiers: Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or
worst from three rolls instead of two
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mercenary after winning a duel
uniques.flavourText:
"Keita expects an assassination attempt by stealth or subterfuge.
I say we attack head-on, like madmen. Let the fates decide."
- Azadi, first ancestor of the House Azadin

uniques.name: Badge of the Brotherhood
explicitModifiers: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
(7-10)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
(7-10)% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
(20-25)% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
(20-25)% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive
uniques.flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

uniques.name: Balefire
uniques.flavourText:
After the fires swept down from the sky and swallowed the city,
all that lingered, as if locked in time,
was a memory of that which was gone, a whisper of deeds undone.

uniques.name: Bated Breath
uniques.flavourText: At knifepoint, a moment's hesitation means death.

uniques.name: Beacon of Madness
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to deal Double Damage while affected by Glorious Madness
+15 to maximum Fortification while affected by Glorious Madness
uniques.flavourText: Nothing spreads as quickly as an idea.

uniques.name: Bear's Girdle
explicitModifiers: Adds (5-7) to (11-12) Physical Damage to Attacks
Nearby Enemies are Crushed while you have at least 25 Rage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Ersi, Mother of Thorns in The Sacred Grove
uniques.flavourText: Simple. Deadly. Unstoppable.

uniques.name: Belly of the Beast
uniques.flavourText:
There is no safer place
Than the Belly of the Beast

uniques.name: Belt of the Deceiver
explicitModifiers: You take 30% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
uniques.flavourText:
In battle, virtue matters not.
Only victory.

uniques.name: Beltimber Blade
explicitModifiers: Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles if you've used a Movement Skill Recently
uniques.flavourText:
By wind and wing they are carried,
Their fates not theirs to control,
Yet the fates of others dragged in their wake.

uniques.name: Berek's Grip
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to (50-70) Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Shocked Enemies
1% of Damage Leeched as Energy Shield against Frozen Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
"Berek hid from Storm's lightning wrath
In the embrace of oblivious Frost
Repelled by ice, blinded by blizzards
Storm raged in vain
While Berek slept."
- Berek and the Untamed

uniques.name: Berek's Pass
explicitModifiers: Adds (20-25) to (30-50) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
"From Frost's ice-bound pass
Berek taunted and jeered
Until furious Flame scaled the mountain
Berek escaped through the thaw
And Frost's tortured moans."
- Berek and the Untamed

uniques.name: Berek's Respite
explicitModifiers: Adds (20-25) to (30-50) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
When you Kill a Shocked Enemy, inflict an equivalent Shock on each nearby Enemy
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

uniques.name: Betrayal's Sting
implicitModifiers: Adds (3-4) to (10-14) Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: (25-40)% chance to inflict an additional Poison on the same Target when you inflict Poison
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
It is not a wound caused by an enemy that bites us twice.
It is the smile, the nod... the handshake... of a former friend.

uniques.name: Binds of Bloody Vengeance
explicitModifiers: (20-40)% increased Attack Damage if you've been Hit Recently
All Hits with your next Non-Channelling Attack within 4 seconds of taking a Critical Strike will be Critical Strikes
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mercenary after winning a duel
uniques.flavourText: What once marked his submission became the tool of his defiance - torn from the lash of House Keita.

uniques.name: Bino's Kitchen Knife
explicitModifiers: On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned
and nearby Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second
uniques.flavourText:
Calling it poison would imply
that it was even edible.

uniques.name: Bisco's Collar
explicitModifiers: (100-150)% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Slain Magic Enemies
(35-50)% increased Quantity of Items Dropped by Slain Normal Enemies
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Friendship worth its weight in gold,
a treasure every day.
I thought together we'd grow old,
until fate pulled you away.

uniques.name: Bisco's Leash
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Rarity of Items found per 15 Rampage Kills
uniques.flavourText:
You were always there, by my side,
whether we sat or played.
Our friendship was a joyful ride,
I wish you could have stayed.

uniques.name: Bitter Instinct
explicitModifiers: Reflects (200-300) Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
Damaging Retaliation Skills become Usable every 4 seconds
Retaliation Skills become Usable for (50-100)% longer
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
We isolate ourselves to hide our long-held pain.
We lash out, when all we want is an end to loneliness.

uniques.name: Bitterbind Point
explicitModifiers: Raised Spectres have (50-100)% increased maximum Life
Gain Arcane Surge when you deal a Critical Strike
Your Raised Spectres also gain Arcane Surge when you do
(40-50)% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per Raised Spectre
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Catarina, Master of Undeath
uniques.flavourText:
Though we live and act as individuals,
in truth, we are tethered together.
The barriers that divide us need not be broken
for our spirits to become entangled.

uniques.name: Bitterdream
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Bonechill
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Hypothermia
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Ice Bite
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Cold Penetration
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Added Cold Damage
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Inspiration
uniques.flavourText:
Fight not the cold
Forsake hope
Be still.

uniques.name: Black Sun Crest
uniques.flavourText:
The beasts we fear the most
are the ones who dwell in total darkness.

uniques.name: Black Zenith
explicitModifiers: Socketed Projectile Spells deal 150% more Damage with Hits
Socketed Projectile Spells have +4 seconds to Cooldown
Socketed Projectile Spells fire 4 additional Projectiles
Socketed Projectile Spells fire Projectiles in a circle
Socketed Projectile Spells have 80% less Skill Effect Duration
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Infinite Hunger
uniques.flavourText:
He reached for his home one last time, a shining jewel among the stars...
only to watch in horror as it ruptured and shattered under a tide of limbs.

uniques.name: Blackflame
explicitModifiers: +(8-12)% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier
Enemies Ignited by you take Chaos Damage instead of Fire Damage from Ignite
Withered does not expire on Enemies Ignited by you
uniques.sourceText: Purchase from Ritual Reward
uniques.flavourText:
Beyond the veil of death, there burns a fire
by whose light night is borne.

uniques.name: Blackgleam
implicitModifiers: Adds (12-15) to (24-27) Fire Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
5 to 10 Added Fire Damage with Bow Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Molten feathers, veiled spark,
Hissing arrows from the dark.

uniques.name: Blackheart
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Adds (10-15) to (20-25) Chaos Damage to Attacks
10% chance to Cause Monsters to Flee

uniques.name: Blasphemer's Grasp
explicitModifiers: +6 to Maximum Life per Elder Item Equipped
+4% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Ailments per Elder Item Equipped
8% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments per Elder Item Equipped
Remove an Ailment when you use a Flask if all Equipped Items are Elder Items
uniques.flavourText:
Reaching nature's limits,
many sought power in the unnatural.

uniques.name: Blightwell
explicitModifiers: 50% slower start of Energy Shield Recharge during any Flask Effect
(150-200)% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate during any Flask Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Long ago, the ocean was a puddle where a golden fish dwelt,
who lit the ocean from within and kept the water fresh.
When the sky burned, the fish dived deep,
never to return, and the waters turned sour.

uniques.name: Blood of Corruption
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 10 Gluttony of Elements Skill
Adds 19 to 43 Chaos Damage to Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Tear of Purity
uniques.flavourText:
In my dream, a voice spoke to me. It said:
'My reach knows no bounds.
All that is pure is destined to rot.
All that lives is destined to serve.'
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Blood of Summer
explicitModifiers: 2% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
33% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Blood of the Karui
explicitModifiers: Recover Full Life at the end of the Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"Kaom fought and killed for his people.
Kaom bled for his people.
And so the people gave, the people bled,
So their King might go on."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Blood Price
explicitModifiers: Nearby Enemy Monsters have at least 8% of Life Reserved
uniques.flavourText: An eye for an eye makes the whole world dead.

uniques.name: Blood Sacrifice
explicitModifiers: Lose 1% of Energy Shield on Kill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Power always comes with a price.

uniques.name: Bloodboil
explicitModifiers: Adds (12-15) to (25-30) Fire Damage to Attacks
75% reduced Effect of Chill on you
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Rage is a big part of courage.

uniques.name: Bloodbond
explicitModifiers: Minions have +(12-15)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
uniques.flavourText: What mother wouldn't give her life for that of her children?

uniques.name: Bloodgrip
implicitModifiers: Adds 10 to 20 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Moving while Bleeding doesn't cause you to take extra Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Combat is simple.
Keep your blood in.
Take theirs out.

uniques.name: Bloodnotch
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% of Damage taken from Stunning Hits is Recovered as Life
uniques.flavourText:
At the core of the warrior's spirit,
a fierce determination burns,
igniting their capacity to endure.

uniques.name: Bloodplay
explicitModifiers: 30% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
"I'm a painter, and crimson is my chosen hue."
- Coralito, Brotherhood of Silence

uniques.name: Bloodseeker
implicitModifiers: 1.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: 1.2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
(15-25)% increased Life Reservation Efficiency of Skills
Life Leech from Hits with this Weapon is instant
(5-10)% increased Maximum Recovery per Life Leech for each 5% of Life Reserved
uniques.flavourText:
"For the life of the flesh will always be in the blood."
- Atalui, Vaal Priestess

uniques.name: Bloodsoaked Medallion
explicitModifiers: Gain 2% of Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks for 5 seconds
Gain 5% of Life per Enemy Killed for 5 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
"Atziri ordained that we exploit the weaknesses inherent in our slaves.
With relish, we did exactly as she instructed."
- Guatelitzi, Architect of Flesh

uniques.name: Blunderbore
explicitModifiers: (50-75)% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
You have Lesser Brutal Shrine Buff
You have Lesser Massive Shrine Buff
uniques.flavourText: The giant cares not for the ants.

uniques.name: Bonemeld
explicitModifiers: +(1-2) to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
-2% to all Resistances per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
(3-4)% increased Defences per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
Minions gain added Resistances equal to 50% of your Resistances
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
Hills of stark and jagged white it walks,
scratching your ribs without, within.
The Fiend has naught but Empty Eyes,
though sees you, it does, indeed.

uniques.name: Bones of Ullr
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Raise Zombie Gems
+1 to Level of all Raise Spectre Gems
uniques.flavourText:
The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.

uniques.name: Bottled Faith
explicitModifiers: Consecrated Ground created by this Flask has Tripled Radius
Consecrated Ground created during Effect applies (7-10)% increased Damage taken to Enemies
(100-150)% increased Critical Strike Chance against Enemies on Consecrated Ground during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex
uniques.flavourText: A tourniquet for the soul, squeezing ethereal into physical.

uniques.name: Bound by Destiny
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Neglect or Incarnation of Fear or Incarnation of Dread

uniques.name: Bound Fate
explicitModifiers: Every 5 seconds, gain one of the following for 5 seconds:
Your Hits are always Critical Strikes
Hits against you are always Critical Strikes
Your Damage with Hits is Lucky
Damage of Hits against you is Lucky
uniques.flavourText:
Knowing what will happen
and knowing when it will happen
are two very different things.

uniques.name: Brain Rattler
implicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
explicitModifiers: Enemies you Shock have 30% reduced Cast Speed
Enemies you Shock have 20% reduced Movement Speed
Hits with this Weapon Shock Enemies as though dealing 300% more Damage
uniques.flavourText: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

uniques.name: Bramblejack
explicitModifiers: -(15-10) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
1000% of Melee Physical Damage taken reflected to Attacker

uniques.name: Brawn
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Take your time, make all your plans.
Then tell me which plan
pulls my axe from your ribs."
- Barkhul, the Butcher

uniques.name: Breath of the Council
explicitModifiers: Chaos Skills have 40% increased Skill Effect Duration
uniques.flavourText: Breathe deep, and give yourself over to eternity.

uniques.name: Breathstealer
explicitModifiers: Create a Blighted Spore when your Skills or Minions Kill a Rare Monster
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
The last gasp is not always one's final act.

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: Brightbeak
uniques.flavourText:
"I know how to say 'faster' and 'attack'
in Karui, Marak and Ezo."
- Voll of Thebrus

uniques.name: Brinerot Flag
implicitModifiers: +3 to Level of Socketed Warcry Gems
explicitModifiers: Warcries grant Arcane Surge to you and Allies, with 10% increased effect per 5 power, up to 50%
uniques.flavourText: The lords of the sea bow to no one.

uniques.name: Brinerot Mark
explicitModifiers: 25% increased Effect of Buffs granted by Socketed Golem Skills
Socketed Golem Skills gain 20% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
+3 to Level of Socketed Golem Gems
uniques.flavourText:
Each time, it is granted to the most senior captain of the fleet,
and each time, the ring soon washes ashore once more,
still wrapped around a severed finger.

uniques.name: Brinerot Whalers
uniques.flavourText:
Those Theopolis fatcats put a price on our heads.
Let's see what they'll pay for their own.

uniques.name: Briskwrap
uniques.flavourText:
"I carry neither food nor drink. I rely on the charity
of my fellow wayfarers. Dead men are generous men."
- Taruk of the Wildmen

uniques.name: Brittle Barrier
explicitModifiers: 20% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
10% increased Damage taken while on Full Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Walls built in a hurry fall in a hurry.

uniques.name: Broken Faith
explicitModifiers: 0.4% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
100% increased Global Armour while you have no Energy Shield
You have Unholy Might while you have no Energy Shield
Create Profane Ground instead of Consecrated Ground
uniques.flavourText: Be not blinded by the light.

uniques.name: Bronn's Lithe
explicitModifiers: +5 to Level of Socketed Movement Gems
uniques.flavourText:
Forget your kite shield. Just put the biggest man
in the field between you and the archers.

uniques.name: Brutal Restraint
explicitModifiers: Denoted service of (500-8000) dekhara in the akhara of Asenath
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Maraketh
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Maraketh Legion
uniques.flavourText: They believed themselves the most ordered, but that tradition turned their forests to salt.

uniques.name: Brute Force Solution
explicitModifiers: Strength from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
Picking a lock takes an immense amount of skill and practice.
Breaking it with a hammer takes about three seconds.

uniques.name: Brutus' Lead Sprinkler
explicitModifiers: Adds 4 to 7 Fire Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 10 Strength
uniques.flavourText:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often required
to garnish the perfect confession."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom

uniques.name: Bubonic Trail
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped
10% increased Damage for each type of Abyss Jewel affecting you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Amanamu, Liege of the Lightless or Ulaman, Sovereign of the Well
uniques.flavourText: Even the dead serve the Lightless.

uniques.name: Cadigan's Authority
explicitModifiers: +(3-5) to maximum number of Summoned Totems
You cannot have more than 2 Summoned Totems of the same type
uniques.sourceText: Obtained from Shipping in Kingsmarch
uniques.flavourText:
Over the course of a lifetime, Cadigan the First
conquered every city-state on Middengard one by one,
continually leveraging the power of each against the next.

uniques.name: Cadigan's Crown
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Olroth, Origin of the Fall in Expedition Logbook
uniques.flavourText:
Cadigan the Third ruled dispassionately
through the iron might of artifice.

uniques.name: Calamitous Visions
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
"Try as I might, I could not escape it.
When I closed my eyes, I saw only death.
Each breath tainted with the scent of seared and smouldering flesh,
And each sound tangled with pleas for mercy."

uniques.name: Call of the Brotherhood
explicitModifiers: 40% of Lightning Damage Converted to Cold Damage
Your spells have 100% chance to Shock against Frozen Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Forged by three brothers
so that they may recognize each other
across any distance of time or travel.

uniques.name: Call of the Void
explicitModifiers: All Damage with Hits can Chill
All Damage Taken from Hits can Chill you
Enemies Chilled by your Hits can be Shattered as though Frozen
Enemies Chilled by your Hits lessen their Damage dealt by half of Chill Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Only when the mind is empty of ambition
can the cold truth of existence take hold.

uniques.name: Callinellus Malleus
explicitModifiers: (15-25)% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with this Weapon
All Attack Damage Chills when you Stun
uniques.flavourText:
To neither ebb nor flow,
but weather the rising tide,
outlast, unshifting and unshifted,
until the waters recede and we stand together.

uniques.name: Cameria's Avarice
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Icicle Burst when you Hit a Frozen Enemy
40% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Frozen Enemies
(30-40)% increased Cold Damage with Attack Skills
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
"You'll have my riches when you pry them
from my cold, dead hands!"
"That's how I prefer it."

uniques.name: Cameria's Maul
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Frozen Enemies
(30-40)% increased Cold Damage with Attack Skills
uniques.flavourText:
"You'll have my riches when you pry them
from my cold, dead hands!"
"That's how I prefer it."

uniques.name: Cane of Unravelling
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+(40-55)% to Chaos Damage over Time Multiplier
explicitModifiers: 2% increased Cast Speed per Power Charge
+2 to Level of all Chaos Spell Skill Gems
Gain a Power Charge after Spending a total of 200 Mana
Regenerate 2 Mana per Second per Power Charge
uniques.flavourText:
"Creation is the act of making the intangible tangible.
To work backwards, to make the tangible intangible,
is to step into the mind of a god."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Carcass Jack
uniques.flavourText:
"...The discomfort shown by the others is amusing, but none
can deny that my work has made quite the splash..."
- Maligaro's Journal

uniques.name: Careful Planning
explicitModifiers: Intelligence from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Dexterity
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
"Greatly outnumbered, Deshret dressed her personal guard
in identical garb. When the Empire rode north, Deshret and
her guard took turns revealing themselves, creating the illusion
of speed beyond the capabilities of even the Virtue Gems."
- History of the Maraketh

uniques.name: Carnage Heart
explicitModifiers: (1.2-2)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
50% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
uniques.flavourText:
Forged from the blood of countless wars,
its thirst has only begun.

uniques.name: Ceaseless Feast
explicitModifiers: Adds (2-3) to (22-26) Physical Damage to Attacks
(20-30)% chance to inflict Corrosion on Hit with Attacks
(20-30)% chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Hitting an Enemy with no Armour
(20-30)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Hitting an Enemy with no Evasion Rating
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Infinite Hunger
uniques.flavourText:
Lost in a sea of limbs and screaming faces, they claw
for any fleeting pleasure which might dull the pain.

uniques.name: Ceinture of Benevolence
explicitModifiers: Non-Unique Utility Flasks you Use apply to Linked Targets
uniques.flavourText:
"Put your faith in me.
Our god demands it."
- High Templar Maxarius

uniques.name: Cerberus Limb
explicitModifiers: 0.5% of Spell Damage Leeched as Life if Equipped Shield has at least 30% Chance to Block
+1 to Maximum Energy Shield per 5 Armour on Equipped Shield
+5 to Armour per 5 Evasion Rating on Equipped Shield
+20 to Evasion Rating per 5 Maximum Energy Shield on Equipped Shield
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Ahuatotli, the Blind
uniques.flavourText: The greatest of guardians make the greatest of sacrifices.

uniques.name: Chaber Cairn
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Melee Gems
+2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

uniques.name: Chain of Endurance
explicitModifiers: Reflects (100-150) Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
Regenerate 2% of Life per second for each different Ailment affecting you
uniques.flavourText:
"A man confronted with sufficient adversity
may ascend to unprecedented heights
and triumph over his coddled rivals."
- Weylan the Ezomyte

uniques.name: Chains of Command
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Animate Guardian's Weapon when Animated Guardian Kills an Enemy
10% chance to Trigger Level 18 Animate Guardian's Weapon when Animated Weapon Kills an Enemy
Animated Guardian deals 5% increased Damage per Animated Weapon
Animated and Manifested Minions' Melee Strikes deal Splash
Animated and Manifested Minions' Melee Strikes deal 50% less Splash Damage
You cannot have Non-Animated, Non-Manifested Minions
uniques.flavourText:
A general may carry his men to greatness,
or be dragged beneath the mire by their burden.

uniques.name: Chains of Emancipation
explicitModifiers: Enemy Hits inflict Temporal Chains on you
When you lose Temporal Chains you gain maximum Rage
Immune to Curses while you have at least 25 Rage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Friedrich Tarollo, Slave Merchant in Contract: The Slaver King
uniques.flavourText: Freedom is won only by those who are not free.

uniques.name: Chalice of Horrors
implicitModifiers: +3 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
explicitModifiers: 100% Chance to Cause Monster to Flee on Block
+20% Chance to Block Attack Damage from Cursed Enemies
Inflict Decay on Enemies you Curse with Hex Skills, dealing 700 Chaos Damage per Second for 8 Seconds

uniques.name: Cheap Construction
explicitModifiers: Can have up to 1 additional Trap placed at a time
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Why waste the good stuff on something that's going to blow up?

uniques.name: Chernobog's Pillar
explicitModifiers: Adds (12-15) to (30-35) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
25% chance to Curse Non-Cursed Enemies with Enfeeble on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
Fire dances with those who doubt
Licks the skin and flesh from the fearful
Where there is no fear
There is no flame

uniques.name: Cherrubim's Maleficence
explicitModifiers: 100% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
uniques.flavourText:
"The Consort of Chaos descended,
swiftly, brutally, artfully, she consumed the living,
leaving naught behind but a Rosemarie bloom,
to celebrate the massacre."
- Blass, explorer, hunter, adventurer

uniques.name: Chill of Corruption
explicitModifiers: 50% chance to gain an additional Vaal Soul per Enemy Shattered
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
Even a millennium later, Atziri's presence
casts a shroud over Wraeclast.

uniques.name: Chin Sol
explicitModifiers: 50% more Damage with Arrow Hits at Close Range
uniques.flavourText:
As a soldier you want to get close to enemy archers.
That is not the case when fighting the Maraketh.

uniques.name: Chitus' Apex
uniques.flavourText:
"It takes true strength to hold power,
and my grip grows tighter by the day."
- Emperor Chitus

uniques.name: Chitus' Needle
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"With this, I will weave the threads of fate
into a noose for our 'glorious' emperor."
- Chitus Perandus

uniques.name: Chober Chaber
implicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Melee Gems
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
uniques.flavourText: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

uniques.name: Choir of the Storm
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 30 Lightning Bolt when you deal a Critical Strike
Critical Strike Chance is increased by Overcapped Lightning Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Voice of the Storm using Blessing of Esh
uniques.flavourText:
But the fool did not bow.
The fool stood and questioned.
And the fool was unwritten.

uniques.name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitModifiers: (45-55)% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Catarina, Master of Undeath
uniques.flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

uniques.name: Circle of Ambition
explicitModifiers: Herald of Thunder has (30-40)% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency
10% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Herald Skills
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
I will build the wall that stands against the tide.
The day is coming... I have seen it.

uniques.name: Circle of Anguish
explicitModifiers: Herald of Ash has (60-80)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
I condemned an innocent man to the pyres, but to admit this mistake is to condemn myself.
My only choice is to strive harder.

uniques.name: Circle of Fear
explicitModifiers: Herald of Ice has (60-80)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
My subordinates circled me eternally, attuned to the slightest weakness,
ready to tear me apart for their own gains.

uniques.name: Circle of Guilt
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Herald of Purity has (60-80)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
I feel the moral weight of what I must do to protect Wraeclast.
I accept my guilt without shame. It is my gift to humanity.

uniques.name: Circle of Nostalgia
explicitModifiers: Herald of Agony has (60-80)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
I was a happy child, before the cruel truth was revealed to me.
I fight so that the children may remain ignorant.

uniques.name: Circle of Regret
explicitModifiers: Herald of Thunder has (60-80)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
I sacrificed a life of love for one of responsibility, so that she,
and others like her, might be kept safe.

uniques.name: Clayshaper
implicitModifiers: Grants Level 12 Summon Stone Golem Skill
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
Golems have (96-120) to (132-160) Added Attack Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
There is nothing, flesh, spirit, or stone
Free from our hunger for dominion.

uniques.name: Clear Mind
explicitModifiers: (40-60)% increased Spell Damage while no Mana is Reserved
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: When your thoughts flow like a river, why build a dam?

uniques.name: Cloak of Defiance
uniques.flavourText:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.

uniques.name: Cloak of Flame
explicitModifiers: Reflects 100 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers
40% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
uniques.flavourText: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

uniques.name: Cloak of Tawm'r Isley
explicitModifiers: Socketed Minion Gems are Supported by Level 16 Life Leech
Minions have 15% chance to Blind Enemies on hit
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Elreon, Light's Judge during Betrayal encounters
uniques.flavourText:
Renowned by those distinguished,
Exalted by the few.
He skulks in darkness,
and watches from beneath the city.

uniques.name: Coated Shrapnel
explicitModifiers: Traps and Mines deal (3-5) to (10-15) additional Physical Damage
Traps and Mines have a 25% chance to Poison on Hit
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The Ezomytes have a saying:
Take everything and waste nothing.

uniques.name: Coiling Whisper
explicitModifiers: (25-50)% reduced Area of Effect of Hex Skills
Targets are Unaffected by your Hexes
When 90% of your Hex's Duration Expires on an Enemy, Eat 1 Soul per Enemy Power
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Fear in Moment of Trauma
uniques.flavourText:
I never knew fear until she was ripped away.
My promises were hollow ever after.

uniques.name: Cold Iron Point
explicitModifiers: +3 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems
uniques.flavourText: There is nothing more brutal than a simple blade wielded with rage.

uniques.name: Cold Steel
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Physical Damage in Radius are Transformed to apply to Cold Damage
Increases and Reductions to Cold Damage in Radius are Transformed to apply to Physical Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Winter provides us with her own weapons,
hanging from the eaves of our homes.

uniques.name: Collateral Damage
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Galvanic Arrow has 25% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Galvanic Arrow deals 50% increased Area Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Malachai ran roughshod over every ethical boundary in pursuit of creating the ideal gemling.
For him, there was no doubt that the end would justify the means.

uniques.name: Combat Focus
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
With 40 total Intelligence and Dexterity in Radius, Prismatic Skills deal 50% less Fire Damage
With 40 total Intelligence and Dexterity in Radius, Prismatic Skills cannot choose Fire
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Voll stood at the gates of Sarn, and a nation stood behind him.
He thought of the righteousness of his cause,
and of the glory he would bring to the empire he would soon lead.
But as Chitus and his gemlings advanced, he thought only of the fight.

uniques.name: Combat Focus
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
With 40 total Strength and Intelligence in Radius, Prismatic Skills deal 50% less Cold Damage
With 40 total Strength and Intelligence in Radius, Prismatic Skills cannot choose Cold
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Voll stood at the gates of Sarn, and a nation stood behind him.
He thought of the righteousness of his cause,
and of the glory he would bring to the empire he would soon lead.
But as Chitus and his gemlings advanced, he thought only of the fight.

uniques.name: Combat Focus
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
With 40 total Dexterity and Strength in Radius, Prismatic Skills deal 50% less Lightning Damage
With 40 total Dexterity and Strength in Radius, Prismatic Skills cannot choose Lightning
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Voll stood at the gates of Sarn, and a nation stood behind him.
He thought of the righteousness of his cause,
and of the glory he would bring to the empire he would soon lead.
But as Chitus and his gemlings advanced, he thought only of the fight.

uniques.name: Combustibles
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The hotter something burns, the less is left at the end.

uniques.name: Command of the Pit
explicitModifiers: With a Ghastly Eye Jewel Socketed, Minions have +1000 to Accuracy Rating
With a Hypnotic Eye Jewel Socketed, gain Arcane Surge on Hit with Spells
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Kurgal, the Blackblooded
uniques.flavourText: We serve only the Night.

uniques.name: Conqueror's Efficiency
explicitModifiers: 4% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The stone may yet bleed.

uniques.name: Conqueror's Longevity
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Victory is as simple as being the last one standing.

uniques.name: Conqueror's Potency
explicitModifiers: Flasks applied to you have 8% increased Effect
3% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: What you earn is almost as important as what you take.

uniques.name: Coralito's Signature
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to Poison on Hit during Effect
Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage during Effect
+(20-30)% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Poison from Critical Strikes during Effect
Take 250 Chaos Damage per Second during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"What cruelty it is, that to be judged a success,
such great work must go uncredited."
- Coralito, Brotherhood of Silence

uniques.name: Corona Solaris
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 20 Blinding Aura when Equipped
(120-140)% increased Critical Strike Chance against Blinded Enemies
Increases and Reductions to Light Radius also apply to Accuracy

uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Every decade, Lunaris devours Solaris
Each time, Solaris emerges from Lunaris, born anew.

uniques.name: Corpsewalker
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 20 Corpse Walk when Equipped
For each nearby corpse, Regenerate 8 Life per second
For each nearby corpse, 1% increased Movement Speed
uniques.flavourText:
Every glorious conquest
stands astride innocent bones.

uniques.name: Corrupted Energy
explicitModifiers: With 5 Corrupted Items Equipped: 50% of Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield, and 50% of Physical Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Nothing is immune to the Nightmare's twisted influence.

uniques.name: Coruscating Elixir
explicitModifiers: Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield during effect
Removes all but one Life on use
Removed life is Regenerated as Energy Shield over 2 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
Let blood sear in your veins,
Let the pain push outwards and turn away your enemy's blows.

uniques.name: Cospri's Malice
implicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Cold Spell on Melee Critical Strike, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
explicitModifiers: Adds (40-60) to (90-110) Cold Damage to Spells
60% increased Critical Strike Chance against Chilled Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Breathe deep, my child.
Let the frigid air engulf your soul.
Embrace the eternal cold,
And it will embrace you back.

uniques.name: Cospri's Will
explicitModifiers: You can apply an additional Curse
Your Hexes can affect Hexproof Enemies
Always Poison on Hit against Cursed Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.

uniques.name: Coward's Chains
explicitModifiers: Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are Cursed with Vulnerability
You count as on Full Life while you are Cursed with Vulnerability
uniques.sourceText: Opening Experimental Chest in Hybridisation Chamber
uniques.flavourText:
As a gift or as punishment,
the Empire will have your blood.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Consequence

uniques.name: Coward's Legacy
explicitModifiers: 50% increased Effect of Curses on you
You count as on Low Life while you are Cursed with Vulnerability
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Coward's Chains via Vial of Consequence
uniques.flavourText:
Death is your most important duty.
Face it, or curse your bloodline for all eternity.

uniques.name: Cowards' Wail
explicitModifiers: Totems which would be killed by Enemies become Spectral Totems for 8 seconds instead
Skills used by Spectral Totems deal (40-50)% less Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"A tale-woman passed through here not long ago.
Taught us a thing or two. We're not going to execute
you for what you've done... no. You've a debt to repay."

uniques.name: Cowl of the Ceraunophile
explicitModifiers: Can have a second Enchantment Modifier
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
The villagers seared the blight with lightning, but it only forked into countless tendrils.

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: Cowl of the Cryophile
explicitModifiers: Can have a second Enchantment Modifier
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
The villagers seared the blight with cold, but it only bloomed countless spears.

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: Cowl of the Thermophile
explicitModifiers: Can have a second Enchantment Modifier
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
The villagers seared the blight with fire, but it only spread like dancing flames.

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: Cragfall
implicitModifiers: 1 to 4 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
explicitModifiers: 6 to 10 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Hit them hard. Hit them once.

uniques.name: Craghead
implicitModifiers: 1 to 4 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
explicitModifiers: 6 to 10 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks

uniques.name: Craiceann's Carapace
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Aspect of the Crab Skill
Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
+5 to Maximum number of Crab Barriers
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Craiceann, First of the Deep
uniques.flavourText:
The First of the Deep was the First of All.
It was He who conquered the waves,
who stood guard as land rose from sea.

uniques.name: Craiceann's Chitin
explicitModifiers: Cannot lose Crab Barriers if you have lost Crab Barriers Recently
+3% Chance to Block Attack Damage while you have at least 5 Crab Barriers
+5% Chance to Block Attack Damage while you have at least 10 Crab Barriers
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Craiceann, First of the Deep
uniques.flavourText:
When the rains come, we cower beneath shelter.
The First of the Deep teaches us
that we should seek no shelter but ourselves.

uniques.name: Craiceann's Pincers
explicitModifiers: 10% chance that if you would gain a Crab Barrier, you instead gain up to
your maximum number of Crab Barriers
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Craiceann, First of the Deep
uniques.flavourText:
The stone that stays in the waves soon crumbles to sand.
The First of the Deep teaches us to watch the tides
and choose our moments to move wisely.

uniques.name: Craiceann's Tracks
explicitModifiers: Cannot be Stunned if you have at least 10 Crab Barriers
You only lose (5-7) Crab Barriers when you take Physical Damage from a Hit
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Craiceann, First of the Deep
uniques.flavourText:
When the land rose above the sea, The First of the Deep did not move.
When the sky turned to fire, The First of the Deep did not perish.
We must remember our place, and play to our strengths.

uniques.name: Crest of Desire
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: Expand one single ambition to crystal clarity... and beyond.

uniques.name: Crest of Perandus
explicitModifiers: 0.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
uniques.flavourText:
"With piety and justice."
- Perandus family motto

uniques.name: Crown of Eyes
explicitModifiers: (0.4-0.8)% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
(0.2-0.4)% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attacks at 150% of their value
uniques.flavourText:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

uniques.name: Crown of the Inward Eye
explicitModifiers: (9-21)% increased maximum Life, Mana and Global Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
uniques.flavourText: Divinity is not the only path to enlightenment.

uniques.name: Crown of the Pale King
explicitModifiers: (0.4-0.8)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Reflects 100 to 150 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
100% of Damage you Reflect to Enemies when Hit is leeched as Life
uniques.flavourText:
A lightless world
a silent reign
two sightless eyes
feed on your pain.

uniques.name: Crown of the Tyrant
explicitModifiers: Nearby Enemies have -10% to all Resistances
You and Nearby Allies have 64 to 96 added Fire Damage per Red Socket
You and Nearby Allies have 56 to 88 added Cold Damage per Green Socket
You and Nearby Allies have 16 to 144 added Lightning Damage per Blue Socket
You and Nearby Allies have 47 to 61 added Chaos Damage per White Socket
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Aul, the Crystal King
uniques.flavourText:
You will know if your subjects follow you from fear
or respect when you have your first moment of weakness.
If it's the former, they will tear you into pieces like rabid dogs.

uniques.name: Crown of Thorns
explicitModifiers: Reflects 5 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
+25 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits

uniques.name: Crystal Vault
explicitModifiers: 20% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage
30% of Fire Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
When Solaris closes her burning eye
At the end of time,
the world will perish in ice.

uniques.name: Crystallised Omniscience
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Attributes instead apply to Omniscience
+1% to all Elemental Resistances per 15 Omniscience
Attribute Requirements can be satisfied by (15-25)% of Omniscience
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
That winter, scorched refugees emerged from the shrine,
speaking only in strange tongues. They prayed to a new
symbol of power, not out of love, but out of fear.

uniques.name: Curtain Call
explicitModifiers: Skills which throw Mines throw up to 1 additional Mine if you have at least 800 Dexterity
Skills which throw Mines throw up to 1 additional Mine if you have at least 800 Intelligence
uniques.flavourText:
Sing with me one last duet,
the curtain closes nigh.
Join me in a quiet song,
Before we all must die.

uniques.name: Cybil's Paw
explicitModifiers: Gain (15-20) Life per Enemy Hit with Spells
8% increased Spell Damage per 5% Chance to Block Attack Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Tread lightly, lest their vigil find you.
Speak softly, lest their reason fend you.
Cut gently, lest their spirit haunt you.

uniques.name: Cyclopean Coil
explicitModifiers: Cannot be Frozen if Dexterity is higher than Intelligence
Cannot be Ignited if Strength is higher than Dexterity
Cannot be Shocked if Intelligence is higher than Strength
1% increased Damage per 5 of your lowest Attribute
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder
uniques.flavourText:
With the patience of a prowling lion,
the Shade watched the Scholar.

uniques.name: Dance of the Offered
explicitModifiers: Source: Opening Thunder Coffer in Conduit of Lightning
Upgrade: Upgrades to Omeyocan via Vial of the Ritual
You have Onslaught while not on Low Mana
uniques.flavourText:
Facing their death,
the mind of a sacrifice
retreats into instinct and madness.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of the Ritual

uniques.name: Daresso's Courage

+100% Chance to Block Attack Damage if you have Blocked Spell Damage Recently
+100% chance to Block Spell Damage if you have Blocked Attack Damage Recently
uniques.flavourText:
By tourney's end, Daresso bled and shivered.
Yet even accursed treachery failed to steal the champion's victory.

uniques.name: Daresso's Defiance
explicitModifiers: 2% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
You lose all Endurance Charges when Hit
You gain an Endurance Charge on Kill
You gain Onslaught for 5 seconds per Endurance Charge when Hit
100% increased Effect of Onslaught on you
uniques.flavourText:
"When your back is against the wall,
And your opponent is bleeding you dry,
There is only one appropriate response:
Unbridled, overwhelming violence."
- Daresso, the Sword King

uniques.name: Daresso's Passion
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
(60-80)% increased Damage while you have no Frenzy Charges
uniques.flavourText:
It doesn't matter how well the young swordsman trains.
All form and finesse are forgotten when blood first hits the ground.

uniques.name: Daresso's Salute
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life
60% increased Melee Damage when on Full Life
uniques.flavourText:
"A bit short in the arm, are you?
Then you'll be short of a head soon enough."
- Daresso the Daring

uniques.name: Darkness Enthroned
explicitModifiers: (50-100)% increased Effect of Socketed Abyss Jewels
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Amanamu, Liege of the Lightless or Ulaman, Sovereign of the Well
uniques.flavourText:
Hold in your hand the darkness
and never will the light blind you.

uniques.name: Darkray Vectors
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Evasion Rating per Frenzy Charge
5% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
uniques.flavourText:
"Sirrius flew on wings of light, faster than wind, faster
than thought. But try as he might to outrun the darkness,
it was there, at every turn, waiting for him."
- Azmerian legend

uniques.name: Darkscorn
explicitModifiers: 25% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
25% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
20% chance for Poisons inflicted with this Weapon to deal 300% more Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"The Spirit of War knows nothing of good and evil.
It knows only destruction."
- Sekhema Asenath

uniques.name: Dawnbreaker
explicitModifiers: -1% Chance to Block Attack Damage for every 200 Fire Damage taken from Hits Recently
(10-20)% of Cold Damage taken as Fire Damage
(10-20)% of Lightning Damage taken as Fire Damage
(10-20)% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
Scorch Enemies in Close Range when you Block
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch
uniques.flavourText:
"The newcomers warn of doom and death beyond mortal ken.
I ask, why should we fear the fire when we serve the Lord of Light?"
- Maxarius, the first High Templar

uniques.name: Dawnstrider
explicitModifiers: Socketed Slam Gems are Supported by Level 25 Earthbreaker
(3-5)% of Damage from Hits is taken from your nearest Totem's Life before you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch
uniques.flavourText:
In a void strewn with incandescent stardust,
the emissary of flame traverses interplanetary space
consuming the knowledge of fallen civilisations.

uniques.name: Dead Reckoning
explicitModifiers: Minions have +(7-10)% to all Elemental Resistances
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Summon Skeletons can Summon up to 3 Skeleton Mages
uniques.flavourText:
A mage from the coast rode up on a broken nag, legs burnt to his bones.
Before he collapsed, he uttered:
"I watched the world we know end yesterday."

uniques.name: Death Rush
explicitModifiers: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
uniques.flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

uniques.name: Death's Door
explicitModifiers: 50% increased Elemental Ailment Duration on you
Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Eternal Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText:
To extend your life as long as possible
is to extend all the maladies that come with it.

uniques.name: Death's Hand
explicitModifiers: 30% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Stun
Gain Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
"All are welcome in Hinekora's eternal home."
- Karui Proverb

uniques.name: Death's Harp
uniques.flavourText:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

uniques.name: Death's Oath
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Death Aura when Equipped
1% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
You take 450 Chaos Damage per second for 3 seconds on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
Tears of blood, aching heart,
My dear Isildria must depart.

uniques.name: Death's Opus
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

uniques.name: Debeon's Dirge
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Movement Speed if you've Warcried Recently
150% increased Elemental Damage if you've Warcried Recently
Warcries Knock Back and Interrupt Enemies in a smaller Area
uniques.flavourText:
A sharp and heavy beat,
discorded, out of tune,
when you hear it on the wind,
you know death will follow soon.

uniques.name: Deerstalker
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Trap
15% increased Movement Speed for 9 seconds on Throwing a Trap
uniques.flavourText: Anticipation, preparation, exhilaration, celebration.

uniques.name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-20)% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

uniques.name: Deidbell
explicitModifiers: Cannot Leech when on Low Life
Skills which Exert an Attack have (20-40)% chance to not count that Attack

uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: May you never hear it toll.

uniques.name: Demon Stitcher
explicitModifiers: Sacrifice (5-25)% of Life to gain that much Energy Shield when you Cast a Spell
uniques.flavourText:
Xibaqua's treachery was met with divine fury.
One by one, the gods reclaimed their flesh,
until all that remained was a droplet of pure light:
The first Vaal.

uniques.name: Dendrobate
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Chance to Poison
(75-100)% increased Damage with Poison if you have at least 300 Dexterity
(15-25)% increased Poison Duration if you have at least 150 Intelligence
uniques.flavourText:
Ask any tracker and they'll tell you:
the most dangerous animals
are the ones who don't bother to hide.

uniques.name: Devoto's Devotion
uniques.flavourText:
Swift as thought are the actions of Man
when borne on wings of divine providence.

uniques.name: Dialla's Malefaction

Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience
uniques.flavourText:
He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

uniques.name: Disintegrator
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: +1 to Maximum Siphoning Charges per Elder or Shaper Item Equipped
25% chance to gain a Siphoning Charge when you use a Skill
Adds (12-14) to (15-16) Physical Damage to Attacks and Spells per Siphoning Charge

0.2% of Damage Leeched as Life per Siphoning Charge
Take 150 Physical Damage per Second per Siphoning Charge if you've used a Skill Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Blurred is the boundary
between creator and destroyer.

uniques.name: Dissolution of the Flesh
explicitModifiers: Life that would be lost by taking Damage is instead Reserved
until you take no Damage to Life for 2 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch
uniques.flavourText:
"We awoke to a sudden dawn cresting through the mountains.
Each peak rose into searing fire, a massive roiling tide.
A great eye gazed upon us, and we became known—utterly."

uniques.name: Divinarius
explicitModifiers: (200-250)% increased Critical Strike Chance for Spells if you've Killed Recently
+(60-100)% to Critical Strike Multiplier for Spells if you haven't Killed Recently
uniques.flavourText:
Divine intervention feels better
when you do it yourself.

uniques.name: Divination Distillate
explicitModifiers: (30-50)% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Knowledge is fermented in pain and loss
Distilled with reflection
To quench the thirst of those
who dream of enlightenment

uniques.name: Divine Inferno
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Combust is Disabled
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Attacks Exerted by Infernal Cry deal (40-60)% more Damage with Ignite
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Gripping the stolen Spear of Solerai in hand,
the bandit king of Stridevolf watched his enclave burn.
As foretold, the weapon was powerful beyond compare,
but using it had cost him absolutely everything.

uniques.name: Doedre's Damning
explicitModifiers: You can apply an additional Curse
uniques.flavourText:
Where her mouth should have been
there was only a whirling, black void.

uniques.name: Doedre's Elixir
explicitModifiers: Removes 80% of your maximum Energy Shield on use
You take 50% of your maximum Life as Chaos Damage on use
uniques.flavourText:
Doedre Darktongue knew the Way of the Thaumaturge.
In order to receive, one must give... without hesitation.

uniques.name: Doedre's Malevolence
explicitModifiers: Adds (48-56) to (73-84) Chaos Damage to Spells
Skills Supported by Unleash have (30-50)% increased Seal gain frequency
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
While Doedre lacked Maligaro's sense of style,
she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.

uniques.name: Doedre's Scorn
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
Curse Skills have (30-50)% increased Skill Effect Duration
Adds 37 to 71 Chaos Damage for each Curse on the Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
A scar of the flesh you'll never forget,
A scar of the mind you'll never remember.

uniques.name: Doedre's Skin
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Blasphemy
Grants Level 20 Summon Doedre's Effigy Skill
Socketed Hex Curse Skills are Triggered by Doedre's Effigy when Summoned
Hexes from Socketed Skills can apply 5 additional Curses
20% less Effect of Curses from Socketed Hex Skills
uniques.flavourText:
As she was sentenced to death, Doedre was silent.
As she was tied to the stake, Doedre was silent.
As the flames licked away her life, Doedre was silent.
But Wraeclast had not heard the last of her.

uniques.name: Doedre's Tenure
uniques.flavourText:
While Doedre lacked Maligaro's sense of style,
she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.

uniques.name: Doedre's Tongue
explicitModifiers: (20-25)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
Cursed Enemies cannot inflict Elemental Ailments on You
uniques.flavourText:
Maligaro did the cutting... at her request.
In the new void, a malevolent power emerged.

uniques.name: Doomfletch
implicitModifiers: (20-24)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitModifiers: Gain 100% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of each Element
uniques.flavourText:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

uniques.name: Doomfletch's Prism
implicitModifiers: (20-24)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
