explicitModifiers: Gain 100% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of each Element
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

uniques.name: Doomsower
implicitModifiers: Socketed Melee Gems have 15% increased Area of Effect
explicitModifiers: Attack Skills gain 5% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage per Socketed Red Gem
You have Vaal Pact while all Socketed Gems are Red
uniques.flavourText:
So the seed of hate was born,
Evil forged and Hope forsworn.

uniques.name: Doon Cuebiyari
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Iron Will
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Damage per 8 Strength when in Main Hand
1% increased Armour per 16 Strength when in Off Hand
uniques.flavourText:
My Iron heart will beat when yours is rust.
I take your Strength, your power, your lust.
By Iron Will alone I set my mind in motion.
Through endless storms of fervent devotion.

uniques.name: Doppelgänger Guise
explicitModifiers: (40-60)% more Critical Strike Chance while Insane
Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed while Insane
(30-40)% less Physical and Chaos Damage Taken while Sane
Regenerate 10% Life over one second when Hit while Sane
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText:
Within each of us exists a being of pure malice,
held back only by the lies we tell ourselves.

uniques.name: Doryani's Catalyst
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Elemental Proliferation
explicitModifiers: 0.2% of Elemental Damage Leeched as Life
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice
uniques.flavourText:
The result of the catalytic reaction would be either immortality for all,
or death for all. It was a risk Doryani was willing to take.

uniques.name: Doryani's Delusion
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 25 Purity of Fire Skill
Adds (25-30) to (40-45) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Apex Assembly in Doryani's Machinarium
uniques.flavourText:
"Every day we choose safety or knowledge.
Live and stagnate, or risk death for truth.
I would rather see the end of the Vaal
than help it tread water."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Doryani's Delusion
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 25 Purity of Fire Skill
Adds (25-30) to (40-45) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Apex Assembly in Doryani's Machinarium
uniques.flavourText:
"Every day we choose safety or knowledge.
Live and stagnate, or risk death for truth.
I would rather see the end of the Vaal
than help it tread water."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Doryani's Delusion
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 25 Purity of Fire Skill
Adds (25-30) to (40-45) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Apex Assembly in Doryani's Machinarium
uniques.flavourText:
"Every day we choose safety or knowledge.
Live and stagnate, or risk death for truth.
I would rather see the end of the Vaal
than help it tread water."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Doryani's Fist
explicitModifiers: Adds (150-225) to (525-600) Lightning Damage to Unarmed Melee Hits
Adds (90-135) to (315-360) Lightning Damage to Spells while Unarmed
+(200-250) Energy Shield gained on Killing a Shocked Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
Doryani's ingenuity raised the Vaal Empire
to unprecedented heights. His curiosity
reduced it to ruins and bones.

uniques.name: Doryani's Invitation
explicitModifiers: 25% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold during any Flask Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice
uniques.flavourText:
"You can invite them but you can never be
sure who will come knocking."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Doryani's Prototype
explicitModifiers: Armour also applies to Lightning Damage taken from Hits
Lightning Resistance does not affect Lightning Damage taken
Nearby Enemies have Lightning Resistance equal to yours
uniques.flavourText:
"This was the first step in some grand design,
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."
- Dominus, High Templar

uniques.name: Dreadarc
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Flammability on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
The fastest way to a man's heart
is through his sternum.

uniques.name: Dreadbeak
implicitModifiers: 100% increased Damage when on Low Life
explicitModifiers: You have Onslaught while on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: As battle calms, blood turns to rust.

uniques.name: Dreadsurge
explicitModifiers: Hits ignore Enemy Monster Fire Resistance while you are Ignited
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The fastest way to a man's heart
is through his sternum.

uniques.name: Dream Fragments
uniques.flavourText:
Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness
And awoke its Master.

uniques.name: Dreamfeather
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Attack Damage per 450 Evasion Rating
uniques.flavourText:
She dances a dance beneath the shade,
The twilight shroud her only blade,
Who now hears her feathersteps flowing?
Beneath the stars, the moondrops glowing.

uniques.name: Drillneck
explicitModifiers: (10-14) to (19-24) Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
Arrows deal 50% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments to Targets they Pierce
uniques.flavourText:
"Why waste such a fine arrow on just one man?"
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer

uniques.name: Duskblight
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 1 Stalking Pustule on Kill
+50% to Chaos Resistance during any Flask Effect
Adds (30-40) to (50-60) Chaos Damage to Spells and Attacks during any Flask Effect
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"A lick of shadow may ease
the petty frictions of one's life."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

uniques.name: Duskdawn
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
+1% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+60% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've dealt a Non-Critical Strike Recently
(120-150)% increased Spell Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
"The world is not simply black and white,
it is not divided into good and evil.
But black and white, good and evil, do exist,
and we must know how to recognize them."
- Archbishop Geofri

uniques.name: Dusktoe
explicitModifiers: +50% to Chaos Resistance during any Flask Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"A lick of shadow may ease
the petty frictions of one's life."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

uniques.name: Dyadian Dawn
explicitModifiers: 1% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life against Chilled Enemies
Ignites you inflict with Attacks deal Damage 35% faster
uniques.flavourText:
With her cold resolve
And burning sacrifice
The Eternal twins arose.

uniques.name: Dyadus
explicitModifiers: Adds (255-285) to (300-330) Fire Damage in Main Hand
Adds (255-285) to (300-330) Cold Damage in Off Hand
25% chance to Ignite when in Main Hand
100% increased Damage with Ignite inflicted on Chilled Enemies
Chill Enemies for 1 second on Hit with this Weapon when in Off Hand
uniques.flavourText:
Born of love, forged in blood
He burned as a torch in the blackest night
She shone as ice in the winter sun
Proudly, fiercely
At their mother's side, forever.

uniques.name: Dying Breath
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: 18% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
18% increased Area of Effect of Hex Skills
Nearby Enemies have 18% increased Effect of Curses on them
18% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
uniques.flavourText:
The whispers of the dead
Carry wisdom for the living,
If you are willing to give your life
To listen.

uniques.name: Dying Sun
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% increased Area of Effect during Effect
Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Shaper
uniques.flavourText:
All things must die.
Whether you burn out or explode is up to you.

uniques.name: Earendel's Embrace
explicitModifiers: Summoned Skeletons Cover Enemies in Ash on Hit
Summoned Skeletons take (15-30)% of their Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
Summoned Skeletons have Avatar of Fire
uniques.flavourText:
There the weary multitude of man-kind
shall turn in their masses into the wide fire,
where the destroying flame embraces the living,
some will go up, some down, filled with misery.

uniques.name: Eber's Unification
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 10 Void Gaze when you use a Skill
Gain (5-8)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The impediments of flesh are weak.
The air we breathe knows no such boundaries.
I exhale, and you inhale,
and inexorably we inch towards oneness.

uniques.name: Echoes of Creation
explicitModifiers: Socketed Warcry Skills have +1 Cooldown Use
When you Attack, take (15-20)% of Life as Physical Damage for
Skills deal (10-15)% more Damage for each Warcry Exerting them
uniques.flavourText:
A cacophony of battle cries
Reverberate through time and space
Inflicting pain beyond measure

uniques.name: Echoforge
explicitModifiers: (-40-40)% reduced Area of Effect for Attacks
Deal no Physical or Elemental Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText: Witness the emergence of a new cosmic power.

uniques.name: Eclipse Solaris
implicitModifiers: Adds (5-10) to (11-13) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitModifiers: (120-140)% increased Critical Strike Chance against Blinded Enemies
Adds 2 to 5 Fire Damage to Attacks for every 1% your Light Radius is above base value

uniques.name: Edge of Madness
implicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 2 Physical Damage to Attacks per Level
uniques.flavourText:
Soon, the pleas for mercy were muted.
Only one voice remained.
Laughing.

uniques.name: Efficient Training
explicitModifiers: Intelligence from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Strength
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText: Working smart and working hard aren't mutually exclusive.

uniques.name: El'Abin's Visage
explicitModifiers: Has a Crucible Passive Skill Tree
Crucible Passive Skill Tree is removed if this Modifier is removed
uniques.flavourText:
As the fiery remnants of our outpost were subsumed into the caldera,
a thunderous voice echoed across the barren landscape,
"Your fragility is your folly. May others rise where you have fallen."
- El'Abin, Bloodeater

uniques.name: Eldritch Knowledge
explicitModifiers: 5% increased Chaos Damage per 10 Intelligence from Allocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"True Thaumaturgy can only be learned
by the brilliant or the mad."
- Shavronne of Umbra

uniques.name: Elegant Hubris
explicitModifiers: Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Eternal Legion
uniques.flavourText: They believed themselves better than the past, but that confidence brought about nightmare.

uniques.name: Elevore
explicitModifiers: Recover (100-200) Life when you Suppress Spell Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Ancient worshippers of the Greatwolf were overtaken
by a ravenous hunger for all things mystical.

uniques.name: Elixir of the Unbroken Circle
explicitModifiers: Recover 4% of Life per Endurance Charge on use
Lose all Endurance Charges on use
Gain 1 Endurance Charge per Second during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Medved, Feller of Heroes in Expedition Logbook
uniques.flavourText:
Nothing endures. All things end.
Then, they begin again.

uniques.name: Emberwake
explicitModifiers: You can inflict an additional Ignite on each Enemy
uniques.flavourText: Leave the world in flames behind you.

uniques.name: Emperor's Cunning
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Eternal Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText:
The greatest victories happen
before the battle has begun.

uniques.name: Emperor's Mastery
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Eternal Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText:
Learn as much as you can,
and surround yourself with people who know the rest.

uniques.name: Emperor's Might
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Eternal Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText: Even an iron fist can be handled with grace.

uniques.name: Emperor's Vigilance
explicitModifiers: Damage taken from Blocked Hits cannot bypass Energy Shield
Damage taken from Unblocked hits always bypasses Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
Chitus' success stemmed from his cunning, taking calculated
risks so that greater dangers could be averted.

uniques.name: Emperor's Wit
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Eternal Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText:
Language is a tool that can be used to build walls
or tear them down.

uniques.name: Empire's Grasp
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Knockback
uniques.flavourText:
"I like my vassals at sword point,
but my enemies as close as the hilt."
- Emperor Chitus

uniques.name: Endless Misery
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Discharge has 60% less Area of Effect
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Discharge Cooldown is 250 ms
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Discharge deals 60% less Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The sky, the land, the people burned.
What little still stood soon faced wild, battering storms.
Winter arrived suddenly and stayed for a generation.
Civilisation was not simply halted, but reversed, erased.

uniques.name: Energised Armour
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Energy Shield in Radius are Transformed to apply to Armour at 200% of their value
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText: "I've yet to see prayer stop an arrow."

uniques.name: Energy From Within
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Life in Radius are Transformed to apply to Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
The Azmeri ascetics learnt the power
of going without the body's ordinary cravings.

uniques.name: Enmity's Embrace
explicitModifiers: Take (300-500) Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Fear in Moment of Trauma
uniques.flavourText:
In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

uniques.name: Entropic Devastation
explicitModifiers: (30-50)% increased Effect of Impales inflicted with Spells
Critical Strikes with Spells inflict Impale
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Shaper (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
A legion of lives claimed
by the shards of obliterated worlds.

uniques.name: Ephemeral Edge
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon have Added Maximum Lightning Damage equal to (10-15)% of Player's Maximum Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
In the rift between future and past,
life passes quickly.

uniques.name: Esh's Mirror
explicitModifiers: Shocks you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres
Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage for each Shocked Enemy you've Killed Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Esh Breach or from Esh, Forked Thought
uniques.flavourText:
She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

uniques.name: Esh's Visage
explicitModifiers: Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield while not on Low Life
Reflect Shocks applied to you to all Nearby Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Esh's Mirror using Blessing of Esh

uniques.name: Essence Worm
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems
uniques.flavourText:
"This thing is not a pet. It is a parasite that feeds on the very will of its host.
Like any part of nightmare, it has found a way to make its price... acceptable."
- Malachai the Soulless

uniques.name: Essentia Sanguis
implicitModifiers: 2% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: Energy Shield Leech Effects from Attacks are not removed at Full Energy Shield
Maximum Recovery per Energy Shield Leech is Doubled
uniques.flavourText:
The darkest clouds clashed and coupled,
giving birth to four lightning children of hate.

uniques.name: Eternal Damnation
explicitModifiers: Gain additional Elemental Damage Reduction equal to half your Chaos Resistance
Maximum Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges is 0
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Lycia, Herald of the Scourge in The Beyond
uniques.flavourText: The price of immortality is isolation.

uniques.name: Ewar's Mirage
explicitModifiers: Attacks Chain an additional time when in Main Hand
Attacks fire an additional Projectile when in Off Hand
(40-55)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
uniques.flavourText:
A single breeze blows
A hundred blades dance

uniques.name: Expedition's End
explicitModifiers: Freeze Chilled Enemies as though dealing (50-100)% more Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
He may have returned from the frozen southern reaches,
but that doesn't mean he ever truly escaped them.

uniques.name: Extractor Mentis
explicitModifiers: 5% chance to grant Onslaught to nearby Enemies on Kill
5% chance to grant Chaotic Might to nearby Enemies on Kill
10% chance to gain Onslaught for 10 seconds on Kill
10% chance to gain Chaotic Might for 10 seconds on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
When slaughtered flesh falls silent,
the soul may yet scream on.

uniques.name: Eye of Chayula
uniques.flavourText: Never blinking, always watching.

uniques.name: Eye of Innocence
explicitModifiers: Take 100 Fire Damage when you Ignite an Enemy
2% of Fire Damage Leeched as Life while Ignited
uniques.flavourText:
"...and so He said: 'Let only the good meet my gaze'
and no eye met His. So He called down the cleansing flames
and let black smoke sweep the Sinners away."
- Book of Innocence

uniques.name: Eye of Malice
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to inflict Cold Exposure on Hit
25% chance to inflict Fire Exposure on Hit
Nearby Enemies have 50% increased Fire and Cold Resistances
uniques.flavourText:
Through vision coloured by burning rage and icy hate
peers a visitor from a realm of ill intent...

uniques.name: Eyes of the Greatwolf
uniques.flavourText:
I am but a vessel for a greater force.
It acts through me. Speaks through me.
Decides what lives and dies through me.
And will change the world through me.

uniques.name: Ezomyte Hold
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Centuries of servitude, a day
of glory, an eternity of death.

uniques.name: Facebreaker
explicitModifiers: (600-1000)% more Physical Damage with Unarmed Melee Attacks
uniques.flavourText: Fly like a Storm Crow, crush like a Rhoa

uniques.name: Fairgraves' Tricorne
explicitModifiers: Adds 15 to 25 Cold Damage to Attacks
You can be Touched by Tormented Spirits
uniques.flavourText:
Fairgraves' trusty tricorne accompanied him far across
the seas, deep under the ground, and even beyond death.

uniques.name: Faithguard
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Maximum Energy Shield instead apply to Ward
uniques.flavourText: The priests of the Kalguur worshipped knowledge, not gods.

uniques.name: Faminebind
explicitModifiers: Deals 50 Chaos Damage per second to nearby Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
After the Great Fire, the land lay barren
and our forefathers grew weak.
Mother Gull took pity on them
and gave them grain and water.

uniques.name: Farrul's Bite
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Aspect of the Cat Skill
+1% to Critical Strike Chance while affected by Aspect of the Cat
Critical Strikes have (10-20)% chance to Blind Enemies while you have Cat's Stealth
(40-50)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Blinded Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Farrul, First of the Plains
uniques.flavourText:
It is a fool who strikes the turtle's shell.
The First of the Plains teaches us to exploit weaknesses,
and where no weakness can be found, to create one.

uniques.name: Farrul's Chase
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Intimidating Cry when you lose Cat's Stealth
20% increased Movement Speed while you have Cat's Stealth
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Farrul, First of the Plains
uniques.flavourText:
A secret is a weapon your enemies do not have.
When the First of the Plains hunted, she moved in silence and acted quickly.
To do otherwise is to arm your foes.

uniques.name: Farrul's Fur
explicitModifiers: Aspect of the Cat has no Reservation
Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Power Charges when you gain Cat's Stealth
You have Phasing while you have Cat's Stealth
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Farrul, First of the Plains
uniques.flavourText:
The First of the Plains was the First of the Hunt
It was she who showed us that there is honour
in waiting in the shadows and picking your moment.

uniques.name: Farrul's Pounce
explicitModifiers: Attacks always inflict Bleeding while you have Cat's Stealth
(40-50)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Bleeding Enemies
You have Crimson Dance while you have Cat's Stealth
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Farrul, First of the Plains
uniques.flavourText:
A hungry beast wastes no energy.
Every strike, no matter how small, must work towards victory.
The First of the Plains teaches us
that the largest prey can still be whittled away.

uniques.name: Fate of the Vaal
explicitModifiers: 100% of Physical Damage from Hits with this Weapon is Converted to a random Element
Hits with this Weapon always Ignite, Freeze, and Shock
Hits with this Weapon deal (30-60)% increased Damage to Ignited Enemies
Hits with this Weapon deal (30-60)% increased Damage to Frozen Enemies
Hits with this Weapon deal (30-60)% increased Damage to Shocked Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Story of the Vaal via Vial of Fate
uniques.flavourText:
Doryani promises immortality, yet we build great structures,
carve magnificent works into stone, so a part of us lives onward.
A sign of faithlessness through action.

uniques.name: Fated End
explicitModifiers: Curse Skills have (8-12)% increased Cast Speed
Non-Aura Hexes expire upon reaching (180-220)% of base Effect
Non-Aura Hexes gain 20% increased Effect per second
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: All roads lead to that destined doom.

uniques.name: Feastbind
explicitModifiers: Adds 5 to 10 Physical Damage to Attacks
0.2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
50% increased Flask Charges gained during any Flask Effect
50% increased Mana Regeneration Rate during any Flask Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Our forefathers danced and drank and ate their fill
and did not honour the First Ones for their gifts.
So the First Ones filled the sky with fire.

uniques.name: Femurs of the Saints
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
+2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
explicitModifiers: +1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per Summoned Skeleton
2% increased Attack and Cast Speed per Summoned Raging Spirit
Regenerate 0.6% of Life per second for each Raised Zombie
30% increased Mana Regeneration Rate per Raised Spectre
uniques.flavourText:
"They spent a lifetime in the service of God,
only to spend eternity in the service of me."
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra

uniques.name: Fencoil
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 8 Trap

uniques.name: Fenumus' Shroud
explicitModifiers: Enemies affected by your Spider's Webs deal 10% reduced Damage
Enemies affected by your Spider's Webs have -10% to All Resistances
(50-70)% increased Aspect of the Spider Area of Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Fenumus, First of the Night
uniques.flavourText:
The First of the Night was the first explorer
It was she who first braved night's terrors
and found comfort in silence and solace.

uniques.name: Fenumus' Spinnerets
explicitModifiers: Aspect of the Spider can inflict Spider's Web on Enemies an additional time
Gain (15-20) Energy Shield for each Enemy you Hit which is affected by a Spider's Web
(40-50)% increased Aspect of the Spider Debuff Duration
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Fenumus, First of the Night
uniques.flavourText:
When the fires spilled out of the mountain, The First of the Night wove a net
and was carried into the night on its hot winds.
Though we cannot live without danger, we can learn to live with it.

uniques.name: Fenumus' Toxins
explicitModifiers: Adds (16-21) to (31-36) Chaos Damage to Spells
10% chance to gain a Power Charge on hitting an Enemy affected by a Spider's Web
(6-10)% chance to Poison per Power Charge
(15-20)% increased Damage with Poison per Power Charge
Aspect of the Spider inflicts Spider's Webs and Hinder every 0.5 Seconds instead
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Fenumus, First of the Night
uniques.flavourText:
A hunter uses everything at their disposal.
The First of the Night did not hold back her venom.
She used it to weaken her enemies,
and used her enemies to strengthen her many children.

uniques.name: Fenumus' Weave
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Aspect of the Spider Skill
(40-60)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Enemies affected by 3 Spider's Webs
Adds (8-10) to (13-15) Chaos Damage for each Spider's Web on the Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Fenumus, First of the Night
uniques.flavourText:
A burden shared is a burden made lighter.
The First of the Night teaches us that our burdens
are not just ours to bear, but ours to use against oppressors.

uniques.name: Fertile Mind
explicitModifiers: Dexterity from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
"The swallow flew fast and took many turns,
spilling a seed where no plant had grown before.
This seed grew and grew until the desert became fertile and abundant.
Your mind is like this seed."
- Maraketh Proverb

uniques.name: Festering Resentment
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
+(30-45)% Chance to Block Spell Damage while in Off Hand
All Damage with Triggered Spells can Poison
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
That which we cannot forgive
harms all those we hold dear.

uniques.name: Fevered Mind
explicitModifiers: Notable Passive Skills in Radius are Transformed to
instead grant: 10% increased Mana Cost of Skills and 20% increased Spell Damage
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText: In sickness, the insane becomes sane.

uniques.name: Fidelitas' Spike
explicitModifiers: Herald of Thunder has 50% increased Buff Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Maligaro was transformed by Raulo's love.
Thaumaturgy allowed Maligaro to return the favour.

uniques.name: Fight for Survival
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Melee Damage
dealt by Frost Blades Penetrates 15% Cold Resistance
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Frost Blades has 25% increased Projectile Speed
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The winter that followed the Cataclysm was especially harsh.
Wraeclast's few survivors fought to the death for the last scraps of bread.

uniques.name: Fireborn
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to other Damage Types in Radius are Transformed to apply to Fire Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Leaders are not born in times of peace.
Leaders are born in ruins and flames.

uniques.name: Firesong
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Ignite Duration on you apply to all Elemental Ailments
uniques.flavourText:
Within a firestorm, the Thane commands the flames
Emblazoned by glory and the song of the First Ones
For the master of fire fears nothing.

uniques.name: First Snow
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Freezing Pulse fires 2 additional Projectiles
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, 25% increased Freezing Pulse Damage if
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Cadiro watched young Chitus play in the frostbitten grass, care-free, happy,
and unburdened by the responsibility the Perandus scion would soon endure.

uniques.name: Flamesight
uniques.flavourText: See creation as it was, aflame and frantic.

uniques.name: Flesh and Spirit
explicitModifiers: Kills grant an additional Vaal Soul if you have Rampaged Recently
uniques.flavourText:
What is greed but trading a mountain of death
for a sliver of life?

uniques.name: Flesh-Eater
explicitModifiers: 1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
3% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life against Bleeding Enemies
30% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
I suffer, I long, with thirst to slake.
Though countless corpses lie in wake.

uniques.name: Fleshcrafter
explicitModifiers: Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Minions' Energy Shield
Minions have (50-100)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
While Minions have Energy Shield, their Hits Ignore Monster Elemental Resistances
Minions Convert 2% of their Maximum Life to Maximum Energy Shield per 1% Chaos Resistance they have
uniques.flavourText: Imbue the body with stolen spirit, hold the leash tight.

uniques.name: Fleshrender
explicitModifiers: Cannot Poison Enemies with at least 12 Poisons on them
Inflict (2-3) additional Poisons on the same Target
when you inflict Poison with this weapon
Wither on Hit with this weapon against Enemies with at least 12 Poisons on them
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on Fleshrender
uniques.flavourText:
"This blade, which once tasted the green ichor of Kulemak himself, is now
anathema to all life. Piece by piece, we shall steal back what we are owed..."
- Sak, of the Afarud

uniques.name: Fluid Motion
explicitModifiers: Strength from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Dexterity
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText: Even the strongest of steel can be made to bend.

uniques.name: Font of Thunder
explicitModifiers: 40% of Cold Damage taken as Lightning Damage
40% of Fire Damage taken as Lightning Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: The lightning fears not the flame.

uniques.name: Forbidden Taste
explicitModifiers: 25% of Maximum Life taken as Chaos Damage per second
uniques.flavourText: Your reach exceeds your grasp.

uniques.name: Fortified Legion
explicitModifiers: Minions Recover 2% of their Life when they Block
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable

uniques.name: Fortress Covenant
explicitModifiers: Minions have +(10-12)% Chance to Block Attack Damage
Minions have +(10-12)% Chance to Block Spell Damage
Notable Passive Skills in Radius are Transformed to
instead grant: Minions take 20% increased Damage
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
When you throw iron weapons against an iron wall
you only make the wall grow thicker.

uniques.name: Fox's Fortune
explicitModifiers: Adds 5 to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks
+1500 to Evasion Rating while on Full Life
Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are on Full Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: To catch an animal, think like an animal.

uniques.name: Foxshade
explicitModifiers: +1000 to Evasion Rating while on Full Life
30% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life
Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are on Full Life

uniques.name: Fractal Thoughts
explicitModifiers: +(25-40)% to Critical Strike Multiplier if Dexterity is higher than Intelligence
15% increased Dexterity if Strength is higher than Intelligence
uniques.flavourText:
"The more the warrior understood Tangmazu's gift, the less the mask aided him.
His dreams were filled with divine laughter."
- Tenth Song of the Islands

uniques.name: Fragile Bloom
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The first green shoots of Spring are the most resilient,
and the most vulnerable.

uniques.name: Fragility
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText: "Your flesh will fail you."

uniques.name: Fragment of Eternity
explicitModifiers: 15% chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: From Dust
explicitModifiers: Summon 4 additional Skeletons with Summon Skeletons
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Sarn's crematorium, built amidst the city's slums,
coated the nearby shanties in a film of ash.
The dwellers grew ill, sputtering and coughing,
and in this way the crematorium guaranteed it would have many customers.

uniques.name: Frostbreath
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon deal Double Damage to Chilled Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.

uniques.name: Frostferno
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Fire Gems
+2 to Level of Socketed Cold Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Cold to Fire
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.

uniques.name: Frozen Trail
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Frostbolt fires 2 additional Projectiles
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Frostbolt Projectiles gain 40% increased Projectile Speed per second
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The Maraketh knew that a mountain path
free of vegetation was cut by regular avalanches,
and so the advancing Eternals were unwittingly drawn into a deathtrap.

uniques.name: Fury Valve
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to number of Projectiles instead apply
to the number of targets Projectiles Split towards
uniques.flavourText: A single act of anger travels countless paths of destruction.

uniques.name: Galesight
uniques.flavourText: See creation as it will be, frozen and silent.

uniques.name: Gamblesprint
explicitModifiers: When Hit, gain a random Movement Speed modifier from 40% reduced to 100% increased, until Hit again
uniques.flavourText:
All your tomorrows lie ahead of you,
unknown and snarled to the very last.

uniques.name: Gang's Momentum
explicitModifiers: (25-40)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Ignited Enemies
uniques.flavourText: Become one with the unstoppable flame.

uniques.name: Garb of the Ephemeral
explicitModifiers: Gain a Divine Charge on Hit
You gain Divinity for 10 seconds on reaching maximum Divine Charges
Lose all Divine Charges when you gain Divinity
Nearby Allies' Action Speed cannot be modified to below Base Value
Nearby Enemies cannot deal Critical Strikes
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex
uniques.flavourText:
Exceptional men and women of strong will can flicker a spark,
but something much greater is needed to unleash the wildfire of true divine flames.

uniques.name: Garukhan's Flight
explicitModifiers: Immune to Burning Ground, Shocked Ground and Chilled Ground
Regenerate 100 Life per second while moving
uniques.flavourText: The higher you soar, the further you must fall.

uniques.name: Geofri's Baptism
uniques.flavourText:
"One quick tap is all the persuasion you'll need."
- Archbishop Geofri of Phrecia Cathedral

uniques.name: Geofri's Crest
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Holy Relics

uniques.name: Geofri's Devotion
implicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Elemental Warding on Melee Hit while Cursed
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"One quick tap is all the persuasion you'll need."
- Archbishop Geofri of Phrecia Cathedral

uniques.name: Geofri's Legacy
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Holy Relics
Summoned Holy Relics have (20-25)% reduced Cooldown Recovery Rate
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
In the battle for honour, Geofri won.
Not so, the battle for survival.

uniques.name: Geofri's Sanctuary
uniques.flavourText:
Faith does not make us invulnerable.
It makes us immortal.

uniques.name: Ghostwrithe
explicitModifiers: 50% of Maximum Life Converted to Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText: Faith springs abundant at the edge of death.

uniques.name: Giantsbane
explicitModifiers: Adds (5-8) to (12-16) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
The monstrous men of yore used bows too,
theirs were just bigger.

uniques.name: Gifts from Above
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 10 Consecrate when you deal a Critical Strike
(40-50)% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Enemies killed with a Critical Strike
50% increased Damage while on Consecrated Ground
+5% Chance to Block Attack Damage while on Consecrated Ground
uniques.flavourText: God blesses those who bless themselves.

uniques.name: Glimpse of Chaos
explicitModifiers: Can have up to 5 Implicit Modifiers while Item has this Modifier
(30-40)% increased maximum Life and reduced Fire Resistance
(30-40)% increased maximum Mana and reduced Cold Resistance
(30-40)% increased Global maximum Energy Shield and reduced Lightning Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Trialmaster
uniques.flavourText:
Man retains sanity and strives toward civilisation
only under the blessed veil of ignorance.

uniques.name: Glitterdisc
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to Avoid Fire Damage from Hits
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Izaro's insistence on using lava
resulted in some surprising material discoveries.

uniques.name: Gloomfang
explicitModifiers: 0.5% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
Lose (10-15) Life per Enemy Hit with Spells
Lose (20-25) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Projectiles that have Chained gain (20-35)% of Non-Chaos Damage as extra Chaos Damage
uniques.flavourText: Darkness never stops feeding.

uniques.name: Glorious Vanity
explicitModifiers: Bathed in the blood of (100-8000) sacrificed in the name of Doryani
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Vaal
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Vaal Legion
uniques.flavourText: They believed themselves the pinnacle of civilisation, but that height toppled their empire.

uniques.name: Gluttony
explicitModifiers: You have Culling Strike against Cursed Enemies
Gain (20-28) Life per Cursed Enemy Hit with Attacks
Gain (10-14) Mana per Cursed Enemy Hit with Attacks
Take (100-200) Physical Damage when you use a Movement Skill
You have no Armour or Maximum Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
What started as a desire to feed
became a desire to learn...

uniques.name: Goblinedge
explicitModifiers: (20-25)% increased Attack Speed if you haven't gained a Frenzy Charge Recently
(60-80)% increased Critical Strike Chance if you haven't gained a Power Charge Recently
+3 seconds to Duration of Frenzy and Power Charges on Culling Strike
uniques.flavourText:
"That bronze girl sure knows how to cut someone down to size!"
- Bertrand the Plush

uniques.name: Goldrim
explicitModifiers: Reflects 4 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
uniques.flavourText: No metal slips as easily through the fingers as gold.

uniques.name: Goldwyrm
uniques.flavourText: The wyrm draws warmth from the fires of desire.

uniques.name: Gorebreaker
explicitModifiers: 30% increased Melee Damage against Bleeding Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Sure, there's many a hard man out there.
But this'll soften them up.

uniques.name: Goredrill
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Attack Damage against Bleeding Enemies
50% chance to cause Bleeding on Critical Strike

uniques.name: Gorgon's Gaze
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Summon Petrification Statue Skill
5% additional Physical Damage Reduction while moving
5% reduced Elemental Damage taken while stationary
uniques.flavourText:
Men always fell for her honeyed eyes,
and broke when they hit the ground.

uniques.name: Grace of the Goddess
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-50)% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain (10-50)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Gain (10-50)% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
+1 to maximum number of Sacred Wisps
+1 to number of Sacred Wisps Summoned
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven (Uber)
uniques.flavourText: In a time of darkness, know that the Draíocht will bring you light.

uniques.name: Grand Spectrum
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Lord's Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText: Fists that strike like a falling tree.

uniques.name: Grand Spectrum
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Lord's Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText: Fists that strike like a falling tree.

uniques.name: Grand Spectrum
explicitModifiers: Variant: Current - Chance to avoid Ailments
5% increased Elemental Damage per Grand Spectrum
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Lord's Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText: Fists that strike like a falling tree.

uniques.name: Grasping Nightshade
implicitModifiers: 25% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Melee Weapons
(25-35)% increased Effect of Blind from Melee Weapons
explicitModifiers: Melee Weapon Hits Inflict (2-3) Withered Debuffs for 2 seconds
(20-30)% chance to inflict a Grasping Vine on Melee Weapon Hit
uniques.flavourText: A virulent brew of death and decay.

uniques.name: Grattus Signet
explicitModifiers: Attacks inflict Unnerve on Critical Strike for 4 seconds
Spells inflict Intimidate on Critical Strike for 4 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Created from 4 different Grattus family corpses in the Necropolis
uniques.flavourText:
The first Grattus patriarch had only one tell. When he
slowly turned his ring, all cowered before him.

uniques.name: Gravebind
explicitModifiers: Nearby Enemies Killed by anyone count as being Killed by you instead
uniques.flavourText:
Try as you like to hide the
blood on your hands.
You'll still know the truth.

uniques.name: Graven's Secret
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Minimum Power Charges instead apply to Minimum Absorption Charges
Maximum Absorption Charges is equal to Maximum Power Charges
Gain Absorption Charges instead of Power Charges
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText: The cowardly thinker's greatest success is simply surviving.

uniques.name: Great Old One's Tentacles
explicitModifiers: Adds (8-12) to (15-20) Physical Damage to Attacks
(10-20)% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks
50% chance for Impales on Enemies you Kill to Reflect Damage to surrounding Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Under its influence, shards of metal take on a life of their own, wriggling into flesh,
burrowing into organs, and exploding outwards in search of other victims.

uniques.name: Great Old One's Ward
explicitModifiers: Adds (8-12) to (15-20) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
The horrors we've encountered are nothing
compared to the horrors we haven't.

uniques.name: Greed's Embrace
uniques.flavourText:
Some would question if the risk was worth it.
The rest were already dead.

uniques.name: Greedtrap
explicitModifiers: (10-16)% increased Quantity of Items found when on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Wonders abound at death's door.

uniques.name: Grelwood Shank
explicitModifiers: Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles if you've been Hit Recently

uniques.name: Grip of the Council
explicitModifiers: Minions gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Death does not remove you from our grasp.
Death only brings you closer.

uniques.name: Growing Agony
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Viper Strike deals 2% increased Damage with Hits and Poison for each Poison on the Enemy
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Viper Strike has a 10% chance per Poison on Enemy to grant Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Hit
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Maligaro understood that devotion to science,
Means devotion to trial and error.
For Maligaro's errors, death was slow,
And very painful.

uniques.name: Gruthkul's Pelt
uniques.flavourText: Simple is the life of the bear.

uniques.name: Haemophilia
explicitModifiers: Attacks have 25% chance to cause Bleeding
(25-40)% increased Attack Damage against Bleeding Enemies
Bleeding Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Maximum Life as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"A master artist takes his time when he's painting.
Unfortunately, my kind doesn't often have that luxury."
- Coralito, Brotherhood of Silence

uniques.name: Hair Trigger
explicitModifiers: (40-60)% increased Trap Trigger Area of Effect
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Anyone can catch a lumbering beast.
Try catching a bird before it has even landed.

uniques.name: Hale Negator
explicitModifiers: +1 to Maximum Spirit Charges per Abyss Jewel affecting you
Gain a Spirit Charge every second
You lose all Spirit Charges when taking a Savage Hit
Recover (2-3)% of Life when you lose a Spirit Charge
Recover (2-3)% of Energy Shield when you lose a Spirit Charge
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Kurgal, the Blackblooded
uniques.flavourText:
"Feel the pain of ancient wounds.
Feel the doom of dying souls."

uniques.name: Hand of Heresy
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Excommunicate Enemies on Melee Hit for 3 seconds
Melee Attacks have +(0.8-1.6)% to Critical Strike Chance against Excommunicated Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
"The followers of Light recognize Tyndarus Phrecius as
the Emperor. For siding with the rebels, you and your
brothers shall be cast out from the true faith, forevermore!"
- High Templar Andronicus, 892 IC

uniques.name: Hand of the Fervent
explicitModifiers: Gain Sacrificial Zeal when you use a Skill, dealing you 150% of the Skill's Mana Cost as Physical Damage per Second
Hits have (35-50)% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while you have Sacrificial Zeal
uniques.sourceText: Purchase from Ritual Reward
uniques.flavourText:
A sacrifice of blood calls forth His vengeance.
Let the righteous become the Hand of God.

uniques.name: Hand of the Lords
explicitModifiers: You cannot Cast Socketed Hex Curse Skills
Inflict Socketed Hexes on Enemies that trigger your Traps
Grants Level 30 Will of the Lords Skill
Can have up to (3-5) additional Traps placed at a time
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
We moved to be close, yet grew no closer, since the
Breaking of the Sun. We clung to the feet of the Lords,
wailing, weeping, begging for unity. Now, they heed.

uniques.name: Hand of Thought and Motion
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 12 Lightning Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 10 Dexterity
5% increased Critical Strike Chance per 25 Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Esh Breach or from Esh, Forked Thought
uniques.flavourText:
She carries us and nurtures us
until we must feed upon each other.

uniques.name: Hand of Wisdom and Action
explicitModifiers: 1% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Adds 1 to 12 Lightning Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 10 Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Hand of Thought and Motion using Blessing of Esh
uniques.flavourText:
She thinks and we act.
She acts and we think.
Fragments of the whole that washes clean the skies.

uniques.name: Hands of the High Templar
explicitModifiers: Can have up to 5 Implicit Modifiers while Item has this Modifier
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
uniques.flavourText: The laws of the faith do not apply to its leader.

uniques.name: Hateforge
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Rage
Vaal Attack Skills you Use yourself Cost Rage instead of requiring Souls
You cannot gain Rage during Soul Gain Prevention
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Trialmaster
uniques.flavourText:
The first Karui born on the fringes of the Vaal empire
developed a blood fever born of corruption.

uniques.name: Haunting Memories
explicitModifiers: (50-100)% of Suppressed Spell Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
(50-100)% of Suppressed Spell Damage taken Recouped as Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
We cannot hide from the wounds of youth.
They fuel the fires within, driving us on.

uniques.name: Hazardous Research
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Spark fires Projectiles in a circle
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Of the elements at the thaumaturgist's disposal, lightning remained the least understood.
The simple passage of energy from one to another could result in profound power, or rapid death.

uniques.name: Headhunter
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Healthy Mind
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Life in Radius are Transformed to apply to Mana at 200% of their value
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText: For the ambitious, flesh is a limitation.

uniques.name: Heartbound Loop
explicitModifiers: Minions have 10% increased Area of Effect
350 Physical Damage taken on Minion Death
uniques.flavourText:
When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.

uniques.name: Heartbreaker
explicitModifiers: (40-80)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
uniques.flavourText:
A heart can be stabbed by thoughts,
If your mind is sharp enough.

uniques.name: Heatshiver
explicitModifiers: Gain 1% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage per 1% Chill Effect on Enemy
Gain 30% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage against Frozen Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.

uniques.name: Hegemony's Era
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+6% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to gain a Power Charge if you Knock an Enemy Back with Melee Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The right to rule demands mental acuity,
a strong arm,
And a tenacious sense of justice.

uniques.name: Heretic's Veil
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 22 Blasphemy
Socketed Curse Gems have 30% increased Reservation Efficiency
uniques.flavourText:
Branded a heretic for your beliefs,
You stand alone against many.
May the truth that fuels their anger,
Carry your blade into their hearts.

uniques.name: Heroic Tragedy
explicitModifiers: Remembrancing (100-8000) songworthy deeds by the line of Vorana
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Legion in Mirage
uniques.flavourText:
They believed themselves courageous and selfless,
but that bravery became the doom at their door.

uniques.name: Hezmana's Bloodlust
explicitModifiers: 1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
40% increased Attack Speed if you've taken a Savage Hit Recently
Attacks Cost Life instead of Mana
uniques.flavourText: When a craving cannot be sated, any source will do.

uniques.name: Hidden Potential
explicitModifiers: (20-25)% increased Damage for each Magic Item Equipped
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
The difference between the master and his apprentice
is what they see when they look at the same block of wood.

uniques.name: Hiltless
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Lifetap
explicitModifiers: Enemies you Attack Reflect 100 Physical Damage to you
uniques.flavourText:
The cuts on my hands are a small price to pay
for the opportunity to drive my steel
beyond the flesh and into the demon's soul.

uniques.name: Hinekora's Sight
uniques.flavourText: Remember the past, anticipate the future.

uniques.name: Honoured Alliance
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to Trigger Summon Spirit of Akoya on Kill
(10-15)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn,
but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.

uniques.name: Honourhome
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 30 Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
"The craven mind is sharp with self interest.
The honourable mind is much easier to manipulate."
- Malachai the Soulless

uniques.name: Hopeshredder
explicitModifiers: 4% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
2% chance to Avoid Elemental Damage from Hits per Frenzy Charge
12 to 14 Added Cold Damage per Frenzy Charge
0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life per Frenzy Charge
400 Cold Damage taken per second per Frenzy Charge while moving
uniques.flavourText:
Their last thoughts were not of their friends,
or their families, or their homes.
Their last thoughts were untethered from reality,
and bathed in fear and ferocity.

uniques.name: Hotheaded
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: It's hard to stay still when you're engulfed in flames.

uniques.name: Howlcrack
explicitModifiers: Non-Instant Warcries ignore their Cooldown when Used
Warcry Skills have (15-25)% increased Area of Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mercenary after winning a duel
uniques.flavourText:
"Our new capital will be called Korathin.
My slaves will build it. My price is dominion...
or blood." - Keita's Proclamation, 872 IC

uniques.name: Hrimburn
explicitModifiers: Adds (5-7) to (13-15) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
50% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
Reflects 10 Cold Damage to Melee Attackers
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Of ancient giants, none remain,
Their only trace is timeless pain.

uniques.name: Hrimnor's Dirge
explicitModifiers: 1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Gain 50% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

uniques.name: Hrimnor's Hymn
explicitModifiers: 1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life

uniques.name: Hrimnor's Resolve
explicitModifiers: 100% chance to Avoid being Chilled or Frozen if you have used a Fire Skill Recently
uniques.flavourText:
Hrimnor's presence was as cold as ice,
but his heart burned for vengeance.

uniques.name: Hrimsorrow
explicitModifiers: 100% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
Reflects 100 Cold Damage to Melee Attackers
uniques.flavourText:
Of ancient giants, none remain,
Their only trace is timeless pain.

uniques.name: Hungry Abyss
explicitModifiers: With 5 Corrupted Items Equipped: Life Leech recovers based on your Chaos Damage instead
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Darkness can never be sated.

uniques.name: Hyaon's Fury
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Damage taken per Frenzy Charge
(15-20)% increased Lightning Damage per Frenzy Charge
20 Life gained on Kill per Frenzy Charge
uniques.flavourText:
"Hyaon the 'Red Wolf'
Howling mad
Cloaked in blood
A banner to his legion
A terror to his foes."
- Garivaldi, Chronicler to the Empire

uniques.name: Hyperboreus
explicitModifiers: Chill nearby Enemies when you Focus, causing 30% reduced Action Speed
Focus has (15-25)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
(50-70)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Chilled Enemies
Regenerate 2% of Life per second during any Flask Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Transportation Leaders in Safehouses
uniques.flavourText: Cold winds whirl at the crown of the world.

uniques.name: Hyrri's Bite
implicitModifiers: Gain (6-8) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
explicitModifiers: Adds 10 to 20 Cold Damage to Attacks
Gain (2-3) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
A Karui woman's place was not the
battlefield, but the hearth.
Hyrri changed all of that.

uniques.name: Hyrri's Demise
implicitModifiers: Gain (6-8) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
explicitModifiers: Gain (2-3) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Adds 1 to 2 Cold Damage to Attacks per 10 Dexterity
Adds 1 to 2 Fire Damage to Attacks per 10 Strength
Adds 0 to 3 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 10 Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
A Karui woman's place was not the
battlefield, but the hearth.
Hyrri changed all of that.

uniques.name: Hyrri's Ire
explicitModifiers: (105-145) to (160-200) Added Cold Damage with Bow Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows,
tipped with a poisoned hatred
only oppression can ferment.

uniques.name: Hyrri's Truth
explicitModifiers: Precision has 100% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.flavourText: Strike true, strike hard, and leave no survivors to retaliate.

uniques.name: Icefang Orbit
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: You are Chilled when you are Poisoned
Non-Chilled Enemies you Poison are Chilled
Poisoned Enemies you Kill with Hits Shatter
uniques.flavourText:
Those members of the Brotherhood who employ the venom of
Trarthan ice snakes must take great care with the volatile substance.

uniques.name: Icetomb
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to Freeze Enemies for 1 second when they Hit you

uniques.name: Ichimonji
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Effect of Buffs on you
10% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
Allies' Aura Buffs do not affect you
Your Aura Buffs do not affect allies
uniques.flavourText: Master yourself before you seek to master others.

uniques.name: Ikiaho's Promise
explicitModifiers: Life Flasks used while on Low Life apply Recovery Instantly
Mana Flasks used while on Low Mana apply Recovery Instantly
uniques.flavourText: Even the loneliest of souls can aid a friend in times of darkness.

uniques.name: Immortal Flesh
explicitModifiers: -(50-40) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
40% increased Armour while not Ignited, Frozen or Shocked
uniques.flavourText:
"She begged the Earth to spare her Son;
Out of love the Earth agreed.
To the other Elements she did not speak
And out of spite They plotted."
- Berek and the Untamed

uniques.name: Immutable Force
uniques.flavourText:
How simple a power, on which empires turn,
when one man stands firm and says, "I refuse."

uniques.name: Impresence
explicitModifiers: Vulnerability has no Reservation if Cast as an Aura
Gain Maddening Presence for 10 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder
uniques.flavourText:
Though its body was locked in stone,
its essence wandered the infinite,
learning, and preparing.

uniques.name: Incandescent Heart
explicitModifiers: (0.8-1)% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
25% of Elemental Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
Light Radius is based on Energy Shield instead of Life
uniques.flavourText:
Only light may banish the shadows from this land
And the black lies wrapped around your heart

uniques.name: Indigon
explicitModifiers: Recover (8-10)% of Life when you use a Mana Flask
Non-instant Mana Recovery from Flasks is also Recovered as Life
(50-60)% increased Cost of Skills for each 200 total Mana Spent Recently
(50-60)% increased Spell Damage for each 200 total Mana you have Spent Recently, up to 2000%
uniques.flavourText:
Where the body's limits begin,
the mind's limits end.

uniques.name: Inertia
explicitModifiers: Dexterity from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Strength
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText: There is no force without movement.

uniques.name: Inevitability
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Rolling Magma deals 50% less Damage
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Rolling Magma deals 40% more Damage per Chain
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Rolling Magma
has 10% increased Area of Effect per Chain
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Izaro gave rise to Chitus.
Chitus gave rise to Voll.
None could know how it would end.
None could stop it.

uniques.name: Inextricable Fate
explicitModifiers: You gain 3 Grasping Vines when you take a Critical Strike
Nearby stationary Enemies gain a Grasping Vine every 0.5 seconds
All Damage inflicts Poison against Enemies affected by at least 3 Grasping Vines
You take (30-50)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes by Poisoned Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds
uniques.flavourText:
A multitude of beings share a wretched existence
irrevocably bound together in perpetual torture.

uniques.name: Infernal Mantle
implicitModifiers: +3 to Level of Socketed Fire Gems
explicitModifiers: 15% of Fire Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
100% increased Spell Damage taken when on Low Mana
uniques.flavourText:
Despair hums, softly, deadly, in the bones of my enemies.
Eyes will burn, and souls wither, as they bask in my radiance.

uniques.name: Infractem
uniques.flavourText:
Mark us with mercy, then press on with care,
Execute us steadily, notch away at our despair.

uniques.name: Innsbury Edge
explicitModifiers: 0.2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Attacks with this Weapon Maim on hit
uniques.flavourText:
A sword he brought, his foes to maim and rend,
from places dark behind forbidden doors,
but night by night he woke with frighten'd roars
from ghoulish dreams, too strange to comprehend.

uniques.name: Inpulsa's Broken Heart
explicitModifiers: (20-50)% increased Damage if you have Shocked an Enemy Recently
Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
uniques.flavourText:
Don't hesitate; bring death to all, conclusively and swiftly,
or they will give you the same treatment.

uniques.name: Inspired Learning
explicitModifiers: With 4 Notables Allocated in Radius, When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain 1 of its Modifiers for 20 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
If you do not learn from a won battle
then you have already lost the war.

uniques.name: Intuitive Leap
explicitModifiers: Passive Skills in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
uniques.flavourText:
The carpenter who picks up a blade is not mad.
He's ambitious.

uniques.name: Invictus Solaris
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 20 Fire Aegis when Equipped
uniques.flavourText:
Eternal soldiers fight for glory or death.
The Solaris Vanguard know only glory.

uniques.name: Inya's Epiphany
explicitModifiers: 25% chance that if you would gain Power Charges, you instead gain up to
your maximum number of Power Charges
uniques.flavourText:
Though the path we walk is the same,
each journey is different.

uniques.name: Iron Commander
explicitModifiers: Siege Ballista has +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems per 200 Dexterity
Adds 1 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks per 25 Dexterity
uniques.flavourText:
The Eternals commanded an army that need not eat, sleep, or breathe
without the usual depravities of necromancy.

uniques.name: Iron Heart
explicitModifiers: Strength's Damage Bonus instead grants 3% increased Melee
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"The Council have a great many secrets.
Some are better kept that way, Cospri."
- Mauritius, the Iron Heart

uniques.name: Ixchel's Temptation
explicitModifiers: Adds (7-10) to (15-18) Chaos Damage to Attacks
Adds (9-12) to (19-22) Fire Damage to Spells
uniques.flavourText:
Chaos offers possibility, not outcome.
Our own imaginations ensnare us.

uniques.name: Izaro's Dilemma
explicitModifiers: 100% increased Global Physical Damage while Frozen
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Izaro saw himself not as a man,
but as a divine saviour trapped in a man's body.

uniques.name: Izaro's Turmoil
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The once-glorious emperor spent his final days
imprisoned in his greatest creation;
a tool to filter out the unworthy
that pushed a monster to power.

uniques.name: Jack, the Axe
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Thirst for Blood Skill
25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
+(25-35)% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding from Hits with this Weapon
uniques.flavourText: "More blood... hack open flesh... must drink..."

uniques.name: Jaws of Agony
explicitModifiers: -(18-14) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
25% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Throw a Trap
uniques.flavourText:
One wrong step triggers destruction.
Agony slowly dominates the will to live.

uniques.name: Jiquani's Potential
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: +(-1-1) to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
1 to (31-53) Spell Lightning Damage per 10 Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
"I have risked everything. My position, my ambition, my
very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

uniques.name: Jorrhast's Blacksteel
implicitModifiers: 25% chance to Trigger Level 20 Animate Weapon on Kill
explicitModifiers: Weapons you Animate create an additional copy
uniques.flavourText:
His flesh had long turned to dust,
but his vengeance lived on
in every scrap of iron he touched.

uniques.name: Kahuturoa's Certainty
uniques.flavourText: Confidence is calm and measured.

uniques.name: Kalandra's Touch
uniques.flavourText:
On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

uniques.name: Kalisa's Grace
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Faster Casting
Gain +2% to Critical Strike Chance for 2 seconds after Spending a total of 800 Mana
uniques.flavourText:
"You shall hang, in blissful agony, on my every note."
- Kalisa, Prima Donna of Sarn

uniques.name: Kaltenhalt
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-15)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Reflects (25-50) Cold Damage to Melee Attackers

uniques.name: Kaltensoul
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-15)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Reflects (25-50) Cold Damage to Melee Attackers
20% of Fire Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Cold, miserable and alone... but alive.

uniques.name: Kaom's Binding
explicitModifiers: Take no Burning Damage if you've stopped taking Burning Damage Recently
Nearby Enemies Convert 25% of their Physical Damage to Fire
uniques.flavourText:
For centuries, he burned in an unending
nightmare of lava and flame... but he endured.

uniques.name: Kaom's Command
explicitModifiers: Nearby corpses Explode when you Warcry, dealing (5-10)% of their Life as Physical Damage
Warcry Skills have (25-35)% increased Area of Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Kaom ordered the desecration of the Empire's dead.
There would be no rest or honours for the wicked.

uniques.name: Kaom's Heart
uniques.flavourText:
The warrior who
fears will fall.

uniques.name: Kaom's Primacy
explicitModifiers: Every Rage also grants 1% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
uniques.flavourText:
One by one, Kaom slaughtered the weakest tribe
leaders until the others leapt to join his cause.

uniques.name: Kaom's Roots
explicitModifiers: Action Speed cannot be modified to below Base Value
uniques.flavourText: Don't flinch. It's a waste of good hitting time.

uniques.name: Kaom's Sign
uniques.flavourText:
A token from the sea
A sign for Kaom
to lead his Karui to Wraeclast.

uniques.name: Kaom's Spirit
explicitModifiers: (0.3-0.5)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Life Recovery from Regeneration is not applied
Regenerate 1 Rage per second for every 200 Life Recovery per second from Regeneration
Does not delay Inherent Loss of Rage
uniques.flavourText: Who can tell when whispers are truly from a god?

uniques.name: Kaom's Way
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 0.2% of Life per second per Endurance Charge
Gain (2-4) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
2% increased Area of Effect per Endurance Charge
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
A token from the sea
A sign for Kaom
to lead his Karui to Wraeclast.

uniques.name: Karui Charge
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Shoot first, ask no questions."
- Karui wisdom

uniques.name: Khatal's Geyser
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Effect of Flasks applied to you also applies to Effect of Arcane Surge on you at (200-250)% of their value
You have Arcane Surge during Effect of any Mana Flask
Mana Flask Effects are not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled
Mana Flask Effects do not Queue
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on Khatal's Weeping
uniques.flavourText:
"In a time of great need, the tale-man sacrificed his very
body to bring forth the waters of victory and salvation."

uniques.name: Khatal's Weeping
explicitModifiers: On non-channelling Attack, set a Life Flask with greater than 50% of maximum Charges remaining to 50%
For each Charge removed this way, that Attack gains +2% to Damage over time Multiplier
While on Low Life, Life Flasks gain (3-6) Charges every 3 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mirage encounter
uniques.flavourText:
"We fought the Abyssals, too. That's the part they leave out.
Khatal was Faridun... and for saving all their lives, the Maraketh
made him drink the enemy's blood. He melted from the inside out."
- Toryal, of the Afarud

uniques.name: Kiara's Determination
explicitModifiers: Immunity to Freeze, Chill, Curses and Stuns during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
Travelers of the deep wood speak of a witch
whose ale provides a different kind
of liquid courage.

uniques.name: Kikazaru
explicitModifiers: 60% reduced Effect of Curses on you
Regenerate 3 Life per second per Level
uniques.flavourText: Hear no evil.

uniques.name: Kiloava's Bluster
explicitModifiers: (30-40)% chance for Elemental Resistances to count as being 90% against Enemy Hits
uniques.flavourText: Not even the storm knows when lightning will strike.

uniques.name: Kingmaker
explicitModifiers: Nearby Allies have 30% increased Item Rarity
Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent your Melee Attacks
Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
A King and his people are linked together
like a soul and a beating heart.
Both can be severed by a same edge,
then forged anew.

uniques.name: Kingsguard
explicitModifiers: Gain 100 Life when you lose an Endurance Charge
uniques.flavourText: The toughest armour is the trust of your people.

uniques.name: Kintsugi
explicitModifiers: 35% less Damage taken if you have not been Hit Recently
100% increased Evasion Rating if you have been Hit Recently
uniques.flavourText:
Do not hide your flaws, your cracks,
mend them, and display them proudly.
For it is these that set us apart.

uniques.name: Kitava's Feast
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 30 Melee Splash
1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed
uniques.flavourText:
Hinekora bound Kitava to a rock
that Kitava could not lift with all his might.
Kitava vowed that when he broke free,
he would devour every soul in Hinekora's domain.

uniques.name: Kitava's Teachings
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
Savour the bitter, cherish the sweet,
For there may never be another chance to eat.

uniques.name: Kitava's Thirst
explicitModifiers: 50% chance to Trigger Socketed Spells when you Spend at least 100 Mana on an
Upfront Cost to Use or Trigger a Skill, with a 0.1 second Cooldown
uniques.flavourText:
Tukohama, Tawhoa and Kitava went to the lake to fish.
Tawhoa weaved a net to catch the fish,
Tukohama built a fire to cook the fish,
and Kitava swallowed the entire lake, fish and all, with a single gulp.

uniques.name: Kondo's Pride
implicitModifiers: 0.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: 50% increased Melee Damage against Bleeding Enemies
Cannot Leech Life from Critical Strikes
30% chance to Blind Enemies on Critical Strike
50% chance to cause Bleeding on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
Faintly gleaming in the moonlit night,
Kondo's Pride was primed to fight.
Driven by an inner fire,
bloodlust, spite and ill desire.
He swiftly moved to strike them all,
wreaking havoc like a steel squall.

uniques.name: Kongming's Stratagem
implicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Fog of War when your Trap is triggered
explicitModifiers: (30-50)% increased Fire Damage with Hits and Ailments against Blinded Enemies
30% reduced Spell Damage taken from Blinded Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Those who are skilled in combat do not become angered.
Those who are skilled at winning do not become afraid.
Thus the wise win before they fight,
while the ignorant fight to win.

uniques.name: Kongor's Undying Rage
explicitModifiers: Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
You gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText: Command like a king and nothing will stand in your way.

uniques.name: Kurgal's Gaze
explicitModifiers: 8% increased Effect of Arcane Surge on you per
Hypnotic Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 40%
uniques.flavourText: The Blackblooded seeks dominion over darkness itself.

uniques.name: Lakishu's Blade
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 1 Multistrike
uniques.flavourText:
"May the Blessed Lakishu watch our backs and our wives."
- Legionnaire Battle Blessing

uniques.name: Last Resort
explicitModifiers: 25% increased Attack Speed when on Low Life
100% increased Claw Physical Damage when on Low Life
100% increased Accuracy Rating when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText: Desperate times demand desperate measures.

uniques.name: Lavianga's Spirit
explicitModifiers: Skills Cost no Mana during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"When the Ancestors fill your cup,
It is only good manners to drink your fill."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Lavianga's Wisdom
uniques.flavourText:
"The painful memories are the easiest to recall."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Law of the Wilds
implicitModifiers: 1.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to Trigger Level 25 Summon Spectral Wolf on Critical Strike with this Weapon
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Oshabi, Avatar of the Grove
uniques.flavourText: The strong survive. The strongest thrive.

uniques.name: Le Heup of All
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Existence is infinite
A weave of the living and dead
Beyond the understanding
Of the many mortal threads

uniques.name: Leadership's Price
explicitModifiers: You have Scorching Conflux, Brittle Conflux and Sapping Conflux while your two highest Attributes are equal
Cannot Ignite, Chill, Freeze or Shock
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Vic Vox and Vinny Vox in Contract: The Twins
uniques.flavourText:
"Remain poised. Remain balanced. Keep all the emotions of a lifetime caged.
Let only your enemies see the truth of your rage."

uniques.name: Leash of Oblation
explicitModifiers: You can have an Offering of each type
uniques.flavourText: Those who offer up sacrifices to every deity entreat the full favour of none.

uniques.name: Leer Cast
explicitModifiers: You and nearby allies gain 50% increased Damage
uniques.flavourText: For none of us are as cruel as all of us.

uniques.name: Legacy of Fury
explicitModifiers: (30-40)% chance when you Kill a Scorched Enemy to Burn Each surrounding
Enemy for 4 seconds, dealing 8% of the Killed Enemy's Life as Fire Damage per second
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText:
All that was loved, all that was hated -
naught remains but ash.

uniques.name: Legacy of the Rose
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Shaper's Despair, which will be used by Shaper Memory
+(3-5) to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
Gain 1 Remembrance when you spend a total of 200 Energy
Shield with no Shaper Memory Summoned
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
We shared a memory of your mother,
a memory of roses, of autumn.
One day, I will be but a memory as well,
but I will never leave your side.

uniques.name: Leper's Alms
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eradicator
uniques.flavourText: One's burden is another's gift.

uniques.name: Lethal Pride
explicitModifiers: Commanded leadership over (10000-18000) warriors under Kaom
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Karui Legion
uniques.flavourText: They believed themselves the greatest warriors, but that savagery turned upon their own.

uniques.name: Lifesprig
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Spell Gems
Regenerate (6-8) Life over 1 second for each Spell you Cast
uniques.flavourText:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.

uniques.name: Light of Lunaris
implicitModifiers: Adds (35-39) to (54-60) Cold Damage to Spells
explicitModifiers: +1% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+25% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've dealt a Non-Critical Strike Recently
uniques.flavourText: Without night, there can be no day.

uniques.name: Lightbane Raiment
explicitModifiers: 30% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Reflects 30 Chaos Damage to Melee Attackers
100% chance to create Desecrated Ground when you Block
uniques.flavourText:
. . . and the Light faded and hope waned
Zahndethus cast aside his faith
and embraced the darkness.

uniques.name: Lightning Coil
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to (20-30) Lightning Damage to Attacks
50% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Lightning Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"There's nothing like imminent death
to galvanize one's purpose in life."
- Malachai the Soulless.

uniques.name: Lightpoacher
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Spirit Burst when you Use a Skill while you have a Spirit Charge
+1 to Maximum Spirit Charges per Abyss Jewel affecting you
(15-20)% chance to gain a Spirit Charge on Kill
Recover (4-5)% of Life when you lose a Spirit Charge
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Amanamu, Liege of the Lightless or Ulaman, Sovereign of the Well
uniques.flavourText:
The eyes of the living hold a glimmer of hope.
Don't waste it.

uniques.name: Limbsplit
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Strength Gems
Trigger Level 1 Gore Shockwave on Melee Hit if you have at least 150 Strength
uniques.flavourText:
Swinging through the air, it sings
of sundered, severed, missing things.

uniques.name: Lion's Roar
explicitModifiers: Knocks Back Enemies in an Area when you use a Flask
75% chance to cause Enemies to Flee on use
Adds Knockback to Melee Attacks during Effect
(7-10)% more Melee Physical Damage during effect
uniques.flavourText:
A sprinkle of hunger, a spoonful of menace
and three generous cups of Might.

uniques.name: Lioneye's Fall
explicitModifiers: Melee and Melee Weapon Type modifiers in Radius are Transformed to Bow Modifiers
uniques.flavourText:
The shield crab does not leave his shell unless it is forced to,
and even then, it knows to keep its distance.

uniques.name: Lioneye's Glare
explicitModifiers: Attacks you use yourself Repeat an additional time
Attacks you use yourself have 50% more Attack Speed
uniques.flavourText:
"See without doubt, slay without hesitation."
- Marceus Lioneye of Sarn

uniques.name: Lioneye's Paws
