explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 5 Rain of Arrows when you Attack with a Bow
Adds 12 to 24 Fire Damage to Attacks
40% reduced Movement Speed when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
Stand and lead the righteous pride,
Fight till death, never hide.

uniques.name: Lioneye's Remorse
explicitModifiers: -25 Physical Damage taken from Projectile Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Marceus' unblemished shield is a testament
to his arrogance... and his fate.

uniques.name: Lioneye's Vision
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Pierce
0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
uniques.flavourText:
"The Virtue Gems are a gift from the land,
our land, and we will not let our gifts
be destroyed by savages."
- Marceus Lioneye

uniques.name: Lochtonial Caress
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% chance to gain a Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charge on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
Why cling to your sanity? It offers you nothing.
Surrender to me, and I will grant you everything.

uniques.name: Lord of Steel
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks
Call of Steel deals Reflected Damage with (40-50)% increased Area of Effect
Call of Steel causes (40-50)% increased Reflected Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Her apprentice spends hours working the steel,
and the end result is melted for scrap.
Each one made better than the last.
Each one made more quickly.
She knows the path well.

uniques.name: Loreweave
explicitModifiers: Adds (4-10) to (14-36) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
When it comes to finding a use for surplus,
a rich man has within himself
boundless creativity.

uniques.name: Lori's Lantern
explicitModifiers: (6-8)% increased Movement Speed when on Low Life
+(20-25)% to Chaos Resistance when on Low Life
Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
By its light, Lori led her young charges to safety
and bound up their wounds.
Her sword arm was iron, yet her heart gentle
and proof against hate.

uniques.name: Lost Unity
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

uniques.name: Lycosidae
explicitModifiers: Adds 250 to 300 Cold Damage to Retaliation Skills
uniques.flavourText: A true predator does not chase; It waits.

uniques.name: Maata's Teaching
explicitModifiers: +(1-2) to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
Minions' Base Attack Critical Strike Chance is equal to the Critical
Strike Chance of your Main Hand Weapon
uniques.flavourText: What we give to others, we also give to ourselves.

uniques.name: Machina Mitts
explicitModifiers: 1% of Damage dealt by your Mines is Leeched to you as Life
(20-30)% reduced Recovery rate of Life and Energy Shield
5% increased Recovery rate of Life and Energy Shield per Power Charge
Lose a Power Charge each second if you have not Detonated Mines Recently
uniques.flavourText:
Biology is but a machine, begetting effusion of energies;
death is but a curse, that can be given... or reversed.

uniques.name: Mageblood
explicitModifiers: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost (2-4) Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
uniques.flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

uniques.name: Magna Eclipsis
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 20 Elemental Aegis when Equipped
+(80-100) to Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Lunaris crossed silently, shining and full,
Softly night left her, alone and forlorn.
Solaris rose to meet her, feeling her pull.
'Neath the midday sun, the night was reborn.

uniques.name: Mahuxotl's Machination
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Trialmaster
uniques.flavourText:
The Banished Architect sought to employ all the
darkest secrets of the Vaal... at the same time.

uniques.name: Malachai's Artifice
explicitModifiers: +(75-100)% to Fire Resistance when Socketed with a Red Gem
+(75-100)% to Cold Resistance when Socketed with a Green Gem
+(75-100)% to Lightning Resistance when Socketed with a Blue Gem
uniques.flavourText:
When the wind blows,
Know which way to bend
and watch the others break.

uniques.name: Malachai's Awakening
explicitModifiers: Adds (42-54) to (78-88) Cold Damage to Spells while no Life is Reserved
Adds (54-64) to (96-107) Fire Damage to Spells while no Life is Reserved
Adds (5-14) to (160-173) Lightning Damage to Spells while no Life is Reserved
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
It was a sliver of Malachai's soul
that animated the first Eternal Guardian.

uniques.name: Malachai's Loop
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to gain a Power Charge on Hit
(12-16)% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge
Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges
Shocks you when you reach Maximum Power Charges
uniques.flavourText:
Thaumaturgy has no limit.
It is our fragile reality that imposes boundaries.

uniques.name: Malachai's Mark
explicitModifiers: Gain (15-25) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Gain (15-25) Energy Shield per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Grants Malachai's Endurance, Frenzy and Power for 6 seconds each, in sequence
uniques.flavourText: What man does not wish for immortality?

uniques.name: Malachai's Simula
explicitModifiers: Spells have a 20% chance to deal Double Damage
uniques.flavourText:
It was a sliver of Malachai's soul
that animated the first Eternal Guardian.

uniques.name: Malachai's Vision
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 400 Energy Shield per second if all Equipped items are Corrupted
Regenerate 35 Mana per second if all Equipped Items are Corrupted
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Voll's Vision
uniques.flavourText: Wicked men chase power like stray dogs chase a rat.

uniques.name: Malicious Intent
explicitModifiers: 5% chance to Gain Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Melee Kill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Each life taken makes the next a little easier.

uniques.name: Maligaro's Cruelty
explicitModifiers: (25-30)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Killing an Enemy affected by at least 5 Poisons
(12-15)% chance to gain a Power Charge on Killing an Enemy affected by fewer than 5 Poisons
10% increased Damage with Poison per Frenzy Charge
3% increased Poison Duration per Power Charge
uniques.flavourText:
"He does not love. He does not feel regret or remorse.
He does not think about consequences, only possibilities.
If that does not describe a monster, tell me: what does?"
- Archbishop Geofri

uniques.name: Maligaro's Lens
explicitModifiers: Nearby allies Recover 1% of your Maximum Life when you Die
uniques.flavourText:
"Look around you. What do you see?
Corruption, perversion, sin?
No. It is progress.
You simply lack the means to see it."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

uniques.name: Maligaro's Restraint
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to (30-50) Lightning Damage to Attacks
Shocks you cause are reflected back to you
uniques.flavourText:
"Our genius will pave the way forward.
May all who are worthy be improved!"
- Inquisitor Maligaro

uniques.name: Maligaro's Virtuosity
uniques.flavourText:
Maligaro operated effortlessly,
with great speed and terrible consequences.

uniques.name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

uniques.name: Maloney's Nightfall
implicitModifiers: Gain (10-15)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
explicitModifiers: (8-10) to (14-16) Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
25% chance to create a Smoke Cloud when Hit
(40-60)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Blinded Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Fear not the dark, the song of night,
Hear not the arch, the falling cry.
My giving sun, fight no more,
Rest alone, my grand nightfall.

uniques.name: Manastorm
explicitModifiers: When you Cast a Spell, Sacrifice all Mana to gain Added Maximum Lightning Damage
equal to 50% of Sacrificed Mana for 4 seconds
uniques.flavourText: Fear not the fury of the storm.

uniques.name: Mantra of Flames
explicitModifiers: Adds (3-5) to (8-12) Fire Attack Damage per Buff on you
Adds (2-3) to (5-8) Fire Spell Damage per Buff on you
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The strong grow stronger still.

uniques.name: March of the Legion
explicitModifiers: +(3-5) to Level of Socketed Aura Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 25 Divine Blessing
uniques.flavourText: When the time comes to face evil, the faithful are never alone.

uniques.name: Mark of Submission
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Socketed Hex Curse Gem on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
So great was the thaumaturgy of a bloodpriest's mark,
that sacrifices soon welcomed their death.

uniques.name: Mark of the Doubting Knight
explicitModifiers: +5% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
50% chance to Cause Bleeding on Critical Strike
50% chance to Cause Poison on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
Nothing is pure.
Slice open the Innocent
And spill a thousand Sins.

uniques.name: Mark of the Elder
implicitModifiers: Adds (3-4) to (10-14) Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to Trigger Level 20 Tentacle Whip on Kill
Adds (26-32) to (42-48) Cold Damage to Attacks
(60-80)% increased Attack Damage if your opposite Ring is a Shaper Item
Cannot be Stunned by Attacks if your opposite Ring is an Elder Item
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber)
uniques.flavourText: Be not stirred by the Void.

uniques.name: Mark of the Red Covenant
explicitModifiers: Summoned Raging Spirits deal (175-250)% increased Damage
75% reduced Maximum number of Summoned Raging Spirits
Summoned Raging Spirits' Hits always Ignite
Summoned Raging Spirits' Melee Strikes deal Fire-only Splash
uniques.flavourText:
Gleeful are the few
who bask in the blood of the many.

uniques.name: Mark of the Shaper
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to Trigger Level 20 Summon Volatile Anomaly on Kill
Adds (13-18) to (50-56) Lightning Damage to Spells
(60-80)% increased Spell Damage if your opposite Ring is an Elder Item
Cannot be Stunned by Spells if your opposite Ring is a Shaper Item
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber)
uniques.flavourText: Let madness take control.

uniques.name: Marohi Erqi
uniques.flavourText:
Lumbering as a sea lion, clumsy as a berry-drunk pigeon. That was Erqi.
It mattered little. When Erqi's maul fell true, so did its target.

uniques.name: Martial Artistry
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Area of Effect while Unarmed
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: A gentle hand rarely leaves a mark on the world.

uniques.name: Martyr of Innocence
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
+(12-16)% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Damage Penetrates 15% of Fire Resistance if you have Blocked Recently
Immune to Freeze and Chill while Ignited
uniques.flavourText:
You have been found guilty.
Let the fires cleanse you of your sins.

uniques.name: Martyr's Crown
explicitModifiers: Reflects 5 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
+5 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Lift it lightly, don it slow.
The spikes point out and in, you know.

uniques.name: Marylene's Fallacy
uniques.flavourText:
"Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

uniques.name: Mask of the Spirit Drinker
explicitModifiers: Source: Opening Pools Coffer in Sanctum of Immortality
Upgrade: Upgrades to Mask of the Stitched Demon via Vial of Summoning
Regenerate 50 Life per second if you have at least 500 Maximum Energy Shield
Regenerate 100 Life per second if you have at least 1000 Maximum Energy Shield
Regenerate 150 Life per second if you have at least 1500 Maximum Energy Shield
Your Energy Shield starts at zero
uniques.flavourText:
Our flesh is our most sacred gift.
Taint it not with the occult.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Summoning

uniques.name: Mask of the Stitched Demon
explicitModifiers: Strength provides no bonus to Maximum Life
Intelligence provides no inherent bonus to Maximum Mana
Regenerate 1% of Life per second per 500 Maximum Energy Shield
Your Energy Shield starts at zero
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Mask of the Spirit Drinker via Vial of Summoning
uniques.flavourText:
From the flesh of the gods, Xibaqua was born.
From the carnage of Xibaqua, we were born.
It is our duty to return to the gods what was once theirs.

uniques.name: Mask of the Tribunal
explicitModifiers: Nearby Allies have 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 100 Strength you have
Nearby Allies have +(6-8)% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 100 Dexterity you have
Nearby Allies have (2-4)% increased Cast Speed per 100 Intelligence you have
2% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills per 250 total Attributes
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText: The judge determines worthiness by comparison to the paragon: himself.

uniques.name: Matua Tupuna
implicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
explicitModifiers: 20% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills on your Minions
20% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
uniques.flavourText:
You carried me through life,
The least I can do is carry you through death.

uniques.name: Maw of Conquest
explicitModifiers: (60-80)% increased Critical Strike Chance for Spells
(10-20)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
uniques.flavourText:
Young Napuatzi was thrown into the pits, an unwilling sacrifice,
but the offer of her blood was refused.
She rose from the pit alive and anew.
A Leader. A Conquerer. A Viper.

uniques.name: Maw of Mischief
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% reduced Mana Cost of Minion Skills
uniques.sourceText: Obtained from divination card Cursed Words
uniques.flavourText:
The line that divides hope and fear,
life and death, crowd and mob,
is as thin as a whisper.

uniques.name: Medved's Challenge
explicitModifiers: 80% less Flask Charges gained from Kills
Flasks gain 1 Charge per second if you've Hit a Unique Enemy Recently
uniques.flavourText:
For forty-two nights, the Feller of Heroes challenged
the next greatest warrior to a one-on-one duel.
None could match his might.

uniques.name: Meginord's Girdle
explicitModifiers: Adds 10 to 20 Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Kaom's strength was rivaled only by
the great Meginord of the north.

uniques.name: Meginord's Vise
explicitModifiers: Melee Strike Skills deal Splash Damage to surrounding targets
Melee Hits with Strike Skills always Knockback
uniques.flavourText:
Ride with pride,
strike with vengeance,
live with honour.

uniques.name: Melding of the Flesh
explicitModifiers: Elemental Resistances are capped by your highest Maximum Elemental Resistance instead
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds
uniques.flavourText:
"We awoke to a sudden jungle rupturing the valleys of our home.
Grasping limbs coiled around us, into us. We sank into each other,
then rose into the living sky. My family screams alongside me still."

uniques.name: Memory Vault
uniques.flavourText:
Your memories are a bridge to the past.
Let no one cross.

uniques.name: Mercenary's Lot
explicitModifiers: Mark Skills have (10-15)% increased Cast Speed
(30-50)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Marked Enemy
8% of Damage from Hits is taken from Marked Target's Life before you
Your Mark Transfers to another Enemy when Marked Enemy dies
uniques.flavourText:
Members of the House Azadin are trained from birth to join the
family profession. The target changes, but the job's always the same.

uniques.name: Midnight Bargain
implicitModifiers: Cannot be used with Chaos Inoculation
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Raised Zombies
uniques.flavourText:
A chilling hush, a scraping sound
Of things no more entombed in ground.
A shambling horde is on its way
To crush the very light of day.

uniques.name: Might and Influence
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Dual Strike has a 20% chance
to deal Double Damage with the Main-Hand Weapon
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Dual Strike deals Off Hand Splash Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Emperor Chitus could offer you a gift with one hand,
and drive a blade into your back with the other.
His blend of brutality and charisma cultured a potent
mixture of fear and admiration among the masses.

uniques.name: Might in All Forms
explicitModifiers: Dexterity and Intelligence from passives in Radius count towards Strength Melee Damage bonus
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: True strength can be found anywhere, and in anything.

uniques.name: Might of the Meek
explicitModifiers: 50% increased Effect of non-Keystone Passive Skills in Radius
Notable Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing
uniques.flavourText: Enough mice can kill a wolf.

uniques.name: Mightblood Ire
implicitModifiers: 40% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with Melee Weapons
(15-25)% increased Stun Duration with Melee Weapons
explicitModifiers: Melee Strike Skills deal Splash Damage to surrounding targets
uniques.flavourText:
The liquid within boils and fumes,
ready to erupt at any provocation.

uniques.name: Mightflay
uniques.flavourText: A mighty beast, a lavish feast.

uniques.name: Militant Faith
explicitModifiers: Carved to glorify (2000-10000) new faithful converted by High Templar Avarius
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Templars
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Templar Legion
uniques.flavourText: They believed themselves the utmost faithful, but that conviction became oppression.

uniques.name: Mind of the Council
explicitModifiers: 30% of Lightning Damage is taken from Mana before Life
Attack Skills have Added Lightning Damage equal to 6% of maximum Mana
Lose 3% of Mana when you use an Attack Skill
uniques.flavourText:
You think we do not know.
We know all that you think.

uniques.name: Mindspiral
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-15)% of Maximum Mana as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
Enemies Cannot Leech Mana From you
(10-20)% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
uniques.flavourText: Where top is bottom and weak is strong.

uniques.name: Ming's Heart
explicitModifiers: Gain (40-60)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Ming slew Tranquillity
Took Chaos for his wife
And on Her immortal finger
He placed his Heart

uniques.name: Mirebough
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 16 Trap
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 16 Cluster Trap
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 16 Trap And Mine Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
You've no reason for fear when you're a root in a fen
- Old Ezomyte saying.

uniques.name: Mistwall
explicitModifiers: +(8-15)% chance to Avoid Elemental Damage from Hits while Phasing
You are at Maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage if you have not Blocked Recently
You have Phasing if you have Blocked Recently
uniques.flavourText:
Light as a board,
Stiff as a feather.

uniques.name: Mjölner
implicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Lightning Spell on Hit, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
explicitModifiers: Socketed Lightning Spells have no Cost if Triggered
uniques.flavourText: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.

uniques.name: Mokou's Embrace
explicitModifiers: All Damage Taken from Hits can Ignite you
uniques.flavourText: Fire makes the perfect blossom in the endless night.

uniques.name: Mon'tregul's Grasp
implicitModifiers: 50% reduced maximum number of Raised Zombies
explicitModifiers: Raised Zombies have +5000 to maximum Life
Raised Zombies have +(25-30)% to all Resistances
Enemies Killed by Zombies' Hits Explode, dealing 50% of their Life as Fire Damage
Raised Zombies deal (100-125)% more Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText: With death as my ally, all the world is within my grasp.

uniques.name: Moonbender's Wing
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 15 Lightning Warp on Hit with this Weapon
Hits with this Weapon gain (75-100)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold or Lightning Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Beneath the cold light of the moon,
the wing moves faster than the eye.

uniques.name: Moonsorrow
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 20 Blind
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to Blind Enemies on hit
uniques.flavourText:
Cast into darkness
And trapped for a thousand years,
The lonely moon weeps

uniques.name: Mortem Morsu
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
25% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with this Weapon
uniques.flavourText:
Fear blisters the heart and thins the blood.
Fear squeezes lungs and sets the guts to fester.
Fear is the wound left untended.

uniques.name: Mother's Embrace
explicitModifiers: Your Minions use your Flasks when summoned
Minions have (25-40)% reduced Flask Charges used
Minions have (50-80)% increased Flask Effect Duration
uniques.flavourText: Drink, my children, and be strengthened.

uniques.name: Mutated Growth
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Experience Gain for Corrupted Gems
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Few living things survived the cleansing flames.
Those that did thrived...
And changed...

uniques.name: Mutewind Pennant
explicitModifiers: Gain Onslaught for 4 seconds when you Warcry
uniques.flavourText: Embrace the snow or be buried.

uniques.name: Mutewind Seal
explicitModifiers: Socketed Golem Skills have 20% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Gain Onslaught for 10 seconds when you Cast Socketed Golem Skill
+3 to Level of Socketed Golem Gems
Adds (5-10) to (11-15) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
When a fallen leader's body is taken to the funeral peak,
those who seek power must ascend together.
One returns with the seal.
The rest do not return at all.

uniques.name: Mutewind Whispersteps
explicitModifiers: Adds (25-30) to (40-50) Cold Damage to Spells
uniques.flavourText:
Corruption sweeps across this land,
but our bloodline is clear.
It is our duty to keep it so.

uniques.name: Mystic Refractor
explicitModifiers: Projectiles cannot continue after colliding with targets
uniques.flavourText:
"Waging war is a simple matter of geometry and death."
- Trinian, Intellectus Prime

uniques.name: Nadir Mode
explicitModifiers: Spells have (30-50)% increased Critical Strike Chance per Intensity
Spells which have gained Intensity Recently lose 1 Intensity every 0.5 Seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Unbreakable in Contract: Breaking the Unbreakable
uniques.flavourText: Indiscriminate destruction fueled by science gone mad.

uniques.name: Nametaker
explicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Hits with this Weapon have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Enemy Power
5% of Leech from Hits with this Weapon is Instant per Enemy Power
uniques.flavourText:
It need not know your True Name. Our most
dearly held secrets spill forth in our blood.

uniques.name: Natural Affinity
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
You can take the girl out of the woods,
but you can't take the woods out of the girl.

uniques.name: Natural Hierarchy
uniques.flavourText:
Just as the rat cowers before the dog
and the dog cowers before Man,
so too should we cower before the First Ones
and pray we never learn of what comes next.

uniques.name: Nebulis
explicitModifiers: (5-10)% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

uniques.name: Nebuloch
explicitModifiers: Gain (30-40)% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Fire Damage
+4% to Chaos Resistance per Endurance Charge
1% reduced Elemental Damage taken from Hits per Endurance Charge
Adds 5 to 8 Physical Damage per Endurance Charge
200 Fire Damage taken per second per Endurance Charge if you've been Hit Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder
uniques.flavourText:
They hoped that, trapped in its prison,
the creature would age and perish.
But time would not touch the fiend.

uniques.name: Nevalius Inheritance
explicitModifiers: Flasks applied to you have 60% reduced Effect
2% reduced Flask Effect Duration per Level
Flasks applied to you have 1% increased Effect per Level
uniques.flavourText:
"I come from a long line of scholars, poets, and artists.
You can imagine how little we leave our children...
My father only gifted me one thing: for good or ill,
I don't know when to quit."
- Victario Nevalius, the People's Poet

uniques.name: Ngamahu Tiki
explicitModifiers: +100 to Evasion Rating while on Low Life
Regenerate 1% of Life per second while on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
It is said to make you invisible when the Great
Spirit comes to take you on your final journey.

uniques.name: Ngamahu's Flame
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to Trigger Level 16 Molten Burst on Melee Hit
60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"The Karui savages claim the weapon was forged by their fire god.
I'm rather inclined to believe them."
- Fairgraves, Renowned Explorer

uniques.name: Ngamahu's Sign
explicitModifiers: Adds (20-25) to (30-35) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
Recover (20-30) Life when you Ignite an Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
A gift from Ngamahu,
a sign to the Karui to spread like fire.
Given to Akoya, but inherited by Kaom with the swing of his axe.

uniques.name: Night's Hold
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Added Chaos Damage
Socketed Gems are supported by Level 10 Blind
Socketed Gems are supported by Level 10 Cast when Stunned
uniques.flavourText:
In the light of Solaris, the shadows cower and hide.
But every night they gather and grow,
and all but the strong and the stupid
seek shelter from their grasp until daybreak.

uniques.name: Nightgrip
explicitModifiers: Gain Added Chaos Damage equal to 10% of Ward
uniques.flavourText:
Those heroes that set foot on Wraeclast found
themselves changing, only subtly at first...

uniques.name: Nimis
explicitModifiers: Projectiles are fired in random directions
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.

uniques.name: Nomic's Storm
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Damage taken while on Full Energy Shield
20% increased Movement Speed while on Full Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText: It takes a clear mind to outrun a storm.

uniques.name: Null and Void
explicitModifiers: Gain Immunity to Physical Damage for 1.5 seconds on Rampage
uniques.flavourText:
What is freedom but a clean slate
in an unclean world?

uniques.name: Null's Inclination
explicitModifiers: Trigger Socketed Minion Spells on Kill with this Weapon
Minion Spells Triggered by this Item have a 0.25 second Cooldown with 5 Uses
Minions deal 2% increased Damage per 5 Dexterity
uniques.flavourText: The hunt continues when the prey falls.

uniques.name: Nuro's Harp
explicitModifiers: 15% chance to create Chilled Ground when you Freeze an Enemy
Create Consecrated Ground when you Shatter an Enemy
(30-50)% increased Effect of Consecrated Ground you create
uniques.flavourText:
Night's frost becomes morning's dew
Darkness cleansed, pure and new.

uniques.name: Nycta's Lantern
uniques.flavourText:
Left in her tomb by the lynch mob,
the flame inside still blazed bright after her death,
and so did hers.

uniques.name: Obliteration
implicitModifiers: Gain (30-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Enemies you Kill have a 20% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage
uniques.flavourText:
We forge order from the world around us
Wielding anarchy and destruction as our tools of genesis.

uniques.name: Obscurantis
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Projectile Attack Damage per 200 Accuracy Rating
uniques.flavourText: If you know where to strike, you need only strike once.

uniques.name: Offering to the Serpent
explicitModifiers: 50% reduced Maximum Recovery per Life Leech
Life Leech effects are not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex
uniques.flavourText:
"You covet the strength of your peers, mortal?
Perhaps it can be yours, if you are willing to make an offering of their blood..."
- Vaal Myth of the Third Snake

uniques.name: Olesya's Delight
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Minimum Frenzy Charges instead apply to Minimum Affliction Charges
Maximum Affliction Charges is equal to Maximum Frenzy Charges
Gain Affliction Charges instead of Frenzy Charges
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven
uniques.flavourText: The cruel thinker finds glee in torture most precise.

uniques.name: Olroth's Charge
explicitModifiers: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds when Ward Breaks
uniques.flavourText:
Where others would retreat when vulnerable,
Olroth the Gallant fought deeper into battle.

uniques.name: Olroth's Resolve
explicitModifiers: Ward does not Break during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Olroth, Origin of the Fall in Expedition Logbook
uniques.flavourText:
Olroth the Gallant,
tireless and true,
he fights for me,
he fights for you!

uniques.name: Omen on the Winds
explicitModifiers: (15-20)% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Ice Shot has 25% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Ice Shot Pierces 3 additional Targets
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
As Malachai stepped into the Highgate mines,
cold winds billowed from the mountain above.
One final, feeble attempt to save what was meant to be eternal.

uniques.name: Omeyocan
explicitModifiers: 20% increased Evasion Rating per 500 Maximum Mana
You have Onslaught while not on Low Mana
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Dance of the Offered via Vial of the Ritual
uniques.flavourText:
Only a fool seeks meaning
in a life so fleeting.

uniques.name: Ondar's Clasp
explicitModifiers: 30% increased Attack Speed when on Full Life
Adds (1-4) to (30-50) Lightning Damage to Attacks
20% increased Movement Speed when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
A single lightning strike fells a man.
A single knife stroke fells an empire.

uniques.name: One With Nothing
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
It was a great honour to fight at the front.
The few that survived the initial charge were guaranteed fame and fortune.

uniques.name: Oni-Goroshi
explicitModifiers: Adds 2 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks per Level
Gain Her Embrace for 3 seconds when you Ignite an Enemy
While in Her Embrace, take 0.5% of your total Maximum Life and Energy Shield as Fire Damage per second per Level
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Hillock
uniques.flavourText:
As a maiden I was bound; as a crone was I scorned
Promised power rarely found, delivered fury fairly thorned.
Not enough?...Fine. Now I am become both and another
To take your hand and cradle your talents, not smother
The consummate flames. So hush, dear, say not a word.
Bequeathed, betrayed...beloved. At last, I am the third.

uniques.name: Orbala's Stand
explicitModifiers: Cannot be Stunned by Suppressed Spell Damage
Debilitate Enemies for 4 Seconds when you Suppress their Spell Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The inferno surged past, devastating Stridevolf, but the Maraketh
warrior somehow remained. Soot-blackened and resolute, she
grinned. In that moment, the bandit king knew true despair.

uniques.name: Oriath's End
explicitModifiers: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a (20-30)% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

uniques.name: Original Sin
explicitModifiers: All Elemental Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Lycia, Herald of the Scourge in The Beyond while The Original Scripture is active in the Relic Altar
uniques.flavourText:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.

uniques.name: Ornament of the East
implicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Dexterity Gems
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Faster Attacks
uniques.flavourText: To the Maraketh, death is as intimate as love.

uniques.name: Oro's Sacrifice
implicitModifiers: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitModifiers: Gain a Frenzy Charge if an Attack Ignites an Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
Give yourself to the flames and your name
will burn in the minds of men forever.

uniques.name: Oskarm
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 10 Assassin's Mark when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy and have no Mark
2% increased Attack Critical Strike Chance per 200 Accuracy Rating
uniques.flavourText:
Land and sea did not dissuade,
nor did the Kelpie's maw;
the wild beast crossed half the world
to sate his hungry claw.

uniques.name: Overwhelming Odds
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Hits with Cleave Fortify
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Cleave has +0.1 metres to Radius per Nearby
Enemy, up to a maximum of +1 metre
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Even as the tide turned, and victory swiftly became impossible,
the legionnaires of Lioneye's Watch stood their ground and fought on,
every last man dying a brutal, but honourable death.

uniques.name: Pacifism
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText: "Your fear will overcome you."

uniques.name: Painseeker
explicitModifiers: Critical Strikes do not inherently inflict non-Damaging Ailments
Inflict non-Damaging Ailments as though dealing (100-200)% more Damage
uniques.flavourText: Lay bare paths to pain you never knew you had.

uniques.name: Panquetzaliztli
explicitModifiers: Enemies killed explode dealing 10% of their Life as Fire Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal

uniques.name: Perandus Blazon
explicitModifiers: -2 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
uniques.flavourText:
A large enough debt turns even a friend
into an enemy, and the Perandus family
had more debtors than anyone.

uniques.name: Perandus Signet
explicitModifiers: 2% increased Intelligence for each Unique Item Equipped
3% chance for Slain monsters to drop an additional Scroll of Wisdom
uniques.flavourText:
"Our warehouses are bursting. Our vaults are full.
But our minds are still hungry."
- Medici Perandus, Prefect to the Treasury

uniques.name: Perepiteia
explicitModifiers: +(1-3) to Level of Socketed Lightning Gems
Triggers Level 20 Lightning Aegis when Equipped
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Altered/Augmented/Rewritten/Twisted Synthete
uniques.flavourText:
Something within the machine never stops moving,
but Oriathan scholars dare not open it to find out why.

uniques.name: Perfidy
explicitModifiers: Having a placed Banner does not prevent you gaining Valour
uniques.flavourText:
The Trickster God turned the very Day and Night against each other.
What hope have you?

uniques.name: Perquil's Toe
explicitModifiers: Lightning Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Lucky
Nearby Allies' Damage with Hits is Lucky
uniques.flavourText: He was a lot luckier before he lost this.

uniques.name: Perseverance
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Attack Damage per 200 of the lowest of Armour and Evasion Rating
uniques.flavourText:
"Some blows must be evaded. Some blows must be endured.
The trick is to tell them apart."
- Daresso, the Sword King

uniques.name: Pillar of the Caged God
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
1% increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence
explicitModifiers: 16% increased Physical Weapon Damage per 10 Strength
uniques.flavourText:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

uniques.name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon have (100-115)% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
uniques.flavourText:
"Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

uniques.name: Pitch Darkness
explicitModifiers: +10% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
With a fire burning brash in his golden eye,
Marceus fired his arrow into the pitch-dark sky,
And seared the hope of surprise,
From Kaom's skulking horde.

uniques.name: Pledge of Hands
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Greater Spell Echo
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice
uniques.flavourText:
"To shake a hand is to double your power."
- Jaetai, Queen's Advisor

uniques.name: Plume of Pursuit
explicitModifiers: Spell Skills always deal Critical Strikes on final Repeat
Spell Skills cannot deal Critical Strikes except on final Repeat
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Janaar, the Omen in The Sacred Grove
uniques.flavourText: A dance as old as time.

uniques.name: Poacher's Aim
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: A sharp eye can be more deadly than a sharp blade.

uniques.name: Polaric Devastation
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies
Left Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Ash for 5 seconds when you Ignite them
Right Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Frost for 5 seconds when you Freeze them
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Black Star
uniques.flavourText:
Those that escaped the annihilating light
sank eternally into crushing darkness.

uniques.name: Powerlessness
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText: "Your desires will mislead you."

uniques.name: Pragmatism
explicitModifiers: +12 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems
-2 to level of Socketed Skill Gems per Socketed Gem
uniques.flavourText:
The Maji were forbidden from touching virtue gems...
so their practical warriors employed geomancy instead.

uniques.name: Praxis
explicitModifiers: -(8-4) to Total Mana Cost of Skills
8% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
uniques.flavourText:
The Thaumaturgical masters of the Eternal Empire,
as unpredictable and varied as they were,
all understood one thing:
Free thinking leads to free action.

uniques.name: Presence of Chayula
explicitModifiers: 20% of Maximum Life Converted to Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Eye of Chayula using Blessing of Chayula
uniques.flavourText: The dreamer stirs, the world trembles.

uniques.name: Primordial Eminence
explicitModifiers: Golems have (16-20)% increased Attack and Cast Speed
30% increased Effect of Buffs granted by your Golems
uniques.flavourText:
"Do not cause the land to stir,
It holds secrets better unknown."
- Azmerian proverb

uniques.name: Primordial Harmony
explicitModifiers: Golem Skills have (20-30)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Summoned Golems have (30-45)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
(16-20)% increased Golem Damage for each Type of Golem you have Summoned
Summoned Golems Regenerate 2% of their Life per second
uniques.flavourText:
"Kings fall, empires crumble, mortals perish.
All turn to earth and sand."
- Maraketh proverb

uniques.name: Primordial Might
explicitModifiers: (25-30)% increased Damage if you Summoned a Golem in the past 8 seconds
Golems Summoned in the past 8 seconds deal (35-45)% increased Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"A stone is not a stone.
It is but one part of a fortress."
- Ezomyte proverb

uniques.name: Prism Guardian
implicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems Cost and Reserve Life instead of Mana
Socketed Gems have 30% increased Reservation Efficiency
uniques.flavourText: When blood is paid, the weak think twice.

uniques.name: Prismatic Eclipse
implicitModifiers: +8% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
explicitModifiers: 25% increased Global Physical Damage with Weapons per Red Socket
12% increased Global Attack Speed per Green Socket
0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana per Blue Socket
+0.2 metres to Melee Strike Range per White Socket
uniques.flavourText:
"A raging Solaris seared and contorted the orb's surface.
A despairing Lunaris filled the scars with her tears.
Yet Viridi remained, trapped within, forever more."
- Azmerian Creation Myth

uniques.name: Prismweave
explicitModifiers: Adds (14-16) to (30-32) Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds (10-12) to (24-28) Cold Damage to Attacks
Adds 1 to (60-68) Lightning Damage to Attacks
30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills during any Flask Effect
uniques.flavourText: Nothing is as vivid as the rage of battle

uniques.name: Profane Proxy
explicitModifiers: +3 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
Left Ring Slot: Your Chilling Skitterbot's Aura applies Socketed Hex Curse instead
Right Ring Slot: Your Shocking Skitterbot's Aura applies Socketed Hex Curse instead
uniques.flavourText: The machines do not hate. They merely serve one who does.

uniques.name: Progenesis
explicitModifiers: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Maven (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

uniques.name: Prospero's Protection
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Armour from Equipped Shield is doubled
Gain no Armour from Equipped Body Armour
uniques.flavourText:
"Worry not, my friend, that I tour in fineries.
The ostentation is all part of being a Perandus.
As long as I maintain my Vigilance,
nothing can harm the Empire... or me."
- Emperor Chitus, to Ondar

uniques.name: Pugilist
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Evasion Rating per 3 Dexterity Allocated in Radius
1% increased Claw Physical Damage per 3 Dexterity Allocated in Radius
1% increased Melee Physical Damage with Unarmed Attacks per 3 Dexterity Allocated in Radius
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The best dancers often make the best fighters.

uniques.name: Pure Talent
explicitModifiers: While your Passive Skill Tree connects to a class' starting location, you gain:
Marauder: Melee Skills have 25% increased Area of Effect
Duelist: 1% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Witch: 0.5% of Mana Regenerated per second
uniques.flavourText:
The skilled know how to learn.
The talented know who to learn from.

uniques.name: Putembo's Meadow
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Kurgal, the Blackblooded
uniques.flavourText:
The fields were silent but for the plucking of fruits,
the rustling of leaves, and the breaking of stone.
No slave dared to speak or look the passing king in the eye.
No one... except Aul.

This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Putembo's Mountain
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Aul, the Crystal King
uniques.flavourText:
He surveyed his lands, green and vital,
watched with pride as his slaves quarried fine stone for his fortress,
and thanked the heavens for his many blessings.
But this pilgrimage to the peak was to be his last.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Putembo's Valley
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Ahuatotli, the Blind
uniques.flavourText:
With no stone for rebuilding, each storm took its toll on the village.
Huts eventually collapsed, their occupants injured or dead.
Bodies were left by the river, to appease the gods.
But the dead would not remain there.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Pyre
explicitModifiers: 40% of Cold Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Ignited Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed
uniques.flavourText: Let winter come. It will only make my fire burn brighter.

uniques.name: Pyroshock Clasp
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Duration of Elemental Ailments on Enemies
Enemies Ignited by you have (10-15)% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Fire
Enemies Shocked by you have (10-15)% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Lightning
uniques.flavourText: Teach a man to burn, and you'll be warm for the rest of his life.

uniques.name: Qotra's Regulator
explicitModifiers: +(40-60)% to Damage over Time Multiplier if you've dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds
(2-2.5)% of Life Regenerated per Second if you've dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds
Lose (10-15)% of Energy Shield when you deal a Critical Strike
Lose (10-15)% of Life when you deal a Critical Strike
uniques.sourceText: Purchase from Ritual Reward
uniques.flavourText: Horrific experiments with corrupted flesh require careful management.

uniques.name: Quecholli
explicitModifiers: Enemies killed explode dealing 10% of their Life as Fire Damage

uniques.name: Queen of the Forest
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Movement Speed per 600 Evasion Rating, up to 75%
-(50-40) Physical Damage taken from Hits by Animals
uniques.flavourText:
Shedding away her regal past,
she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.

uniques.name: Queen's Decree
explicitModifiers: +(1-2) to maximum number of Raised Zombies
uniques.flavourText:
The nobles wanted to take her throne.
She let the peasants take their wealth.
The peasants wanted to take her wealth.
She let the soldiers take their heads.
The soldiers wanted to take her head.
She sat on her throne and wept.

uniques.name: Queen's Escape
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Raised Zombies
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The nobles wanted to take her throne.
She let the peasants take their wealth.
The peasants wanted to take her wealth.
She let the soldiers take their heads.
The soldiers wanted to take her head.
She sat on her throne and wept.

uniques.name: Quickening Covenant
explicitModifiers: Minions have +(20-24)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
Notable Passive Skills in Radius are Transformed to
instead grant: Minions have 25% reduced Movement Speed
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
When you create life from nothing,
sometimes things get a little stuck in between.

uniques.name: Quill Rain
uniques.flavourText:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

uniques.name: Rain of Splinters
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Crimson Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
"If one is an annoyance
then a hundred is a threat."
- Ancient Karui Proverb

uniques.name: Rainbowstride
uniques.flavourText:
"They say that you should take life's troubles in your stride.
Some men have a longer stride than others."
- Gaius Sentari

uniques.name: Rakiata's Dance
explicitModifiers: Treats Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted
uniques.flavourText: In the shifting reflections of the sea, the truth of the soul can be seen.

uniques.name: Ralakesh's Impatience
explicitModifiers: Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges
Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges
Count as having maximum number of Power Charges
Gain a Frenzy, Endurance, or Power Charge once per second while you are Stationary
Lose all Frenzy, Endurance, and Power Charges when you Move
uniques.flavourText:
The Master of a Million Faces lived by one
simple ethos: why make the effort, when
you can simply mimic what others have?

uniques.name: Rapid Expansion
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Ground Slam has a 35% chance
to grant an Endurance Charge when you Stun an Enemy
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Ground Slam
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Chitus began to aggressively expand his empire
into neighbouring nations at great human cost.
But for absolute power, there is no price
that a Perandus won't pay.

uniques.name: Rashkaldor's Patience
explicitModifiers: 20% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on Enemies
Items and Gems have 10% increased Attribute Requirements
uniques.flavourText: Fate's smile, man's ruin.

uniques.name: Rat's Nest
uniques.flavourText:
A lad with no fear of the pest
Let rats fill his helmet in jest
When they picked his skull clean
Where his head should have been
Was naught but a vermin-filled nest!

uniques.name: Rathpith Globe
explicitModifiers: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
uniques.flavourText:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

uniques.name: Rational Doctrine
explicitModifiers: You have Consecrated Ground around you while
stationary if Strength is your highest Attribute
25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical
Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute
Effects of Consecrated Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds
Effects of Profane Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Logic wanes in shining faith, and in rationalism, ardour dims
Thus, the cynic and the zealot are divided
But can they not be one and the same?

uniques.name: Ravenous Passion
explicitModifiers: Gain (7-10) Rage after Spending a total of 200 Mana
Rage grants Spell Damage instead of Attack Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
There is power in hunger, though it will
consume all that you have... and more.

uniques.name: Razor of the Seventh Sun
explicitModifiers: 30% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
100% increased Burning Damage if you've Ignited an Enemy Recently
Recover 1% of Life when you Ignite an Enemy
100% increased Melee Physical Damage against Ignited Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
Quickly cooled the steel,
but never could it forget
the heat of the forge.

uniques.name: Reach of the Council
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Greater Volley
Arrows fired from the first firing points always Pierce
Arrows fired from the second firing points Fork
Arrows fired from the third firing points Return to you
Arrows fired from the fourth firing points Chain +2 times
uniques.flavourText: We stand together. We strike together.

uniques.name: Realm Ender
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+1 to Level of Socketed Fire Gems
+1 to Level of Socketed Cold Gems
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Elemental Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Cold to Fire
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"God's creations always begin and end
with flames and ice.
We should count ourselves lucky when we see neither."
- Archbishop Geofri

uniques.name: Realmshaper
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+1 to Level of Socketed Fire Gems
+1 to Level of Socketed Cold Gems
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Cold to Fire

uniques.name: Reaper's Pursuit
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life
uniques.flavourText:
Accept your fate, or lie, pretend.
Death collects you in the end.

uniques.name: Rearguard
implicitModifiers: Adds (7-9) to (13-16) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
"It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer

uniques.name: Rebuke of the Vaal
uniques.flavourText:
Though the Vaal revered peace, it would have
been suicide for any culture to rouse them to war.
- Icius Perandus, Scholar to the Empire.

uniques.name: Reckless Defence
explicitModifiers: Hits have (140-200)% increased Critical Strike Chance against you
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
There's no motivation for genius
quite like desperation.

uniques.name: Redbeak
implicitModifiers: 100% increased Damage when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText: As battle calms, blood turns to rust.

uniques.name: Redblade Band
explicitModifiers: Socketed Golem Skills have 25% chance to Taunt on Hit
Socketed Golem Skills have Minions Regenerate 5% of Life per second
+3 to Level of Socketed Golem Gems
uniques.flavourText:
To ascend to leadership, the child of a Redblade warlord
must pull the band from the still-hot
ashes of their father.

uniques.name: Redblade Banner
uniques.flavourText: Blood shed is blood shared.

uniques.name: Redblade Tramplers
explicitModifiers: Adds (2-5) to (7-10) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
Our home was swallowed beneath
the great mountain for our complacency.
Now we must prove our value to the Molten One
by sating his hunger for life.

uniques.name: Reefbane
explicitModifiers: Glows while in an Area containing a Unique Fish
uniques.flavourText:
He cast far into the ocean
And tore out her heart.

uniques.name: Refuge in Isolation
explicitModifiers: (15-30)% of Elemental Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
Physical Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
The pain of solitude can be endured, but
the pain of heartbreak might just destroy us.

uniques.name: Relentless Fury
explicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
You gain Onslaught for 3 seconds on Culling Strike
100% chance to Avoid being Chilled during Onslaught
uniques.flavourText:
Relentless fury
Sunder my every foe
Fuel my boiling blood

uniques.name: Relic of the Cycle
explicitModifiers: Projectiles Return to you from final target
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Relic of the Pact
explicitModifiers: Your Critical Strike Chance is Lucky while on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Trialmaster
uniques.flavourText: Crush your enemies with your essence, so that you may drink of theirs.

uniques.name: Remnant of Empires
explicitModifiers: +3% to all Elemental Resistances per Endurance Charge
50% chance to gain an Endurance Charge when you Block
Reflects 4 to 8 Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Repentance
uniques.flavourText:
"I ask not for understanding,
only for forgiveness
for what I am about to do.
There will be blood on these shackles yet."
- Anonymous carving, Axiom Prison.

uniques.name: Replica Abyssus
explicitModifiers: Adds 40 to 75 Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds 30 to 65 Cold Damage to Attacks
Adds 10 to 130 Lightning Damage to Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"While Prototype #3 does imbue its wearer with strength to match the original,
the first researcher to don it burst into flames when he walked into sunlight..."

uniques.name: Replica Advancing Fortress
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 12 Cast when Damage Taken
Adds 45 to 75 Fire Damage if you've Blocked Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Additional test subjects approved. Determine exactly how many wounds
need to be endured to activate Prototype #612's energies."

uniques.name: Replica Alberon's Warpath
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 80 Chaos Damage to Attacks per 80 Strength
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Starving test subject became completely incapable of exerting force.
However, after being fed, he began to poison everything he touched..."

uniques.name: Replica Allelopathy
explicitModifiers: Source: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
Wintertide Brand has (20-30)% increased Chill Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"There seems to be some innate relationship between the forces of
chaos and cold. Perhaps we should consult an occultist."

uniques.name: Replica Allure
implicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: Gain +50 Life when you Taunt an Enemy
You gain Onslaught for 1 seconds on Killing Taunted Enemies
Enemies Taunted by you take 10% increased Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Test subject was able to survive the entire process simply by shouting epithets at
the researcher. Researcher's feelings were slightly injured."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Alpha's Howl
explicitModifiers: +4 to Level of Socketed Herald Gems
16% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Test subject walked right through the poison gas defenses, and attempts to slow her
failed. Suppression troop six, the 'Furious Flagellants,' have been sent to intervene."

uniques.name: Replica Ambu's Charge
explicitModifiers: Share Endurance Charges with nearby party members
Gain an Endurance Charge when you are Hit
Lose 2% of Life per second if you have been Hit Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #7 achieved even greater injury responsiveness than expected,
though at considerable cost to the long-term survival rate of the user."

uniques.name: Replica Atziri's Acuity
explicitModifiers: You have Perfect Agony if you've dealt a Critical Strike recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"One of our researchers cut himself on Prototype #2,
and he has not stopped screaming for months..."

uniques.name: Replica Atziri's Foible
explicitModifiers: Items and Gems have 25% reduced Attribute Requirements
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"A rare unequivocal success, Prototype #11 causes wounds to heal so quickly
the type Delta test subject actually survived the entire testing regimen."

uniques.name: Replica Badge of the Brotherhood
explicitModifiers: Your Maximum Endurance Charges is equal to your Maximum Frenzy Charges
+1 to maximum Fortification per Endurance Charge
(7-10)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
(20-25)% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
(20-25)% chance to lose an Endurance Charge when you gain Fortification
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"I stood upon the tower's edge, and saw that we had cracked the sky.
There is nowhere we can run that our sins will not find us now."
- Researcher Arn, last recorded words

uniques.name: Replica Bated Breath
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"I cannot fathom the mysteries of Prototype #16. It did nearly nothing until I
brought it to [RESTRICTED]. It makes no sense!"
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Bitterdream
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Elemental Penetration
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Immolate
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Unbound Ailments
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Ice Bite
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Inspiration
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Innervate
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Attempt #2520: Been slaving away at this one for longer than I can remember.
Convinced this assignment is retribution from my superior..."

uniques.name: Replica Blood Sacrifice
explicitModifiers: Recover 1% of Energy Shield on Kill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"You know what to do with this, don't you?" - Researcher Graven
"Kill test subjects for their vitality?" - Researcher Olesya
"That is not what he meant." - Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Blood Thorn
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
+12% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Flammability on Block
Reflects (22-44) Fire Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Physical forces and flames seem to share some innate bond.
What logic lies beneath the veil of reality?"

uniques.name: Replica Bloodplay
explicitModifiers: 30% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
(100-150)% increased Critical Strike Chance against Bleeding Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #131 must never be allowed near anyone who bears a wound, no
matter how slight. Even a tiny cut makes it exponentially more dangerous."

uniques.name: Replica Bones of Ullr
explicitModifiers: Summoned Phantasms have 10% chance to refresh their Duration when they Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
Summoned Raging Spirits have 10% chance to refresh their Duration when they Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Outpost Twelve has been abandoned. On the bright side, I expect the plague of apparitions
to serve as ample defence for the relics we left behind."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Cheap Construction
explicitModifiers: (100-120)% increased Critical Strike Chance with Traps
Can have 5 fewer Traps placed at a time
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: "A curious jewel. Like so many others, a shining little paradox."

uniques.name: Replica Cold Iron Point
explicitModifiers: +3 to Level of all Cold Spell Skill Gems
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Researchers will refrain from scaring each other by firing ice spears while holding
Prototype #141. Sooner or later, someone's going to lose an eye."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Conqueror's Efficiency
explicitModifiers: Non-Channelling Skills have -9 to Total Mana Cost
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: "The effect is subtle, but potentially lethal..."

uniques.name: Replica Covenant
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 29 Added Cold Damage
Skills gain a Base Energy Shield Cost equal to 200% of Base Mana Cost
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Researcher Graven's request to wear Prototype #2998 in
place of his standard lab attire is... granted."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

uniques.name: Replica Doedre's Damning
explicitModifiers: You can apply one fewer Curse
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #8 makes it difficult to think negatively, but two fatalities
resulted when a lead researcher used an epithet in its presence."

uniques.name: Replica Dreamfeather
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Once we armoured the test subject heavily enough to test Prototype #502, he proceeded
to fight his way out. I don't know what we expected."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Duskdawn
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: +10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
+1% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+60% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've dealt a Non-Critical Strike Recently
(120-150)% increased Elemental Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Lab Two suffered significant structural damage in the process of creating
Prototype #77. It is, however, the closest we've come to perfection."

uniques.name: Replica Earendel's Embrace
explicitModifiers: Raised Zombies Cover Enemies in Ash on Hit
Raised Zombies take (15-30)% of their Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
Raised Zombies have Avatar of Fire
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Lord of Bone, Lord of Flesh, yet all that we can
master turns to ash."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Emberwake
explicitModifiers: Ignites you inflict deal Damage (35-45)% faster
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The flames raced through Lab Five with incredible speed, but were extinguished
just as quickly. This could have been much worse."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

uniques.name: Replica Eternity Shroud
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Shade Form when Hit
Gain (3-5)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage per Elder Item Equipped
Hits ignore Enemy Monster Chaos Resistance if all Equipped Items are Elder Items
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The form of this replica came to me in a troubled dream.
I do not believe we should ever allow it to be used."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Farrul's Fur
explicitModifiers: Aspect of the Cat has no Reservation
Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Endurance Charges when you gain Cat's Agility
You have Onslaught while you have Cat's Agility
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Attempt #120: the prototype has finally achieved power similar to the original
without breaking all the bones of the test subject. A rousing success."

uniques.name: Replica Fencoil
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Multiple Totems
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Attempt #306: The power I can sense in this ancient branch
still eludes me. Perhaps if I attach some string and a hook..."

uniques.name: Replica Fragile Bloom
explicitModifiers: 0.7% of Life Regenerated per second per Fragile Regrowth
Gain up to maximum Fragile Regrowth when Hit
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: "Distribute Prototype #723 to the guards. Perhaps their survival rate will increase."

uniques.name: Replica Fragility
explicitModifiers: Lose an Endurance Charge each second
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Our defenses are failing at Outpost One. We can't hold out much
longer. All outposts, abandon your stations! Escape while you can!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, three hours post-Incident

uniques.name: Replica Frostbreath
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon deal Double Damage to Chilled Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Three test subjects confirmed Prototype #495 creates an additional
debilitating effect from poisons. This could be very useful."

uniques.name: Replica Gifts from Above
explicitModifiers: Trigger level 10 Consecrate when you deal a Critical Strike
(40-50)% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Enemies killed with a Critical Strike
Inflict Hallowing Flame on Hit while on Consecrated Ground
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Our first Prototype. Proof that it can be done.
The Templars will give us everything we need,
now... but we must keep our true goal secret."

uniques.name: Replica Grip of the Council
explicitModifiers: Minions gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"I feel altered when Administrator Qotra wears these gloves.
Somehow, I find that disturbing."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Harvest
explicitModifiers: 1.2% of Damage Leeched as Life on Critical Strike
3% increased Global Critical Strike Chance per Level
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Why is Prototype #67 never in the vault it should be?
Either we're keeping faulty logs, or..."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Headhunter
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Magic monsters
20% chance when you Kill a Magic Monster to gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"A type Delta test subject escaped with Prototype #18. He was last seen
ten times the height of a man and crashing straight through walls."

uniques.name: Replica Heartbreaker
explicitModifiers: (40-80)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
20% chance to Impale on Spell Hit
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"There is something incredibly satisfying about impaling test
subjects with Ethereal Knives. Perhaps it is the sound -
the spell, the screams, or both."  - Researcher Olesya

uniques.name: Replica Heatshiver
explicitModifiers: Gain 1% of Lightning Damage as Extra Cold Damage per 2% Shock Effect on Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The storm... that lightning... I'd be dead if I hadn't...
but it was cold. Ice cold! It's not what we think, and
the plan won't work! Where's Arn?! I have to tell him!"
- Researcher Graven, infirmary report

uniques.name: Replica Hinekora's Sight
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"I touched #2993, and I saw... how blind we've been. The visions
weren't the future. They were the past! Our 'unforeseen
consequences' have already been happening!"
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Hotheaded
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Does this jewel accomplish nothing? If only we could somehow
master cold and turn it to our own ends..."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

uniques.name: Replica Hyrri's Ire
explicitModifiers: (12-18) to (231-347) Added Lightning Damage with Wand Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Yes, a catastrophic storm erupted, and yes, they screamed for me
to stop the experiment... but you know how I am with screams."
- Researcher Olesya, on #2999 and the loss of Outpost Eight

uniques.name: Replica Hyrri's Truth
explicitModifiers: Hatred has 100% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The type Delta test subjects could have escaped with the power offered by
Prototype #15, but they suddenly chose to murder each other instead..."

uniques.name: Replica Infractem
explicitModifiers: Projectiles from Attacks can Fork 1 additional time
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"How did you manage to lodge arrows in every single test subject
and researcher in Lab Three simultaneously... again?"
- Doctor Bircus

uniques.name: Replica Innsbury Edge
explicitModifiers: 0.2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
50% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Inflict Withered for 2 seconds on Hit with this Weapon
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The night-gaunts, they fly, soaring about in darkness beyond the ken of mankind.
I hear the silent whispers of their wings as they descend, for me, for me..."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Inya's Epiphany
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 0.5% of Life per second per Power Charge
5% increased Movement Speed per Power Charge
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #56 was deemed safe, but judging by Administrator Qotra's new hustle
and improved ability to micromanage us, I'm not so sure."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Iron Commander
explicitModifiers: Shrapnel Ballista has +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems per 200 Strength
Adds 1 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks per 25 Strength
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Admittedly lacking the finesse of the fabled original,
Prototype #4 achieved identical results through brute force alone."

uniques.name: Replica Kalisa's Grace
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Unleash
Gain 40% increased Area of Effect for 2 seconds after Spending a total of 800 Mana
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Our superiors were getting anxious for results, and lowered security standards.
A single attempt of a spell with this unexpected power destroyed an entire floor."

uniques.name: Replica Kaom's Heart
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Useless for our purposes, but perhaps we can sell Prototype #5
to an archmage to fund other experiments."

uniques.name: Replica Karui Ward
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"In testing, Prototype #9 had no effect on fired arrows. However,
an unknown spell did destroy the entire firing chamber."

uniques.name: Replica Kongor's Undying Rage
explicitModifiers: Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
Regenerate 20% of Energy Shield per second if you've dealt a Critical Strike with this weapon Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #599 offers an incredible defensive power, but at a cost.
What underlying physics are at play here, I wonder?"

uniques.name: Replica Last Resort
explicitModifiers: 25% increased Attack Speed when on Low Life
100% increased Accuracy Rating when on Low Life
200% increased Damage with Claws while on Low Life
Deal no Damage when not on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"An absurdly vicious weapon in the hands of our test subjects. It seems to
channel the desperate will to live. Intriguing."
- Researcher Olesya

uniques.name: Replica Lavianga's Spirit
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Mana Cost of Skills during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: "An intriguing paradox."

uniques.name: Replica Leer Cast
explicitModifiers: You and nearby Allies have 30% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #412 seems to bear much in
common with Thought Extractor technology."

uniques.name: Replica Lioneye's Paws
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 5 Toxic Rain when you Attack with a Bow
Adds 12 to 24 Chaos Damage to Attacks
40% reduced Movement Speed when on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Twelve dead, and the seventh lab cannot be entered for several years.
Prototype #12 is a 'success,' if we can ever reach it."

uniques.name: Replica Loreweave
explicitModifiers: Adds (4-10) to (14-36) Physical Damage to Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Better... stronger... more vital... and then... failure. Always, failure.
What key fundamental secret are we missing?"

uniques.name: Replica Malachai's Artifice
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems have Secrets of Suffering
+(75-100)% to Fire Resistance when Socketed with a Red Gem
+(75-100)% to Cold Resistance when Socketed with a Green Gem
+(75-100)% to Lightning Resistance when Socketed with a Blue Gem
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"As much as Prototype #20 hints at some deep alternate physics, we cannot afford
to expend any more test subjects. Experiments halted."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Maloney's Mechanism
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Cast a Spell while
wielding a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The Midnight Tinkerer's aid was invaluable during our brief alliance,
but when we failed to make any progress on resurrection, he continued his search elsewhere..."

uniques.name: Replica Midnight Bargain
implicitModifiers: Cannot be used with Chaos Inoculation
explicitModifiers: +6 to maximum number of Raging Spirits
+3 to maximum number of Summoned Phantasms
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Simply incredible. I caught an escaping test subject myself with
swarms of burning skulls. Delightful!"
- Researcher Olesya

uniques.name: Replica Mistwall
explicitModifiers: +(8-15)% chance to Avoid Physical Damage from Hits while Phasing
You have Phasing if you have Blocked Recently
You are at Maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage if you have not Blocked Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"For personal defence, Prototype #444 is fantastic. It is one hundred percent
effective seventy five percent of the time... once."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

uniques.name: Replica Nebulis
explicitModifiers: Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance, up to a maximum of 450%
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"We could rival the gods with this power, if only we had the mitigating mechanisms
to make it work. A jewel, a talisman, an armour... or the Font..."

uniques.name: Replica Oro's Sacrifice
implicitModifiers: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitModifiers: Gain an Endurance Charge if an Attack Freezes an Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Ice and flame antagonized in the essence of a prototype.
What once burned now chills the soul."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Pacifism
explicitModifiers: Lose a Frenzy Charge each second
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Release the type Delta test subjects. Unseal all prototype lockers.
Arm yourself! I know that, as researchers, you've never had to fight
before, but they're coming to kill us all. It's resist or die!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, two hours post-Incident

uniques.name: Replica Perfect Form
explicitModifiers: Evasion Rating is increased by Overcapped Cold Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"This is what I've been trying to tell you. This prototype
was different before. Now, it's always been this way!"
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Powerlessness
explicitModifiers: Lose a Power Charge each second
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The suppression troops have stopped responding to my orders.
I'm no longer in charge, and I likely never truly was... I suspect
