they're already coming for us."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, one hour post-Incident

uniques.name: Replica Primordial Might
explicitModifiers: -1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
(25-30)% increased Damage if you Summoned a Golem in the past 8 seconds
Golems Summoned in the past 8 seconds deal (100-125)% increased Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The summoned golems immediately battered through the chamber wall
and killed several guards, but their fury only lasted a short time."

uniques.name: Replica Prismweave
explicitModifiers: Adds (14-16) to (30-32) Fire Damage to Spells
Adds (10-12) to (24-28) Cold Damage to Spells
Adds 1 to (60-68) Lightning Damage to Spells
30% increased Elemental Damage during any Flask Effect
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"A legion of forty soldiers attempted to break into Outpost Five and
steal Prototype #659. What do they know that we do not?"

uniques.name: Replica Pure Talent
explicitModifiers: While your Passive Skill Tree connects to a class' starting location, you gain:
Marauder: 1% of Life Regenerated per second
Shadow: 12% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Templar: +4% Chance to Block Attack and Spell Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Twelve test subjects were expended in the production of Prototype #800.
Was it worth the expense? Only time will tell."

uniques.name: Replica Quill Rain
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Arrow Nova
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"How did you manage to lodge arrows in every single test subject
and researcher in Lab Three simultaneously?"
- Doctor Bircus

uniques.name: Replica Reckless Defence
explicitModifiers: +10% chance to be Frozen, Shocked and Ignited
uniques.flavourText: "Prototype #298 must be contained in a non-conductive glass box at all times."

uniques.name: Replica Red Trail
explicitModifiers: Gain a Power Charge on Hit while Poisoned
50% chance for Spell Hits against you to inflict Poison
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Researchers will please refrain from combining our prototypes with existing relics
of power. The temptation is obvious, but the results can be... unpredictable."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Restless Ward
explicitModifiers: 6% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
Regenerate (100-140) Life per second per Endurance Charge
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Further research must be done on Prototype #282.
There is power here, if it can be tapped."

uniques.name: Replica Rumi's Concoction
explicitModifiers: +(35-50)% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+(20-30)% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The most terrifying split second of my life."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Replica Shroud of the Lightless
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Eyes of black, three by three, staring ever darker into me..."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Siegebreaker
explicitModifiers: Your Minions spread Burning Ground on Death, dealing 20% of their maximum Life as Fire Damage per second
Minions have 5% chance to Maim Enemies on Hit with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Recommend extreme caution on any prototypes that can lead to a chain reaction
of deaths. Lab Twelve has been lost to the flames."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

uniques.name: Replica Sorrow of the Divine
explicitModifiers: Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Success! Prototype #54 has tapped into that sliver of divinity that exists within.
Faith fuels the flesh, and the flesh fuels the fire..."

uniques.name: Replica Soul Strike
implicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Critical Strike Chance with Bows
explicitModifiers: Adds (13-18) to (26-32) Physical Damage to Attacks
80% reduced Maximum Recovery per Life Leech
40% increased Maximum total Life Recovery per second from Leech
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The theft of another's vitality is short-lived, but sweet.
It calls to me, bidding me abandon all other pursuits."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Soul Taker
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Nothing feels so smooth in the hand as Prototype #66.
Results like these may justify everything we do here."

uniques.name: Replica Soul Tether
explicitModifiers: Gain (4-6)% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Curious. The test spike penetrated the subject's flesh, but the chest wound
was not as deep as expected. There is something here..."

uniques.name: Replica Stampede
explicitModifiers: Socketed Travel Skills deal 80% more Damage
(30-40)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate while moving
Your Movement Speed is 150% of its base value
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Suppression troop seven, the 'Glowering Faithful,' managed to fell the escaping
test subject by timing their arrows between his explosive dashes."

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: Replica Tasalio's Sign
explicitModifiers: Adds (15-20) to (25-35) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds 60 to 80 Cold Damage against Chilled Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Likely our closest to the original, yet Prototype #22 still falls short.
Are these objects actually somehow resisting our efforts?"

uniques.name: Replica Tempestuous Steel
explicitModifiers: +(60-100)% to Critical Strike Multiplier with One Handed Melee Weapons
Attacks with this Weapon Penetrate 30% Elemental Resistances
Gain 15% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain 15% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Test subjects were unable to strike even a motionless target.
However, when a trained guard tried it..."

uniques.name: Replica Three-step Assault
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Movement Speed if you've Hit an Enemy Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The test subject nearly escaped, but the poison gas
system in the hallway functioned as expected."

uniques.name: Replica Trypanon
explicitModifiers: This Weapon's Critical Strike Chance is 100%
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: "The best place for this prototype would be in the hands of our enemies."

uniques.name: Replica Tukohama's Fortress
explicitModifiers: You can Cast an additional Brand
20% increased Critical Strike Chance per Brand
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"As one of our few creations that did not cost any fatalities,
Prototype #10 bore unexpectedly positive results."

uniques.name: Replica Tulfall
implicitModifiers: Adds (14-29) to (42-47) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitModifiers: Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges
Gain a Frenzy Charge on reaching Maximum Power Charges
(15-20)% increased Cold Damage per Frenzy Charge
50% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Hit a Frozen Enemy
Take 500 Cold Damage on reaching Maximum Power Charges
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Are we mad for attempting to build an engine out of this?
Looping cycles, power and pain..."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Twyzel
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Energy redirected is energy imbalanced.
Prototype #78 serves as a prime example."

uniques.name: Replica Ungil's Gauche
explicitModifiers: +18% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
Chill Attackers for 4 seconds on Block
Shock Attackers for 4 seconds on Block
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Recommend further production of Prototype #122. It makes
an ideal weapon for our suppression troops and guards."

uniques.name: Replica Unstable Payload
explicitModifiers: Recover (20-30) Life when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Researchers will refrain from giving test subjects virtue gems which produce traps.
We are still finding explosives in the vents months later."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Veil of the Night
explicitModifiers: Reflects 1 to (180-220) Lightning Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #722 might look like a helmet, but I believe it to be something else
entirely. The visions it shows the wearer... are beyond mortal endurance..."

uniques.name: Replica Victario's Charity
explicitModifiers: 10% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
5% chance to grant an Endurance Charge to nearby Allies on Hit
10% chance to grant a Frenzy Charge to nearby Allies on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Close to the original, and perhaps even more useful. However,
close is not what we are looking for. Keep trying."
- Administrator Qotra

uniques.name: Replica Voideye
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: "So close, yet frustratingly distinct. Something more is going on here..."

uniques.name: Replica Voidwalker
explicitModifiers: Source: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
You have Phasing if you've Killed Recently
Projectiles Chain +1 times while you have Phasing
uniques.flavourText:
"Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

uniques.name: Replica Volkuur's Guidance
explicitModifiers: Chaos Skills have 20% chance to Ignite
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Prototype #73 is a near perfect opposite of the original. Perhaps our failures
are due to some unknown polarity we have yet to discover."

uniques.name: Replica Windripper
implicitModifiers: (20-24)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitModifiers: Enemies Frozen by you take 20% increased Damage
+(90-120) Energy Shield gained on Killing a Shocked Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Beware. Prototype #91 is haunted by a strange miasma,
an odour of evil. Nothing can shield the senses."
- Researcher Arn

uniques.name: Replica Wings of Entropy
explicitModifiers: +(8-12)% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
+(10-20)% to Off Hand Critical Strike Chance
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"The remarkable imbalance of Prototype #848 leads to uncommon
power or speed when striking."

uniques.name: Replica Winterheart
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 5% of Energy Shield per second while Shocked
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Researcher Graven spent eleven hours suffering electrocution in the lab
before he was found. Prototype #14 somehow kept him from dying."

uniques.name: Replica Witchfire Brew
explicitModifiers: Creates a Smoke Cloud on Use
Grants Level 21 Vulnerability Curse Aura during Effect
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
"Nobody will listen to me, because I'm the only one that sees it.
Nothing left to do now but drink until this world makes sense."
- Researcher Graven

uniques.name: Retaliation Charm
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
Blind does not affect your Light Radius
Blind you inflict is Reflected to you
(10-20)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Hit while Blinded
uniques.flavourText: An eye for an eye.

uniques.name: Reverberation Rod
implicitModifiers: Adds (1-2) to (9-11) Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Arcane Surge
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Spell Echo
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Controlled Destruction
uniques.flavourText: If it's worth doing once, it's worth doing twice.

uniques.name: Rigwald's Charge
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Movement Speed if you've Killed Recently
uniques.flavourText:
"Today, clansmen, my sword is my voice!"
- Rigwald, at the Battle of Glarryn

uniques.name: Rigwald's Command
implicitModifiers: +10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
explicitModifiers: Each Rage also grants +2% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding while wielding an Axe
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Rigwald, the Wolven King (Level 75+)
uniques.flavourText:
Fear not death. Turn to him, face him.
And smile as he sinks his teeth
into the throats of our oppressors.

uniques.name: Rigwald's Crest
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 10 Summon Spectral Wolf on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Rigwald, the Wolven King (Level 60+)
uniques.flavourText:
Within the heart of every man and woman
lies the soul of a ferocious beast.
If you cannot tame it, embrace it.

uniques.name: Rigwald's Curse
implicitModifiers: +7% to Unarmed Melee Attack Critical Strike Chance
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Claw Damage also apply to Unarmed Attack Damage with Melee Skills
Modifiers to Claw Attack Speed also apply to Unarmed Attack Speed with Melee Skills
Modifiers to Claw Critical Strike Chance also apply to Unarmed Critical Strike Chance with Melee Skills
uniques.flavourText:
I once thought the First Ones were just
stories made to scare children.
But I've seen what they can do. I've felt it.
And now I must live with that terrible knowledge.

uniques.name: Rigwald's Hunt
explicitModifiers: Minions have 1% chance to deal Double Damage per Fortification on you
Increases and Reductions to Minion Maximum Life also apply to you at 15% of their value
uniques.flavourText:
"The Greatwolf is with us! Gaius Sentari
flees! Let us give chase, for today, my
brothers and sisters, we are finally free!"

uniques.name: Rigwald's Quills
explicitModifiers: Gain 7 Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Rigwald, The Wolven King (Level 70+)
uniques.flavourText:
The fortunate inscribe their legacy
in the pages of history books.
The rest of us must leave our mark with our blood
or the blood of others.

uniques.name: Rigwald's Savagery
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Physical Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
+10 to Maximum Rage while wielding a Sword
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Rigwald, the Wolven King (Level 75+)
uniques.flavourText:
Tear the flesh from the bone.
Turn the bone to dust.
Scatter the dust to the wind.

uniques.name: Rime Gaze
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Concentrated Effect
+50% to Cold Damage over Time Multiplier
uniques.flavourText: The malice in her gaze froze blood and shattered bone.

uniques.name: Ring of Blades
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Ethereal Knives fires Projectiles in a circle
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
At night, as a young Daresso shared his bed with a woman whose name he could not recall,
his thoughts remained in the one place he called his own: The Grand Arena.

uniques.name: Rise of the Phoenix
explicitModifiers: +25% to Fire Resistance while on Low Life
10% increased Movement Speed when on Low Life
100% chance to Avoid being Ignited while on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
My bearer shall be guarded by flame,
for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.

uniques.name: Rive
implicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
2% increased Physical Damage Over Time per 10 Dexterity
30% Chance to cause Bleeding Enemies to Flee on hit
uniques.flavourText:
Terror doesn't make you jump.
Terror makes you run.

uniques.name: Rolling Flames
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball cannot ignite
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball has +(30-50)% chance to inflict scorch
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
From north to south the sea of fire swept,
Rolling waves of gorging flame,
Growing taller and hungrier,
With every land they consumed.

uniques.name: Romira's Banquet
explicitModifiers: 0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Gain a Power Charge on Non-Critical Strike
Lose all Power Charges on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
The Empress gave Romira two sons
Born of his brother's seed
Romira threw her a banquet
A perfidious meal indeed.

uniques.name: Rotblood Promise
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Blasphemy
Curse Auras from Socketed Skills also affect you
Socketed Curse Gems have 80% increased Reservation Efficiency
20% reduced Effect of Curses on you
(15-25)% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Cursed Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Purchase from Ritual Reward
uniques.flavourText:
Accept the infection, let it take hold.
Then carry it far and wide.

uniques.name: Rotgut
explicitModifiers: 50% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike
Gain Onslaught for 3 seconds per Frenzy Charge consumed on use
uniques.flavourText: Rancid, rotten, and wicked are those that dare to taste my serum.

uniques.name: Roth's Reach
explicitModifiers: (60-80)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
uniques.flavourText:
"Exiled to the sea; what a joke.
I'm more free than I've ever been."
- Captain Weylam "Rot-tooth" Roth of the Black Crest

uniques.name: Rotting Legion
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Meat Shield
1% less Elemental Damage taken per Raised Zombie
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: A glacier of putrid meat, crushing mountains and valleys alike.

uniques.name: Rumi's Concoction
explicitModifiers: +(8-12)% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+(4-6)% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
"Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world.
Today I am wise, so I am changing myself."
-Rumi of the Vaal

uniques.name: Rust of Winter
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Ryslatha's Coil
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to (15-20) Physical Damage to Attacks
Gain 50 Life when you Stun an Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
All creatures have the potential for greatness
or unequivocal failure.

uniques.name: Sacrificial Harvest
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% chance to gain an additional Vaal Soul on Kill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The Vaal used human sacrifice to power their empire.
They, too, eventually sought means to
make their machines run more efficiently.

uniques.name: Sacrificial Heart
explicitModifiers: Gain up to maximum Power Charges when you use a Vaal Skill
Gain 10 Life per Enemy Hit if you have used a Vaal Skill Recently
10% increased Movement Speed if you have used a Vaal Skill Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
The seed of life, saved and savoured.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Sacrifice

uniques.name: Sadima's Touch
explicitModifiers: Adds 4 to 8 Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds 1 to 13 Lightning Damage to Attacks
uniques.flavourText: Wealth unspent is wealth wasted.

uniques.name: Saemus' Gift
uniques.flavourText:
Beaten in contest, he would try once more
Guided by magic, Magjar took aim at a dove
Saemus' gift would influence the score
Guided by darkness, Magjar spilled the blood of his love

uniques.name: Saffell's Frame
uniques.flavourText: A swift mind solves problems before they occur.

uniques.name: Sandstorm Visage
explicitModifiers: Base Spell Critical Strike Chance of Spells is equal to that of Main Hand Weapon
Cannot deal Critical Strikes with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Lycia, Herald of the Scourge in The Beyond
uniques.flavourText: A fell wind brings death.

uniques.name: Sanguine Gambol
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Attack Damage against Bleeding Enemies
50% chance to Cause Bleeding on Critical Strike
You have Crimson Dance if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
A tap on the shoulder
A peck on the cheek
A sip of your wine
So red and so sleek

uniques.name: Sap of the Seasons
implicitModifiers: (70-100)% increased Elemental Damage with Melee Weapons
explicitModifiers: Melee Weapon Damage Penetrates 1% Elemental Resistances per Mana Burn, up to a maximum of 200%
uniques.flavourText:
Life and death dance ever closer,
waiting only for the right moment.

uniques.name: Saqawal's Flock
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Twister when you gain Avian's Might or Avian's Flight
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saqawal, First of the Sky
uniques.flavourText:
Though we are individual, we share the same plight.
The First of the Sky teaches us that unity and selflessness,
not division and greed, is what will carry us upwards.

uniques.name: Saqawal's Nest
explicitModifiers: (12-20)% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
100% increased Aspect of the Avian Buff Effect
Aspect of the Avian also grants Avian's Might and Avian's Flight to nearby Allies
+(120-150) to Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saqawal, First of the Sky
uniques.flavourText:
The First of the Sky was the Last of the First.
It was he who showed us that our limits are self-imposed,
that what we take for law may just be an illusion.

uniques.name: Saqawal's Talons
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 20 Aspect of the Avian Skill
Regenerate 100 Life per Second while you have Avian's Flight
Regenerate 12 Mana per Second while you have Avian's Flight
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saqawal, First of the Sky
uniques.flavourText:
A bird, too heavily laden, cannot take flight.
The First of the Sky teaches us to put aside our possessions
so that we may live more freely.

uniques.name: Saqawal's Winds
explicitModifiers: Adds (20-25) to (37-40) Cold Damage while you have Avian's Might
Adds (1-3) to (55-62) Lightning Damage while you have Avian's Might
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saqawal, First of the Sky
uniques.flavourText:
When the inferno spread across the land,
it was the First of the Sky who singed his feathers
as he brought the flames to a standstill.

uniques.name: Saresh's Darkness
explicitModifiers: Enemies Poisoned by you cannot deal Critical Strikes
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saresh, of the Weeping Black
uniques.flavourText:
"I weep not for myself, but for the truth of what we are.
It rots away inside all of us, the darkness within. They blame
me, but I am merely the prophet, the one who sees the black."

uniques.name: Scaeva
explicitModifiers: 0.3% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life per Red Socket
+10% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier per Green Socket
0.3% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana per Blue Socket
8% increased Global Defences per White Socket
(60-80)% increased Global Critical Strike Chance when in Main Hand
+8% Chance to Block Attack Damage when in Off Hand
uniques.flavourText:
Even from the back rows,
the whistling steel was mesmerising.
They watched the dance in the arena dust, silent as the dead.
A spell only broken by the spilling of blood.

uniques.name: Scar of Fate
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems have 50% reduced Mana Cost
Gain 3 Life per Enemy Hit with Spells
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Scold's Bridle
explicitModifiers: Your Skills deal you 400% of Mana Spent on Upfront Skill Mana Costs as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind.
A curious paradox."
- Shavronne of Umbra

uniques.name: Scornflux
explicitModifiers: Gain Arcane Surge when you use a Movement Skill
Increases to Cast Speed from Arcane Surge also applies to Movement Speed
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mercenary after winning a duel
uniques.flavourText:
The grave insult had to be answered; in a mystic flash,
Bardiya crossed the room and struck Cyaxan.
Thus began the War of the Great Families.

uniques.name: Scorpion's Call
implicitModifiers: Adds (12-15) to (24-27) Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Regenerate (150-200) Life per Second while in Blood Stance
(40-60)% increased Projectile Damage while in Blood Stance
+(700-1000) to Evasion Rating while in Sand Stance
(20-30)% increased Area of Effect while in Sand Stance
(20-30)% increased Attack Speed if you've changed Stance Recently
uniques.flavourText: Claws open, brace for a bite. Stinger raised, dodge or die.

uniques.name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitModifiers: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saresh, of the Weeping Black
uniques.flavourText:
"I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

uniques.name: Seething Fury
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Attack Damage while holding a Shield
+0.15% to Off Hand Critical Strike Chance per 10 Maximum Energy Shield on Shield
+4% to Off Hand Critical Strike Multiplier per 10 Maximum Energy Shield on Shield
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
The enslaved Ezomyte clans were not permitted to own weapons.
For years, they trained in secret, watching and waiting for the
perfect moment to reveal the true depth of the Empire's folly.

uniques.name: Self-Flagellation
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% increased Damage per Curse on you
An additional Curse can be applied to you
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText: Beg for forgiveness.

uniques.name: Sentari's Answer
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Punishment when you Block their Melee Damage, ignoring Curse Limit
Curse Enemies with Temporal Chains when you Block their Projectile Attack Damage, ignoring Curse Limit
Curse Enemies with Elemental Weakness when you Block their Spell Damage, ignoring Curse Limit
uniques.flavourText:
Open your eyes and you will see the cracks in your enemy's walls.
Open your mind and you will see the cracks in your enemy's plans.

uniques.name: Serle's Masterwork
explicitModifiers: Can be Enchanted by a Kalguuran Runesmith
Can be Runesmithed as though it were all One Handed Melee Weapon Types
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Truly great Artificers push the boundaries of the possible.

uniques.name: Servant of Decay
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Summon Void Spawn every 4 seconds
(4-6)% of Damage from Hits is taken from Void Spawns' Life before you per Void Spawn
Gain (4-6)% of Non-Chaos Damage as Extra Chaos Damage per Summoned Void Spawn
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Fear in Moment of Trauma
uniques.flavourText:
Eaten away by anxiety and fear,
nothing remained but the void.

uniques.name: Seven Teachings
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Spell on Unarmed Melee Critical Strike, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
(1-7)% more Attack Speed with Unarmed Melee Attacks
+(0.1-0.7) metres to Melee Strike Range with Unarmed Attacks
+(1-7)% to Unarmed Melee Attack Critical Strike Chance
+(10-77)% to Critical Strike Multiplier with Unarmed Melee Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
Those devoted to the Dreamer pursue
perfection of the body and the will.

uniques.name: Seven-League Step
uniques.flavourText:
"Death can be outrun with these, but beware!
In running from death, you may forget to live."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 202

uniques.name: Severed in Sleep
explicitModifiers: Minions have 60% chance to inflict Withered on Hit
Minions have +5% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Withered Debuff on Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Chayula Breach or from Chayula, Who Dreamt
uniques.flavourText:
His lucky thralls dream eternal,
but we must crawl on our own.

uniques.name: Shackles of the Wretched
explicitModifiers: Hexes applied by Socketed Curse Skills are Reflected back to you
You cannot be Chilled for 3 seconds after being Chilled
You cannot be Frozen for 3 seconds after being Frozen
You cannot be Ignited for 3 seconds after being Ignited
You cannot be Shocked for 3 seconds after being Shocked
You grant (4-6) Frenzy Charges to allies on Death
uniques.flavourText: Captivity breeds creativity.

uniques.name: Shade of Solaris
explicitModifiers: Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
200% increased Spell Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds
uniques.flavourText: Without light, there can be no shadow.

uniques.name: Shadows and Dust
explicitModifiers: 0.2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Creates a Smoke Cloud on Rampage
Gain Unholy Might for 3 seconds on Rampage
uniques.flavourText:
What is fear but a snuffed torch
and death in the wind?

uniques.name: Shadowstitch
explicitModifiers: (250-350)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
Recover (3-5)% of Energy Shield on Kill
6% increased Maximum Life for each Corrupted Item Equipped
8% increased Maximum Energy Shield for each Corrupted Item Equipped
-(6-4)% to all Resistances for each Corrupted Item Equipped
uniques.sourceText: Double Corrupting Sacrificial Garb
uniques.flavourText:
Destined for sacrifice,
they were dressed in garments
that blurred the lines between this world
and the next.

uniques.name: Shaper's Seed
explicitModifiers: Nearby Allies gain 4% of Life Regenerated per second
Nearby Allies gain 80% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
uniques.flavourText: The first light to grow in the primordial darkness.

uniques.name: Shaper's Touch
explicitModifiers: 1% increased Melee Physical Damage per 10 Dexterity
uniques.flavourText:
By my hand, the inert is given life.
By my hand, that which rots is reborn.
There is nothing that cannot be changed.
Nothing.

uniques.name: Shattered Chains

The prisoners of the empire raised their shackled hands.
Begging to be delivered from Corruption.
The rebellion smote their chains,
And gave them the freedom to choose corruption for themselves.

uniques.name: Shattershard
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Shield Shatter when you Block
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist

uniques.name: Shavronne's Gambit

Shavronne raced to Brutus' side,
her last hope against the Karui tide.

uniques.name: Shavronne's Pace
explicitModifiers: 20% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life

Left ring slot: Regenerate 40 Mana per Second
Left ring slot: +250 to maximum Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:

Brutus chose the left hand."
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra

Shavronne's apparel became ever more extravagant
as her body and soul became ever more corrupted.

+2% Chance to Block Spell Damage per Power Charge

your Skills have dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder

All at once, a calmness would encompass them,
and all at once, it would be torn away,
unveiling forms no sound mind could grasp.

uniques.name: Shiversting
explicitModifiers: 0.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana

Stoic visage, icy heart.

uniques.name: Shroud of the Lightless

1% increased Maximum Mana per Abyss Jewel affecting you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Amanamu, Liege of the Lightless or Ulaman, Sovereign of the Well
uniques.flavourText: Look to the darkness for nourishment and you will never go hungry.

uniques.name: Sibyl's Lament
explicitModifiers: Adds (8-15) to (20-28) Fire Damage to Attacks
(20-30)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
Left ring slot: 100% of Elemental Hit Damage from you and

uniques.flavourText:
The portrait reflected his pain,
a pain that she could never see.

uniques.name: Sidhebreath
explicitModifiers: Minions convert 50% of Physical Damage to Cold Damage
Minions deal (25-35) to (60-65) additional Cold Damage
uniques.flavourText: The breath of life is yours to give.

uniques.name: Siegebreaker

uniques.flavourText: Poison the land and they'll have nothing to defend.

uniques.name: Sign of the Sin Eater
explicitModifiers: Enemies inflict Elemental Ailments on you instead of nearby Allies
uniques.flavourText: A secret few among the Templars grant absolution by bearing the guilt of others.

uniques.name: Silverbough
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Bow Gems
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"The wild takes care of its own."
- Hyrri of the Karui

uniques.name: Silverbranch
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Bow Gems

uniques.name: Sin Trek
explicitModifiers: Enemies Cannot Leech Life From you

uniques.name: Sin's Rebirth
implicitModifiers: Creates a Smoke Cloud on Use
explicitModifiers: Grants Immunity to Ignite for 4 seconds if used while Ignited

And from the ashes he rose, like a black cloud.
The Sin of one became the Sin of many.

uniques.name: Singularity

In time, all becomes nothing.
We just expedite the process.

uniques.name: Sinvicta's Mettle
explicitModifiers: 2% increased Area of Effect per 25 Rampage Kills
Gain a Frenzy Charge on every 50th Rampage Kill
uniques.flavourText:
War is a thriving infection.
It numbs the heart and eats away at the soul
until only emptiness remains.

uniques.name: Sire of Shards
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems fire Projectiles in a circle
uniques.flavourText: That which was broken may yet break.

uniques.name: Skin of the Loyal
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Chayula Breach or from Chayula, Who Dreamt
uniques.flavourText:
We happily give our limbs.
A net woven to keep safe the bones of the Lords.

uniques.name: Skirmish
explicitModifiers: 0.2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Attack skills can have 1 additional Totem Summoned at a time
uniques.flavourText:
If two great leaders like Lioneye and Kaom
had been on the same side of the battle,
nothing would remain unconquered.

uniques.name: Skullhead
explicitModifiers: Minions have +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage
Minions have +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage
Minions Recover 10% of their Life when they Block

All that was left of the Iron King was his bleached skull.
Yet it was all the Iron King needed.

uniques.name: Skyforth

Stun Threshold is based on 500% of your Mana instead of Life
uniques.flavourText:
The quick die young, the brilliant go mad,
and the powerful stand alone in a wasteland of their own creation.

uniques.name: Skysunder

Ignites you cause are reflected back to you
50% less Duration of Ignites you inflict
Ignites you inflict with this weapon spread to other Enemies within 2.8 metres
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on Fleshrender
uniques.flavourText:
"To the Children of Winter, the Sun was but a myth. While Lundara held Kulemak
impaled, Solerai struck - not at him, but upwards. Her blade pierced the heavens,
and searing light embraced her golden armour. The Sun was real, and it was her."

uniques.name: Slavedriver's Hand
explicitModifiers: Skills used by Traps have (10-20)% increased Area of Effect

Skills which throw Traps Cost Life instead of Mana
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Architect's Hand via Vial of Dominance
uniques.flavourText: A plan without a deadline stays a plan.

uniques.name: Slitherpinch
explicitModifiers: 0.6% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
uniques.flavourText:
A soft caress in dead of night,
that slips about the neck, so tight.

uniques.name: Slivers of Providence
implicitModifiers: 1 to 4 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
explicitModifiers: 50% increased Duration of Elemental Ailments on Enemies
10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
Gain 25% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element

Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Slivertongue

Arrows Pierce all Targets after Forking
Arrows that Pierce have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier
uniques.flavourText: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.

uniques.name: Snakebite

6% increased Accuracy Rating per Frenzy Charge
10% reduced Frenzy Charge Duration per Frenzy Charge
Attacks have 60% chance to Poison while at maximum Frenzy Charges
+5% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Poison per Frenzy Charge
uniques.flavourText:
"As the serpent shuns thought,
It shuns fear.
It strikes with the speed of wrath
And the skill of compulsion."
- Deshret, The Red Sekhema

uniques.name: Snakepit
explicitModifiers: Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Chain
Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells Fork
Right ring slot: Projectiles from Spells Chain +1 times
Right ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Fork
uniques.flavourText:
They wrap around you
until your blood turns as cold as theirs.

uniques.name: Solaris Lorica
explicitModifiers: 25% reduced Chaos Damage taken over time
Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
Give me neither havens nor solace;
They are for the weak and frightened.
Instead, light the path to greatness,
So that I may begin my bright pursuit.

uniques.name: Solerai's Radiance
explicitModifiers: Enemies Blinded by you cannot inflict Damaging Ailments
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on Saresh's Darkness
uniques.flavourText:
"When we first saw the Sun, our eyes were not above,
but on her. She was the burning heart of fury, and the
dead turned to flee. We drove them beneath for all time."

uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Shaper
uniques.flavourText:
Time, like light, can be refracted into all its myriad colours.
The first shade is beautiful, but the last will drive the unwary insane.

uniques.name: Song of the Sirens
uniques.flavourText:
Give a man a fish, and you can feed him for a day.
But give a fish a man, and you can feed it for a month.

uniques.name: Soul Ascension
explicitModifiers: Source: Drops from The Elder (Uber Uber)
Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.5 seconds
+(-10-10) to maximum number of Eaten Souls
uniques.flavourText: Fear can be instilled by the smallest entity.

uniques.name: Soul Catcher
explicitModifiers: (60-80)% increased Critical Strike Chance with Vaal Skills during effect
(60-80)% increased Damage with Vaal Skills during effect
Vaal Skills used during effect have 10% reduced Soul Gain Prevention Duration
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
Freedom is for the privileged, even in death.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of the Ghost

uniques.name: Soul Mantle
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Spell Totem

uniques.flavourText:
The greatest mistakes cause suffering
long after they have been made

- Atalui, Vaal Priestess

uniques.name: Soul Strike

explicitModifiers: Adds (13-18) to (26-32) Chaos Damage to Attacks
80% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
uniques.flavourText:
In this chaotic world
The rewards of the Soul
Outlast the rewards of the Flesh.

uniques.name: Soul Tether
explicitModifiers: Gain (4-6)% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield

Vaal bloodpriests were among the earliest intellectuals on record.
It was they who found that a newly freed soul would
desperately cling to any other source of life.

Candles with the brightest light
Bring life to death and day to night.
But lovely as the glow may seem,
Their light is fleeting, as a dream...

Our souls are eternally bound by the sacrifices we have made."

Thousands gazed upon the doors of the great labyrinth,
at an Eternal Champion in steel and gold,
The first to challenge its treacherous traps.
To mark the occasion, Izaro had the Champion's remains gilded.

Enacting a grand vision requires cold-hearted sacrifice.
The loyal must be no more than fodder against the unwilling.

uniques.name: Spire of Stone

The strongest Karui tribes left the longest impressions on the land.
Their symbols served as guidance many generations
after their creators had been buried deep beneath the earth.

uniques.name: Spirit Guards
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Animate Weapon can Animate up to 20 Ranged Weapons
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Long after the Karui passed through,
the whispers of those who stood their ground
at Lioneye's Watch could be heard amongst the rubble.

uniques.name: Spirited Response

uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The Purity Rebels fought with heart and soul,
To free their empire from corruption.
And the fires of war did merely serve,
To temper the steel of their spirits.

uniques.name: Splinter of the Moon
explicitModifiers: 4% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Split Personality

uniques.sourceText: Drops from the Simulacrum Encounter

uniques.name: Sporeguard

You have Fungal Ground around you while stationary
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
Shrouded in seed, a conduit of contagion,
yet the source of septicity remains unknown.

The Cataclysm was but the first act in a play of horrors.
The dead lingered, and the living began to rot.

uniques.name: Springleaf
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 100 Life per Second while on Low Life

uniques.name: Squirming Terror

uniques.flavourText:
Madness crawls under the skin,
bursting forth from the flesh.

uniques.name: Star of Wraeclast
explicitModifiers: 60% increased Area of Effect of Hex Skills
You cannot be Cursed with Silence
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
"I offer to you an eternal oath
that binds your heart to mine;
a bond that not even death will break.
Will you accept?"
- Daresso, to his beloved

uniques.name: Starcaller
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Starfall on Melee Critical Strike
Gain (40-60)% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Fear in Moment of Trauma
uniques.flavourText: What began in the stars was settled in blood, beneath an uncaring sky.

uniques.name: Starforge
explicitModifiers: 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Shaper (Uber)

uniques.name: Starkonja's Head
explicitModifiers: 50% reduced Damage when on Low Life
150% increased Global Evasion Rating when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
There was no hero made out of Starkonja's death,
but merely a long sleep made eternal.

uniques.name: Starlight Chalice
explicitModifiers: Inflict Fire, Cold and Lightning Exposure on nearby Enemies when used

uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uhtred, Covetous Traitor in Expedition Logbook
uniques.flavourText:
Uhtred and his priests drank of the skies
to empower runes... and themselves.

uniques.name: Stasis Prison
explicitModifiers: (80-100)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Unrelenting Domain of Timeless Conflict
uniques.flavourText: Those that can never die have but one wish.

uniques.name: Static Electricity
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 2 Lightning Damage to Attacks

uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"Movement expends energy, but perhaps a little of that energy
can be recaptured and... reappropriated."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

uniques.name: Steel Spirit
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, each Spectral Throw Projectile gains 5% increased Damage each time it Hits
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The Sekhema rode to the mountain,
With her tribe, devoted and strong.
And sewed shut the mouth of nightmare,
So that it would not consume her world.

uniques.name: Steelworm
explicitModifiers: Attacks that Fire Projectiles Consume up to 1 additional Steel Shard

uniques.flavourText: The dance of metal and flesh never ends.

uniques.name: Steppan Eard
explicitModifiers: 20% increased Movement Speed on Shocked Ground
Regenerate 2% of Life per second on Chilled Ground
uniques.flavourText:
To fight an enemy on their lands is a tactical mistake.
Make those lands your own, and the mistake becomes theirs.

uniques.name: Stone of Lazhwar
uniques.flavourText:
You are slow, foolish and ignorant.
I am not.

uniques.name: Storm Cloud
uniques.flavourText:
Centuries of development in steel armoursmithing
turned the armies of the Eternal Empire
into very effective lightning rods.

uniques.name: Storm Prison
implicitModifiers: Adds (1-2) to (9-11) Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitModifiers: (25-35)% chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
You can never truly tame the tempest.
You can barely even leash it.

uniques.name: Storm Secret

Take 250 Lightning Damage when Herald of Thunder Hits an Enemy
uniques.flavourText: Lightning lives in an endless circle.

uniques.name: Storm's Gift
explicitModifiers: Shocks you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres
uniques.flavourText: The power of lightning is a power best shared.

uniques.name: Stormcharger
uniques.flavourText: Like lightning, the Ezomyte cavalry need never strike twice.

uniques.name: Stormfire

Adds (1-3) to (62-70) Lightning Damage to Hits against Ignited Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
When your skin sloughs, and your blood cooks,
you'll wish the lightning strike had killed you.

uniques.name: Stormseeker

(60-100)% increased Effect of Shocks you inflict while Leeching Energy Shield
Unaffected by Chill while Leeching Mana
Unaffected by Shock while Leeching Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
The fundamental forces of our world are secrets
to be uncovered by the intelligent and the capable.
Like all secrets, they, too, can be stolen.

uniques.name: Stormshroud
explicitModifiers: Modifiers to Chance to Avoid being Shocked apply to all Elemental Ailments
uniques.flavourText:
The true secret of the elements
is that all are one and the same.

uniques.name: Story of the Vaal
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage from Hits with this Weapon is Converted to a random Element
Hits with this Weapon always Ignite, Freeze, and Shock
Hits with this Weapon Freeze Enemies as though dealing (150-200)% more Damage
Hits with this Weapon Shock Enemies as though dealing (150-200)% more Damage
Ignites inflicted with this Weapon deal (50-75)% more Damage
uniques.sourceText: Opening Fireproof Chest in Crucible of Flame
uniques.flavourText:
Through war we found peace. Through death we found advancement.
Our ancestors did not know where their actions would take them.
Are we any better?

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Fate

uniques.name: Stranglegasp
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blight-ravaged Maps
uniques.flavourText: Death's approach brings clarity.

uniques.name: String of Servitude
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
For the Vaal, the relationship between slave and master
was as intimate and volatile as that of lovers.

uniques.name: Sublime Vision
explicitModifiers: Source: Drops from The Elder (Uber Uber) or The Shaper (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
This world is not good enough for her,
so I will make a better one. Nothing
matters but the pursuit of perfection.

uniques.name: Sudden Dawn
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% chance for Energy Shield Recharge to start when you Kill an Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Black Star
uniques.flavourText:
Where that searing dawn fell, silence reigned.
We sought the shadows, but none remained.

uniques.name: Sudden Ignition
explicitModifiers: Ignited Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
After years of subterfuge, sabotage, and sacrifice,
Sarn had become a powder keg just waiting to explode.
Finally, Victario lit the match.

uniques.name: Sunblast
explicitModifiers: Skills which Throw Traps throw up to 2 additional Traps
Traps cannot be triggered by Enemies
Traps from Skills are thrown randomly around targeted location
uniques.flavourText:
The sun's fury, trapped
in pillars of blazing light,
Explodes from its cage.

uniques.name: Sunspite
explicitModifiers: Regenerate (75-125) Life per second while Ignited
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Blazing body, shining bold.
Dance beneath the orb of gold!

uniques.name: Surgebinders
explicitModifiers: (4-7)% increased Elemental Damage per Frenzy Charge
(4-7)% increased Physical Damage per Endurance Charge
(4-7)% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge
10% chance to Steal Power, Frenzy, and Endurance Charges on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
Your lies are our strength.
Your threats are our laughter.
Your hate is our infinity
The fire rises!

uniques.name: Survival Instincts
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Observe and master your surroundings.

uniques.name: Survival Secrets
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Nature provides its own solutions.

uniques.name: Survival Skills
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: A helping hand has long reach.

uniques.name: Survivor's Guilt
uniques.sourceText: Purchase from Ritual Reward
uniques.flavourText:
The burden falls heaviest not on those that died,
but on those that did not.

uniques.name: Svalinn
explicitModifiers: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
uniques.flavourText:
The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

uniques.name: Tainted Pact
explicitModifiers: (2-3)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
(1-1.5)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Taking Chaos Damage over Time heals you instead while Leeching Life
uniques.flavourText:
Beidat made false promises to many denizens,
converting only one into a conduit through
which Wraeclast might be consumed.

uniques.name: Tanu Ahi
explicitModifiers: (2-3)% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
10% chance to gain Adrenaline for 2 Seconds when Leech is
10% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 Seconds when Leech is
uniques.flavourText:
There is no greater thrill than leaping into combat,
slashing and hewing with utmost abandon.

uniques.name: Taproot
explicitModifiers: 0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana against Poisoned Enemies
0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life against Maimed Enemies
uniques.flavourText: Some things must die so that others can live.

uniques.name: Taryn's Shiver
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of all Cold Spell Skill Gems
Enemies Frozen by you take 20% increased Damage
uniques.flavourText:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.

uniques.name: Tasalio's Sign
explicitModifiers: Adds (7-10) to (15-20) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds 40 to 60 Cold Damage against Chilled Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
A gift from Tasalio, God of Water,
to the chieftain Rakiata.
Kaom took Rakiata's head and hand
so that his warriors' axes might rise and fall like the waves.

uniques.name: Taste of Hate
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% of Fire and Lightning Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage during Effect
Gain (10-15)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage during effect
30% chance to Avoid being Chilled during Effect
30% chance to Avoid being Frozen during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
A sip will freeze your lips,
A swig will chill your heart,
A glass will still your soul.

uniques.name: Tavukai
explicitModifiers: Summon Raging Spirit has (20-30)% increased Duration
Summoned Raging Spirits deal (25-40)% increased Damage
Summoned Raging Spirits have (25-40)% increased maximum Life
Summoned Raging Spirits take 20% of their Maximum Life per second as Chaos Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"Hyrri and her arrows broke the sacred code, damning herself.
Kaom seized her sacrifice, and in doing so, seized victory."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: Tawhanuku's Timing
explicitModifiers: (5-10)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
Spells cause you to gain Energy Shield equal to their Upfront
Cost every fifth time you Pay it
uniques.flavourText: The soul still beats, even when the heart never did.

uniques.name: Tawhoa's Felling
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Tawhoa's Chosen when you Attack with
a Non-Vaal Slam or Strike Skill near an Enemy
(20-30)% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with this Weapon
uniques.flavourText:
Strike with the might of a falling oak,
and know that you never stand alone.

uniques.name: Tear of Purity
explicitModifiers: Grants Level 10 Purity of Elements Skill
uniques.flavourText:
A shimmering symbol of Purity, clear as water,
but I know better than most how quickly
Purity can succumb to Corruption.
How quickly water turns to blood.
- Victario, the People's Poet

uniques.name: Tecrod's Gaze
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Main Hand Critical Strike Chance per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 200%
+20% to Off Hand Critical Strike Multiplier per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +100%
uniques.flavourText: The Hated Slave seeks dominion over his own kind.

uniques.name: Tempered Flesh
explicitModifiers: -1 Strength per 1 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% increased Life Recovery Rate per 10 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
We are born raw and untested, and we are shaped by life.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence

uniques.name: Tempered Mind
explicitModifiers: -1 Intelligence per 1 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% increased Mana Recovery Rate per 10 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
Any thought, no matter how fleeting, changes the thinker.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence

uniques.name: Tempered Spirit
explicitModifiers: -1 Dexterity per 1 Dexterity on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% increased Movement Speed per 10 Dexterity on Allocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Vaal Omnitect
uniques.flavourText:
Though the body rots, the spirit lives on.

This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence

uniques.name: Temptation Step
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Damage for each Poison on you up to a maximum of 75%
10% increased Movement Speed for each Poison on you up to a maximum of 50%
Poison you inflict with Travel Skills is Reflected to you if you
have fewer than 5 Poisons on you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Trialmaster
uniques.flavourText:
The High Priests ensured the loyalty of their slaves by habituating
them to narcotic stimulants with lethal withdrawals.

uniques.name: Terminus Est
explicitModifiers: Gain a Frenzy Charge on Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
His final sensation was of the executioner's blade.
It was not cold, instead warm and reassuring,
murmuring a promise of better times ahead.
Smiling, he returned death's embrace.

uniques.name: The Admiral
explicitModifiers: (10-25)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
Elemental Damage you Deal with Hits is Resisted by lowest Elemental Resistance instead
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Admiral Darnaw in Contract: Death to Darnaw
uniques.flavourText:
The Oriathans built their empire on naval mobility, which allowed
them to wage war wherever their enemy was weakest.

uniques.name: The Adorned
explicitModifiers: (0-100)% increased Effect of Jewel Socket Passive Skills containing Corrupted Magic Jewels
uniques.sourceText: Vaal Aspect Combination
uniques.flavourText:
At their height, the Vaal glittered under the sun.
A decade, a century, an aeon of prosperity...
now nothing more than a passing wonder.

uniques.name: The Anima Stone
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems if you have 3 Primordial Items Socketed or Equipped
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
All revere the earth they walk,
For it wields strength beyond compare,
Holds knowledge more than thought,
Stands long after all else falls.

uniques.name: The Annihilating Light
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Deal Triple Damage with Elemental Skills
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
There is no force more destructive in the heavens
than the scintillating light of utter clarity.

uniques.name: The Anticipation
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Uul-Netol Breach or from Uul-Netol, Unburdened Flesh
uniques.flavourText:
We are within her reach,
and when the time is right,
she will reach into us.

uniques.name: The Anvil
explicitModifiers: +3% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
Reflects 240 to 300 Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.flavourText: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.

uniques.name: The Apostate
explicitModifiers: Gain Maximum Life instead of Maximum Energy Shield from Equipped Armour Items
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Synthete Nightmare in The Cortex (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
When I finally rejected my faith entirely, my stagnant belief
became thick white blood, as choking as it was nourishing.

uniques.name: The Arkhon's Tools
explicitModifiers: (10-20)% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
Summon Skitterbots also summons a Scorching Skitterbot
Summoned Skitterbots' Auras affect you as well as Enemies
(50-75)% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments inflicted by Summoned Skitterbots
(15-25)% increased Trap and Mine Throwing Speed
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
Motion, purpose... craft. The fruits of my mind laboured
to build my wildest imaginings, never tiring, never faltering.
Life... or something like it, engineered in its image.

uniques.name: The Ascetic
explicitModifiers: (80-100)% increased Rarity of Items found with a Normal Item Equipped
(10-15)% increased Quantity of Items found with a Magic Item Equipped
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Many things come to one who has nothing.

uniques.name: The Aylardex
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Mana Regeneration Rate per Power Charge
1% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life per Power Charge
40% reduced Critical Strike Chance per Power Charge
uniques.flavourText:
Shackled fires dance about;
Might within from force without.

uniques.name: The Bandit Lord's Band
explicitModifiers: (25-35)% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sasan, the Bandit Lord
uniques.flavourText:
"Sasan tells a tale of robbery, and accosting a
Bardiyan princeling on the road. If that were
true, why hasn't he sold the damn thing already?
Why does he still wear it like a shameful secret?"

uniques.name: The Bane of Hope
explicitModifiers: +(28-35)% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier
(15-30)% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks
Trigger Level 20 Tears of Rot when Equipped
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mirage encounter
uniques.flavourText:
"Hope? There is no such thing! We are all rotting flesh,
stuck here on this world to torture each other. Hope
is a mistake, and we will show you its folly."
- Batoor, of the Afarud

uniques.name: The Baron
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
Half of your Strength is added to your Minions
+1 to maximum number of Raised Zombies per 500 Strength
With at least 1000 Strength, (1.5-2)% of Damage dealt by your Raised Zombies is Leeched to you as Life
uniques.flavourText:
"The Emperor's trusted surgeons are not the only ones who
practice the dark arts. Some of us are just more discreet."

uniques.name: The Battle Within
implicitModifiers: Gain 3 Rage on Melee Weapon Hit
explicitModifiers: Does not inflict Mana Burn over time
Inflicts Mana Burn on you when you Hit an Enemy with a Melee Weapon
(1-5)% increased Rarity of Items found per Mana Burn, up to a maximum of 100%
Melee Weapon Attacks have Culling Strike
uniques.flavourText: The struggle for balance never ends.

uniques.name: The Beast Fur Shawl
uniques.flavourText:
The quickest way to understand
your own strengths and weaknesses
is to walk in the skin of another.

uniques.name: The Black Cane
explicitModifiers: Each Summoned Phantasm grants you Phantasmal Might
uniques.flavourText: Lead the army of the damned from the front.

uniques.name: The Blood Dance
explicitModifiers: 2% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
4% reduced Attack and Cast Speed per Frenzy Charge
Regenerate 0.8% of Life per second per Frenzy Charge
(20-30)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
(20-30)% increased Damage per Frenzy Charge with Hits against Enemies on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
"Sharks thrash and swirl
To the pounding drum of their frenzied hearts
As they dance in the waters red."
-Lavianga, Guardian of the Karui Way

uniques.name: The Blood Reaper
explicitModifiers: 1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
50% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
To cease the flow of blood is to
choke the rain in the very clouds.
Both life and land feel the thirst.

uniques.name: The Blood Thorn
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
+12% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Reflects (22-44) Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Block
uniques.flavourText: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.

uniques.name: The Blue Dream
explicitModifiers: Gain (6-10)% of Lightning Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Chayula Breach or from Chayula, Who Dreamt
uniques.flavourText:
We crash against Chayula's body,
and fall like rain into the place we cannot go.

uniques.name: The Blue Nightmare
explicitModifiers: Gain (6-10)% of Lightning Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Chance to Block Spell Damage at 50% of its value
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Blue Dream using Blessing of Chayula
uniques.flavourText:
We swell and flood
and drown the undeserving beneath our might.

uniques.name: The Brass Dome
explicitModifiers: Strength provides no bonus to Maximum Life
Take no Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
uniques.flavourText: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.

uniques.name: The Brine Crown
explicitModifiers: 15% chance to create Chilled Ground when Hit with an Attack
uniques.flavourText:
Greatest is the Brine King's domain,
and every day it grows a little greater,
not through force, but patience.

uniques.name: The Bringer of Rain
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Melee Physical Damage
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Faster Attacks
Socketed Gems are supported by Level 30 Blind
Adds 20 to 30 Physical Damage to Attacks
20% chance to gain an Endurance Charge when you Block
uniques.flavourText:
"What lies beneath your feet?!"
"Sacred ground, watered with tears of blood!"

uniques.name: The Broken Crown
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 20 Cast on Death
20% increased Damage when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText: Every rule has an exception.

uniques.name: The Broken Elegy
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Trigger level 25 Ceaseless Flesh once every second
When a nearby Minion dies, gain Rotten Bulwark equal to (7-9)% of its maximum Life
Minions gain (59-83)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saresh, of the Weeping Black
uniques.flavourText:
Before they 'saved' their beloved leader, the Afarud
tested their ritual on a dying man... but they made
a fatal mistake. They did not bind him to an object.

uniques.name: The Burden of Shadows
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Lifetap
explicitModifiers: Spells deal added Chaos Damage equal to (15-20)% of your maximum Life
uniques.flavourText:
Nothingness is loathe to relinquish its grip.
Every moment is a struggle to exist.

uniques.name: The Burden of Truth
explicitModifiers: 33% of Non-Chaos Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
33% of Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield
Gain (5-10)% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
uniques.flavourText:
Mortal pleasures can hold back the memories,
but a hollow soul can never be healed.

uniques.name: The Caged Mammoth
explicitModifiers: Adds (6-10) to (16-22) Physical Damage to Attacks
5% less Damage taken per 5 Rage, up to a maximum of 30%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Fear in Moment of Trauma
uniques.flavourText:
The Cyclops of Trarthus became the star
of the Oriath Arena, but he was merely
biding his time, waiting for his chance...

uniques.name: The Cauteriser
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Strength Gems
Trigger Level 5 Gore Shockwave on Melee Hit if you have at least 150 Strength
Gain 70% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Swinging through the air, it sings
of sundered, severed, missing things.

uniques.name: The Celestial Brace
explicitModifiers: Melee Hits from Strike Skills Fortify
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Searing Exarch (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Forged from the heart of the densest star,
your courage will fail long before it does.

uniques.name: The Coming Calamity
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Herald Gems
35% chance to avoid being Stunned for each Herald Buff affecting you
Mana Reservation of Herald Skills is always 45%
uniques.flavourText:
Whiff of cold, tiny spark, faintest flicker in the dark.
Embers swirl, ice takes form, sky exposed - Death's perfect storm.
Frost and thunder, flames shine bright, ruin walks the land tonight.
By your hand they dance and bend, wield them and brook no end.

uniques.name: The Consuming Dark
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Fire Spell Skill Gems
30% of Fire Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Your Chaos Damage has 60% chance to Poison Enemies
uniques.flavourText: The brightest flames cast the darkest shadows.

uniques.name: The Covenant
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 29 Added Chaos Damage
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 100% of Base Mana Cost
uniques.flavourText:
My Soul is your Strength
My Price is your Blood

uniques.name: The Crimson Storm
explicitModifiers: 50% chance to inflict Bleeding on Critical Strike with Attacks
Enemies you inflict Bleeding on grant (60-100)% increased Flask Charges
Adds (100-120) to (150-165) Physical Damage against Bleeding Enemies
50% chance to Maim Enemies on Critical Strike with Attacks
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Fortification Leaders in Safehouses
uniques.flavourText:
"There were no survivors. It had only been fired twice."
- Order of the Djinn inscription

uniques.name: The Dancing Dervish
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 15 Manifest Dancing Dervishes on Rampage
Manifested Dancing Dervishes disables both weapon slots
Manifested Dancing Dervishes die when Rampage ends
Melee Hits count as Rampage Kills

uniques.name: The Dancing Duo
explicitModifiers: Triggers Level 15 Manifest Dancing Dervishes on Rampage
Manifested Dancing Dervishes disables both weapon slots
Manifested Dancing Dervishes die when Rampage ends
Melee Hits count as Rampage Kills
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Take your partners by the hand,
Keep your steps in time.
Swing together, spin apart,
And dance with death sublime.

uniques.name: The Dark Monarch
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
Maximum number of Animated Weapons is Doubled
Cannot have Minions other than Animated Weapons
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
"Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

uniques.name: The Dark Seer
explicitModifiers: 7% Global chance to Blind Enemies on hit
Gain 1 Mana on Kill per Level
Gain 1 Energy Shield on Kill per Level
Enemies Blinded by you have Malediction
uniques.flavourText:
Feed on the light of the living,
Bring darkness to all I see,
Until we are one in shadow.

uniques.name: The Deep One's Hide
explicitModifiers: Adds 4 to 8 Physical Damage to Attacks
Adds 12 to 15 Cold Damage to Attacks
Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Block
uniques.flavourText:
The thicker the shell,
the greater the beast that hunts it.

uniques.name: The Desecrated Chalice
explicitModifiers: (0.4-0.5)% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
Gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike
Gain (40-75)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage if you've used an Amethyst Flask Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Mirage encounter
uniques.flavourText:
"All men must drink. Deny us water,
and we shall have blood instead."
- Rukh, of the Afarud

uniques.name: The Devourer of Minds
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
Minions have the same maximum number of Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges as you
Minions count as having the same number of
Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges as you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
The Decay infects thought itself, leaving nothing
but hollow husks filled with virulent void...

uniques.name: The Devouring Diadem
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems have 40% reduced Reservation Efficiency
Trigger Level 15 Feast of Flesh every 5 seconds
10% chance for Energy Shield Recharge to start when you use a Skill
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Catarina, Master of Undeath
uniques.flavourText: The spirit hungers for the flesh.

uniques.name: The Druggery
explicitModifiers: Life Flasks gain 1 Charge every 3 seconds
100% of Life Recovery from Flasks is applied to nearby Allies instead of You
uniques.flavourText:
"This will help with the pain.
One for you... and one for me."
- Doctor 'Shaky Hands' Opden

uniques.name: The Effigon
explicitModifiers: Adds 12 to 24 Fire Damage to Attacks
Your Hits can't be Evaded by Blinded Enemies
Damage Penetrates 10% Fire Resistance against Blinded Enemies
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: The light that reveals is the glare that blinds.

uniques.name: The Embalmer
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Vile Toxins
uniques.flavourText:
"Decomposition takes hold too quickly!
No, if we are to keep the specimen in perfect shape,
we must begin the process before expiry."

uniques.name: The Enmity Divine
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are supported by Level 1 Chance to Bleed
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Harbinger of Brutality Skill
+5% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+(60-80)% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding from Critical Strikes
uniques.sourceText: Created from item parts obtained from Boss in The Beachhead

uniques.name: The Ephemeral Bond
explicitModifiers: +(30-40)% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've gained a Power Charge Recently
(1-2) to (36-40) Lightning Damage per Power Charge
uniques.flavourText:
For how little time they had together,
their love was all the more powerful.

uniques.name: The Eternal Apple
explicitModifiers: Trigger a Socketed Warcry Skill on losing Endurance Charges, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
You lose all Endurance Charges on reaching maximum Endurance Charges
uniques.flavourText:
The empire is both the tree and the fruit.
It provides safe harbour as ideas grow within,
and when the time is right, the apple is picked.
The idea, and our ideals, take root.

uniques.name: The Eternal Struggle
implicitModifiers: 9% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
explicitModifiers: Critical Strikes inflict Malignant Madness if The Eater of Worlds is dominant
Kill Enemies that have 15% or lower Life on Hit if The Searing Exarch is dominant
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Black Star or The Infinite Hunger
uniques.flavourText: Simply the way it must be, so that existence may be.

uniques.name: The Eternity Shroud
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Glimpse of Eternity when Hit
Gain (3-5)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage per Shaper Item Equipped
Hits ignore Enemy Monster Chaos Resistance if all Equipped Items are Shaper Items
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Elder (Uber)
uniques.flavourText: There can be no defence against the celestial siblings entropy and time.

uniques.name: The Felbog Fang
explicitModifiers: Enemies Cursed by you are Hindered if 25% of Curse Duration expired
Your Curses have 25% increased Effect if 50% of Curse Duration expired
Enemies Cursed by you take 35% increased Damage if 75% of Curse Duration expired
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Namharim, Born of Night in The Sacred Grove
uniques.flavourText: Death creeps closer; unseen, inexorable, hungry.

uniques.name: The Flame of Hope
explicitModifiers: Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit against Enemies with 5 Cinderflame, applying -25% to Fire Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on The Bane of Hope
uniques.flavourText:
"So long as a single flame flickers, our akhara lives.
And when there is nothing left to give to the fire,
we shall burn the enemy for warmth!"
- Varashta, the Winter Sekhema

uniques.name: The Flawed Refuge
explicitModifiers: You take 100% of Elemental Damage from Blocked Hits
40% of Elemental Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The Wildwood was a gift, meant as a haven
against the Winter of the World.

uniques.name: The Fledgling
explicitModifiers: Projectiles cannot collide with Enemies in Close Range
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Nashta, The Usurper in Contract: Heart of Glory
uniques.flavourText:
The single well-placed arrow that changes the world
must be preceded by ten thousand practice shots.

uniques.name: The Flow Untethered
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Harbinger of Time Skill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable

uniques.name: The Formless Flame
explicitModifiers: Source: Drops in Xoph Breach or from Xoph, Dark Embers
Upgrade: Upgrades to The Formless Inferno using Blessing of Xoph
Armour is increased by Overcapped Fire Resistance
uniques.flavourText:
Our skin turns to ash
and we are swallowed by his brilliant red light.

uniques.name: The Formless Inferno
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Infernal Legion
Minion Life is increased by their Overcapped Fire Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Formless Flame using Blessing of Xoph
uniques.flavourText: He burns us to keep us from harm.

uniques.name: The Fourth Vow
explicitModifiers: Armour also applies to Chaos Damage taken from Hits
Physical Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
uniques.flavourText:
Seek not to avoid the mortal pains of this world.
In flagellation, there lies freedom from temptation.

uniques.name: The Fracturing Spinner
implicitModifiers: Adds (7-9) to (13-16) Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Harbinger of Directions Skill
Adds (19-22) to (30-35) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds (19-22) to (30-35) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable

uniques.name: The Front Line
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
Once you begin to rely on your weapons,
You ensure you can't live without them.

uniques.name: The Fulcrum
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: (0-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
(0-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
(0-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Elemental Ailments you inflict are Reflected to you
Elemental Damage with Hits is Lucky while you are Shocked
Damage Penetrates (8-10)% Elemental Resistances while you are Chilled
Gain (30-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element while you are Ignited
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
To stand at the confluence of the elements,
the master must achieve perfect balance.

uniques.name: The Geomantic Gyre
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: Has a Crucible Passive Skill Tree with only Support Passive Skills
Crucible Passive Skill Tree is removed if this Modifier is removed
uniques.flavourText:
For their mortal allies, the last Titans forged a mighty staff,
one that could safely hold the first unearthed virtue gem.

uniques.name: The Ghastly Theatre
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems
Triggers Level 20 Physical Aegis when Equipped
Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
(8-15)% increased Attack and Cast Speed while Physical Aegis is depleted
(50-70)% increased Critical Strike Chance while Physical Aegis is depleted
Nearby Enemies are Blinded while Physical Aegis is not depleted
uniques.flavourText:
Never let the audience know your true form. Misdirect them,
beguile them. Strike when they least expect it.

uniques.name: The Gluttonous Tide
explicitModifiers: Lose all Frenzy Charges on reaching Maximum Frenzy Charges to make the next Bow Attack you perform fire that many additional Arrows
+(30-50)% Global Critical Strike Multiplier while you have a Frenzy Charge
(20-40)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge for each Enemy you hit with a Critical Strike
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Eater of Worlds
uniques.flavourText:
To eat, to feast, to forget the horror of endless agonising existence
if but for a moment... only to disgorge and do it all again...

uniques.name: The Goddess Bound
implicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Melee Gems
explicitModifiers: 30% increased Movement Speed when on Low Life
uniques.flavourText:
She paints her offer in wicked hues
An off-white grin, an elegant bruise.
To the nascent scourge she sings the ruse:
"With me in hand, what else need you use?"

uniques.name: The Goddess Scorned
explicitModifiers: 100% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Ignites you inflict deal Damage 50% faster
You can only deal Damage with this Weapon or Ignite
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
Her purpose seems done; the oath is fulfilled.
Rust dulls her smirk with the last demon killed.
The embers grow dim and yet hope burns her lips:
"An old flame renewed can define our eclipse!"

uniques.name: The Goddess Unleashed
explicitModifiers: Gain (66-99)% of Sword Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
