Gain Her Blessing for 3 seconds when you Ignite an Enemy
33% chance to Blind nearby Enemies when gaining Her Blessing
100% chance to Avoid being Ignited, Chilled or Frozen with Her Blessing
20% increased Attack and Movement Speed with Her Blessing
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
As a maiden I was bound; as a crone was I scorned
Promised power rarely found, delivered fury fairly thorned.
Not enough?...Fine. Now I am become both and another
To take your hand and cradle your talents, not smother
The consummate flames. So hush, dear, say not a word.
Bequeathed, betrayed...beloved. At last, I am the third.

uniques.name: The Golden Charlatan
explicitModifiers: Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
"He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

uniques.name: The Golden Rule
explicitModifiers: Bleeding you inflict is Reflected to you
+1% to Chaos Resistance per Poison on you
Poison you inflict is Reflected to you if you have fewer than 100 Poisons on you
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Viridian Jewel
uniques.flavourText: Hurt as you would be hurt.

uniques.name: The Green Dream
explicitModifiers: Gain (6-10)% of Cold Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Chayula Breach or from Chayula, Who Dreamt
uniques.flavourText:
We climb like vines up Chayula's arms,
reaching into the world that should be ours.

uniques.name: The Green Nightmare
explicitModifiers: Gain (6-10)% of Cold Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Chance to Suppress Spell Damage at 70% of its value
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Green Dream using Blessing of Chayula
uniques.flavourText:
We take root in the dirt
and strangle those who tread upon it.

uniques.name: The Grey Spire
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
uniques.flavourText:
There was never a simpler time.
Just simpler motivations.

uniques.name: The Grey Wind
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon have Added Fire Damage equal to (8-12)% of Player's Maximum Life
Each Rage also grants +2% to Fire Damage Over Time Multiplier
Nearby Enemies have Fire Exposure while at maximum Rage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
Silence fell... we gazed upon high.
The Red Pyre flared, palms wide.
Ash-laden gales scoured our flesh.
Four screams became one roar.

uniques.name: The Gryphon
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 2 Chance to Flee
15% increased Movement Speed if you've Killed Recently
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
The eagle knows nothing
but the scream and the strike.

uniques.name: The Gull
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
uniques.flavourText:
"It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

uniques.name: The Halcyon
explicitModifiers: Freezes you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres
60% increased Damage if you've Frozen an Enemy Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Tul Breach or from Tul, Creeping Avalanche
uniques.flavourText:
We wait, still as the dead,
to join the great avalanche.

uniques.name: The Hallowed Monarch
explicitModifiers: Link Skills can target Damageable Minions
Your Linked Minions take (65-75)% less Damage
On Killing a Rare monster, a random Linked Minion gains its Modifiers for 60 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Uber Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
"I don't judge who you are, Saresh. I judge what you do. True leadership
comes from fighting alongside those you command, from elevating them,
and sharing the glory of victory. This, you will never understand."
- Sekhema Orbala, to be crowned Garukhan

uniques.name: The Hand of Phrecia
explicitModifiers: (20-40)% increased Effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills while you have a Linked Target
Linked Targets always count as in range of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
Non-Curse Auras from your Skills only apply to you and Linked Targets
uniques.flavourText:
To drive back the darkness, to bring peace,
we must fight side by side as brothers.

uniques.name: The Harvest
explicitModifiers: 1.2% of Damage Leeched as Life on Critical Strike
3% increased Global Critical Strike Chance per Level
Gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike
uniques.flavourText:
Let it grow and gather inside them,
Let it flow through their veins.
Don't waste a drop.

uniques.name: The Hateful Accuser
implicitModifiers: 50% increased Elemental Ailment Duration on you
50% reduced Effect of Curses on you
uniques.flavourText: In truth, they point the finger at themselves.

uniques.name: The Hidden Blade
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Unseen Strike every 0.5 seconds while Phasing
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText:
The shadow warrior moves like the wind;
his strikes land long after he is gone.

uniques.name: The Highwayman
explicitModifiers: Steal Power, Frenzy, and Endurance Charges on Hit
Total Recovery per second from Life Leech is Doubled
uniques.flavourText: Somebody does have to get hurt.

uniques.name: The Hungry Loop
explicitModifiers: Consumes Socketed Uncorrupted Support Gems when they reach Maximum Level
uniques.flavourText: Be careful where you put your finger.

uniques.name: The Ignomon
explicitModifiers: Adds (18-24) to (32-40) Fire Damage to Attacks

uniques.name: The Immortal Will
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Focus Skill
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Unshattered Will via Specularity Scroll

uniques.name: The Infinite Pursuit
explicitModifiers: Source: Drops in Uul-Netol Breach or from Uul-Netol, Unburdened Flesh
Upgrade: Upgrades to The Red Trail using Blessing of Uul-Netol
Moving while Bleeding doesn't cause you to take extra Damage
50% chance to be inflicted with Bleeding when Hit by an Attack
uniques.flavourText: We move to be closer to her, but the distance yet grows.

uniques.name: The Interrogation
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
Pain is a fine motivator,
But if you seek the truth,
Fear of pain unknown has no parallel.

uniques.name: The Iron Fortress
explicitModifiers: +1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 50 Strength
Chance to Block Spell Damage is Unlucky
Strength's Damage Bonus instead grants 3% increased Melee
uniques.flavourText:
"The Council have a great many secrets.
Some are better kept that way, Cospri."
- Mauritius, the Iron Heart

uniques.name: The Iron Mass
explicitModifiers: Summoned Skeleton Warriors and Soldiers wield this Weapon while in your Main Hand
Summoned Skeleton Warriors and Soldiers deal Triple Damage with this
Weapon if you've Hit with this Weapon Recently
uniques.sourceText: Steal from a Curio Display during a Grand Heist
uniques.flavourText: Lead by example.

uniques.name: The Ivory Tower
explicitModifiers: +30 to maximum Energy Shield per 100 Reserved Life
Regenerate 2% of Energy Shield per second
Chaos Damage is taken from Mana before Life
uniques.flavourText: The mind is a filter through which anarchy becomes order.

uniques.name: The Jinxed Juju
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
10% of Damage from Hits is taken from your Raised Spectres' Life before you

uniques.name: The Light of Meaning
explicitModifiers: Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to maximum Life
uniques.sourceText: King of The Mists
uniques.flavourText: Faith given under false pretenses still carries the same power.

uniques.name: The Living Blade
explicitModifiers: You can have an additional Tincture active
10% chance to remove 1 Mana Burn on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
Green-cloaked travelers emerged from the mists, planted a tree,
and named it Lorrata. Its strongest root became a weapon...

uniques.name: The Long Winter
explicitModifiers: With 40 Intelligence in Radius, Glacial Cascade has an additional Burst
With 40 Intelligence in Radius, 20% of Glacial Cascade Physical Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
In the years that followed the twisted sky,
cold winds cloaked Wraeclast in snow.
The pure-white blanket masked a black heart
that lay dormant deep beneath the earth.

uniques.name: The Magnate
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to deal Double Damage while you have at least 200 Strength
5% chance to deal Triple Damage while you have at least 400 Strength
uniques.flavourText:
Few men cast a longer shadow
than the Great Meginord of the North.

uniques.name: The Monastery Bell
explicitModifiers: Count as Blocking Attack Damage from the first target Hit with each Shield Attack
uniques.flavourText:
"We must be ready. We are the voice of Wraeclast's vengeance,
tolling righteous fury for those who would dare invade our world!"
- Ailith, First of the Keepers

uniques.name: The Nomad
explicitModifiers: +(20-25)% to all Elemental Resistances while you have at least 200 Strength
(40-50)% increased Projectile Attack Damage while you have at least 200 Dexterity
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Few men can guide their people
like the Great Meginord of the North

uniques.name: The Oak
explicitModifiers: Regenerate 3% of Life per second while on Low Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: From death springs life.

uniques.name: The Oppressor
explicitModifiers: -10% to amount of Suppressed Spell Damage Prevented
You take 20% of Damage from Blocked Hits
uniques.flavourText: Every clash leaves one more scar.

uniques.name: The Overflowing Chalice
explicitModifiers: (50-100)% increased Charges gained by Other Flasks during Effect
Gains no Charges during Effect of any Overflowing Chalice Flask
uniques.flavourText: Empty cup, full of promise.

uniques.name: The Pandemonius
explicitModifiers: Chill Enemy for 1 second when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%
Damage Penetrates 20% Cold Resistance against Chilled Enemies
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Halcyon using Blessing of Tul
uniques.flavourText:
A single moment sets in motion an eternal fall,
beneath which all are buried.

uniques.name: The Pariah
explicitModifiers: +100 to Maximum Life per Red Socket
+100 to Maximum Mana per Green Socket
+100 to Maximum Energy Shield per Blue Socket
60% increased Item Rarity per White Socket
uniques.flavourText:
A man who changes his loyalties often,
soon finds he has none.

uniques.name: The Perandus Pact
explicitModifiers: Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to maximum Life
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
It was more than luck that allowed the Perandus line
to turn even great misfortunes into golden opportunities.

uniques.name: The Peregrine
explicitModifiers: 0.4% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
We wander to pass time.
We travel to fulfill.

uniques.name: The Perfect Form
explicitModifiers: Evasion Rating is increased by Overcapped Cold Resistance
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Snowblind Grace using Blessing of Tul
uniques.flavourText:
We share one space,
speak one voice,
act through one body.
A flawless crystal.
Brittle.

uniques.name: The Poet's Pen
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems per 25 Player Levels
Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack with this Weapon, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
Adds 3 to 5 Physical Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 3 Player Levels
uniques.flavourText: In every piece of prose, lies a tiny spark of magic.

uniques.name: The Poised Prism
implicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 2 Cold Damage to Attacks per 10 Dexterity
Adds 1 to 2 Fire Damage to Attacks per 10 Strength
Adds 0 to 3 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 10 Intelligence
uniques.flavourText: What do you see when you look inward?

uniques.name: The Primordial Chain
explicitModifiers: +3 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
uniques.flavourText:
The leash of the lifegiver
binds in both directions.

uniques.name: The Princess
explicitModifiers: Gain (25-30)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
uniques.flavourText:
"She's pretty, aye. So pretty you'll
want to be with her long after you're dead."

uniques.name: The Queller of Minds
implicitModifiers: 50% increased Elemental Ailment Duration on you
50% reduced Effect of Curses on you
uniques.flavourText: Quiet thy troubled soul. Think not. Just pray... to me.

uniques.name: The Rat Cage
explicitModifiers: 100% of Fire Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The truth lies inside every man, if you dig around.
Many a confession was found in the bowels of Axiom.

uniques.name: The Red Dream
explicitModifiers: Gain 5% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Chayula Breach or from Chayula, Who Dreamt
uniques.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

uniques.name: The Red Nightmare
explicitModifiers: Gain 5% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Chance to Block Attack Damage at 35% of its value
Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Red Dream using Blessing of Chayula
uniques.flavourText:
We coagulate; a crimson shell
that suffocates the unworthy.

uniques.name: The Red Trail
explicitModifiers: 10% additional Physical Damage Reduction while stationary
Gain a Frenzy Charge on Hit while Bleeding
50% chance to be inflicted with Bleeding when Hit by an Attack
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Infinite Pursuit using Blessing of Uul-Netol
uniques.flavourText:
We leave a trail, that we may know
where never we will return.

uniques.name: The Redblade
explicitModifiers: Has a Two Handed Sword Crucible Passive Skill Tree
Crucible Passive Skill Tree is removed if this Modifier is removed
uniques.flavourText:
Its forging marked the melding of man
and Titan against the rising darkness.

uniques.name: The Restless Ward
explicitModifiers: 4% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
Regenerate 75 Life per second per Endurance Charge
(100-200)% increased Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charge Duration
uniques.flavourText:
Use the dead to stave off death,
An armour of bones and rot.
Hanging on with bated breath,
One lapse and all for naught.

uniques.name: The Retch
explicitModifiers: 0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
30% reduced Flask Charges gained during any Flask Effect
200% of Life Leech applies to Enemies as Chaos Damage
15% increased Movement Speed during any Flask Effect
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
But the grain grew twisted and the water turned dark
and those who partook of Mother Gull's gift
birthed monsters that fed
on the flesh of one another.

uniques.name: The Rippling Thoughts
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Harbinger of the Arcane Skill
Trigger Level 20 Storm Cascade when you Attack
Adds 1 to (60-70) Lightning Damage to Spells
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable

uniques.name: The Sacred Chalice
explicitModifiers: Gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike
Gain (20-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage if you've used a Sapphire Flask Recently
Gain (20-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage if you've used a Ruby Flask Recently
Gain (20-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage if you've used a Topaz Flask Recently
uniques.sourceText: Obtained by using a Coin of Restoration on The Desecrated Chalice
uniques.flavourText:
"Sacred water has no power of its own, and yet
holds the greatest strength of all... it can carry
what we give it. What we sacrifice for each other."
- Rashi, Grand Daiyata of the Sel Khari

uniques.name: The Sands of Time
explicitModifiers: Trigger level 20 Suspend in Time on Casting a Spell
10% increased Cast Speed for each different Non-Instant Spell you've Cast Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Saresh, of the Weeping Black
uniques.flavourText:
A future of untold power and doom opened
before Zarokh in that moment. He realised
there was not one Time, but many...

uniques.name: The Saviour
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
On the mirrored edge of infinity,
one man sinks forever into darkness,
one man rises into light.
But which one am I?

uniques.name: The Scales of Justice
explicitModifiers: (3-4) to (7-8) added Fire Damage per 100 of Maximum Life or Maximum Mana, whichever is lower
Unaffected by Ignite or Shock if Maximum Life and Maximum Mana are within 500
uniques.flavourText:
You shall be weighed and measured. You shall be judged...
and perhaps you shall be found worthy.

uniques.name: The Scourge
implicitModifiers: 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
explicitModifiers: Increases and Reductions to Minion Damage also affect you at 150% of their value
Minions deal 70% increased Damage if you've Hit Recently
uniques.flavourText:
With increasing mastery over death
comes an increasing desire for it.

uniques.name: The Screaming Eagle
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 2 Chance to Flee

uniques.name: The Searing Touch
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+(40-60)% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of all Fire Spell Skill Gems
uniques.flavourText:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.

uniques.name: The Selfish Shepherd
implicitModifiers: 50% increased Elemental Ailment Duration on you
50% reduced Effect of Curses on you
uniques.flavourText:
And when you are no longer useful, you will
discover how much you truly mean.

uniques.name: The Shattered Divinity
implicitModifiers: Adds (7-9) to (13-16) Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Directions Skill
Adds (19-22) to (30-35) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds (19-22) to (30-35) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks

uniques.name: The Siege
uniques.sourceText: Drops from unique Delirium bosses in maps
uniques.flavourText:
As the dead battered Highgate's barricades,
The Black Sekhema accepted her fate,
And stood her ground.

uniques.name: The Signal Fire
implicitModifiers: Adds (12-15) to (24-27) Fire Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
5 to 10 Added Fire Damage with Bow Attacks
Gain (25-35)% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Fire Damage
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Molten feathers, veiled spark,
Hissing arrows from the dark.

uniques.name: The Snowblind Grace
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Tul Breach or from Tul, Creeping Avalanche
uniques.flavourText:
We dance in the white, like water,
colliding as many and emerging as one.

uniques.name: The Sorrow of the Divine
explicitModifiers: Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield during Effect
uniques.flavourText:
As man sins,
God weeps.

uniques.name: The Squire
explicitModifiers: +(5-8)% to Quality of Socketed Support Gems
Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from your Main Hand
uniques.flavourText:
Judge not the weak, for
they empower the strong.

uniques.name: The Stampede
explicitModifiers: (50-80)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills
(30-40)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate while moving
Your Movement Speed is 150% of its base value
This item can be anointed by Cassia
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Blighted Maps
uniques.flavourText:
Relentlessness. Nothing more, nothing less.

This item can be anointed by Cassia

uniques.name: The Stormheart
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: 100% chance to Avoid being Shocked while Chilled
uniques.flavourText:
When the storm comes,
the safest place to be is the centre.

uniques.name: The Stormwall
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
+15% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
100% chance to Avoid being Shocked while Chilled
(30-40)% chance to Chill Attackers for 4 seconds on Block
(30-40)% chance to Shock Attackers for 4 seconds on Block
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
When the storm comes,
the safest place to be is the centre.

uniques.name: The Sundered Will
implicitModifiers: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Chaos Damage Types
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Increases and Reductions to Chaos Damage also apply to Effect of
Auras from Chaos Skills at (10-15)% of their value, up to a maximum of 150%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
They dream no longer, strive no longer,
feel no longer. They dream only of
continuing to dream, and know not why.

uniques.name: The Supreme Truth
implicitModifiers: Attacks with this weapon inflict Hallowing Flame on Hit
uniques.flavourText:
Knowledge brings power, and with power you can
grab truth by the throat and shape it as you wish.

uniques.name: The Surging Thoughts
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of the Arcane Skill
Trigger Level 20 Storm Cascade when you Attack
Adds 1 to (60-70) Lightning Damage to Spells

uniques.name: The Surrender
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Anticipation using Blessing of Uul-Netol
uniques.flavourText:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.

uniques.name: The Tactician
explicitModifiers: +(20-25)% to all Elemental Resistances while you have at least 200 Strength
(50-60)% increased Critical Strike Chance while you have at least 200 Intelligence
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Few men cast a longer shadow
than the Great Meginord of the North.

uniques.name: The Taming
explicitModifiers: 10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
(30-40)% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for
each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Vendor Recipe
uniques.flavourText:
"Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed

uniques.name: The Tempest
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
Centuries of development in steel armoursmithing
turned the armies of the Eternal Empire
into very effective lightning rods.

uniques.name: The Tempest Rising
explicitModifiers: (5-25)% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies
You and Enemies in your Presence count as moving while affected by Elemental Ailments
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
Where he tread, disintegrating storms of lightning
and death laid waste to all around him.

uniques.name: The Tempest's Binding
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Ice Bite
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Innervate
Grants Summon Harbinger of Storms Skill
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable

uniques.name: The Tempest's Liberation
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Ice Bite
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Innervate
Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Storms Skill

uniques.name: The Tempestuous Steel
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon Penetrate 30% Elemental Resistances
Gain 15% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain 15% of Physical Attack Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The blade thrums with wild energy
Eager for vengeance against all who walk free.

uniques.name: The Three Dragons
explicitModifiers: Your Fire Damage can Shock but not Ignite
Your Cold Damage can Ignite but not Freeze or Chill
Your Lightning Damage can Freeze but not Shock
uniques.flavourText:
"The ice seared his naked feet
As the lightning stilled his heart,
But it was the flames upon his lover's face
That roused him to vengeance."
- From 'The Three Dragons' by Victario of Sarn

uniques.name: The Tides of Time
explicitModifiers: Flasks applied to you have 25% increased Effect
Life Flasks gain (0-3) Charges every 3 seconds
Mana Flasks gain (0-3) Charges every 3 seconds
Utility Flasks gain (0-3) Charges every 3 seconds
uniques.sourceText: Drops from The Shaper (Uber)
uniques.flavourText:
There is an ebb and flow to all things,
tangible to those who watch and wait.

uniques.name: The Torrent's Reclamation
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Time Skill

uniques.name: The Trickster's Smile
explicitModifiers: Reflects 100 Cold Damage to Melee Attackers
Reflects 100 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers
Reflects 100 Lightning Damage to Melee Attackers
When an Enemy Hit deals Elemental Damage to you, their Resistance to those Elements becomes zero for 4 seconds
uniques.flavourText:
The Raven Trickster made no move to defend himself.
He merely grinned... and the foolish warrior charged.

uniques.name: The Unseen Hue
explicitModifiers: Hits with Prismatic Skills always Scorch
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Dread in Moment of Reverence
uniques.flavourText:
They seek that which lies before them, shining
Yours is a special curse, nipping at your heels
Driving you on long past agony and despair

uniques.name: The Unshattered Will
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Harbinger of Focus Skill
uniques.sourceText: Created from item parts obtained from Boss in The Beachhead

uniques.name: The Untouched Soul
explicitModifiers: +40 to maximum Life for each Empty Red Socket on any Equipped Item
+225 to Accuracy Rating for each Empty Green Socket on any Equipped Item
+40 to maximum Mana for each Empty Blue Socket on any Equipped Item
+18% to all Elemental Resistances for each Empty White Socket on any Equipped Item
uniques.flavourText:
Geomancy offered a safer way to use the Tears...
but most Maji rejected that temptation as well.

uniques.name: The Utmost
uniques.sourceText: Created from Primordial Fragments obtained from Uber bosses
uniques.flavourText: He who stands on the loftiest peak is bound to be seen...

uniques.name: The Vertex
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems have 50% reduced Mana Cost
Enemies Cannot Leech Mana From you
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Alluring Abyss
uniques.flavourText:
"A queen should be seen, admired, but never touched."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

uniques.name: The Vigil
explicitModifiers: With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Hits with Vigilant Strike Fortify you and Nearby Allies for 8 seconds
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
When Voll took the throne,
He swore to care for the empire with eyes open.
And so he looked to the salvation of his people,
Blind to the damnation in his hands.

uniques.name: The Warden's Brand
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: Adds (5-15) to (25-50) Physical Damage to Attacks
15% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge when you Stun an Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
"I don't always have a flame handy
when a fresh delinquent walks through our gates."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom

uniques.name: The Wasp Nest
explicitModifiers: Attacks with this Weapon deal 80 to 120 added Chaos Damage against
Enemies affected by at least 5 Poisons
uniques.flavourText:
To discover how cruel nature can be,
you need only shake the wrong branch.

uniques.name: The Whispering Ice
implicitModifiers: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+1 to Level of Socketed Support Gems
uniques.flavourText:
Guard your darkest thoughts well, for they are
the cracks through which the Nightmare crawls.

uniques.name: The Will of Esh
implicitModifiers: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Lightning Damage Types
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Increases and Reductions to Lightning Damage also apply to Effect of
Auras from Lightning Skills at (10-15)% of their value, up to a maximum of 150%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
They whisper in the dark, building towers of
mindless thought that seek a hollow truth.

uniques.name: The Will of Tul
implicitModifiers: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Cold Damage Types
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Increases and Reductions to Cold Damage also apply to Effect of
Auras from Cold Skills at (10-15)% of their value, up to a maximum of 150%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
They hide in deep places, and hidden places,
but stillness will find them... and bury them.

uniques.name: The Will of Uul-Netol
implicitModifiers: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Physical Damage Types
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Increases and Reductions to Physical Damage also apply to Effect of
Auras from Physical Skills at (10-15)% of their value, up to a maximum of 150%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
They move and coil, gripped by painful ecstasy,
all meaning long since lost to dead-eyed lust.

uniques.name: The Will of Xoph
implicitModifiers: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Fire Damage Types
explicitModifiers: (20-30)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Increases and Reductions to Fire Damage also apply to Effect of
Auras from Fire Skills at (10-15)% of their value, up to a maximum of 150%
uniques.sourceText: Drops from It That Was Esh and It That Was Tul in Hive Colony
uniques.flavourText:
They dance and scream under the Broken Sun
as spiraling oblivion deepens into flame.

uniques.name: The Winds of Fate
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitModifiers: 75% of Physical Damage converted to a random Element
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Lycia, Herald of the Scourge in The Beyond
uniques.flavourText:
Life... Death...
The whim of the cosmos.

uniques.name: The Wise Oak
explicitModifiers: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates (5-8)% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
uniques.flavourText:
The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

uniques.name: The Writhing Jar
explicitModifiers: 2 Enemy Writhing Worms escape the Flask when used
Writhing Worms are destroyed when Hit
uniques.flavourText:
To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
- High Templar Voll

uniques.name: The Yielding Mortality
implicitModifiers: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
Socketed Gems are supported by Level 1 Chance to Bleed
explicitModifiers: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Brutality Skill
+5% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+(60-80)% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding from Critical Strikes
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from The Enmity Divine via Haemocombustion Scroll

uniques.name: Thief's Torment
explicitModifiers: Gain (40-60) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Gain 30 Mana per Enemy Hit with Attacks
50% reduced Effect of Curses on you
uniques.flavourText:
The ring I stole,
My finger they took,
A shrouded mind,
Cut their curses short,
As I drained their spirit
And stole their soul.
A blessing is often a curse.

uniques.name: Thirst for Horrors
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
10% Chance to Cause Monster to Flee on Block
1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Cursed Enemies
Curse Skills have 100% increased Skill Effect Duration
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: An eye for an eye. A curse for a curse.

uniques.name: Thousand Ribbons
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Elemental Proliferation
Adds (2-4) to (5-9) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds (2-4) to (5-9) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds 1 to (4-12) Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
uniques.flavourText:
The night of a thousand ribbons
To remember the day of a thousand flames
When Sarn burned
And was born again

uniques.name: Thousand Teeth Temu
explicitModifiers: 0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Reflects 1000 to 10000 Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.flavourText:
Crimson burn'd the star of sadness,
All was woe that seem'd but gladness.

uniques.name: Thread of Hope
explicitModifiers: Only affects Passives in Small Ring
Passive Skills in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
uniques.flavourText: Though we cannot touch; one thought, one wish, through centuries alone in darkness.

uniques.name: Three-step Assault
explicitModifiers: 30% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments while Phasing
uniques.flavourText:
Move in with haste.
Strike quick, strike hard.
Vanish like smoke in the wind.

uniques.name: Thrillsteel
uniques.flavourText:
We may fight, and we may die, but in these
moments of blood and battle, we truly live.

uniques.name: Thunder of the Dawn
explicitModifiers: 50% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Lightning Damage
When you Kill a Shocked Enemy, inflict an equivalent Shock on each nearby Enemy
uniques.flavourText:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.

uniques.name: Thunderfist
explicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Added Lightning Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The roar of the heavens
Strikes more than fear
Into the hearts of Man

uniques.name: Thundersight
uniques.flavourText: See creation as it is, energetic and storming.

uniques.name: Tidebreaker
implicitModifiers: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Endurance Charge on Melee Stun
explicitModifiers: 10% increased Physical Damage per Endurance Charge
(20-30)% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with this Weapon
uniques.flavourText:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.

uniques.name: Timeclasp
explicitModifiers: (6-12)% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
(6-12)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life

uniques.name: Timetwist
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
"To us mere mortals, time is slippery.
I'm just evening things out."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist

uniques.name: Tinkerskin
explicitModifiers: (10-15)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for throwing Traps
15% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
30% chance to gain Phasing for 4 seconds when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
Recover 100 Life when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
Recover 50 Energy Shield when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
uniques.flavourText: Thin is the line between mechanical genius and magic.

uniques.name: Titucius' Span
explicitModifiers: -(80-50) Physical Damage taken from Projectile Attacks
+25% chance to Block Projectile Attack Damage

uniques.name: To Dust
uniques.sourceText: Use Vaal Orb on Cobalt Jewel
uniques.flavourText:
In the end, time comes for all of us.
It just comes for some much sooner.

uniques.name: Tombfist
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Amanamu, Liege of the Lightless or Ulaman, Sovereign of the Well
uniques.flavourText:
"Ever watched a man crush another man's skull?
Hard to feel hope after that."

uniques.name: Torchoak Step
explicitModifiers: Totems Reflect 100% of their maximum Life as Fire Damage to nearby Enemies when Hit
uniques.flavourText:
Centuries ago, there existed a unique grove imbued with ancestral fire.
As with all things, the Karui used its wood for war.

uniques.name: Touch of Anguish
explicitModifiers: 20% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Killing a Frozen Enemy
Skills Chain an additional time while at maximum Frenzy Charges
Critical Strikes do not inherently Freeze
uniques.flavourText:
Grip the frozen steel, feel it numb you.
Wield the cold touch of death like
a splinter of your own shattered heart.

uniques.name: Transcendent Flesh
explicitModifiers: -1 Strength per 1 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius
+7% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 10 Strength on Unallocated Passives in Radius
3% increased Life Recovery Rate per 10 Strength on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% reduced Life Recovery Rate per 10 Strength on Unallocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Tempered Flesh via Vial of Transcendence
uniques.flavourText:
We are as much shaped by what we do
as what is done to us.

uniques.name: Transcendent Mind
explicitModifiers: -1 Intelligence per 1 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius
+3% to Damage over Time Multiplier per 10 Intelligence on Unallocated Passives in Radius
3% increased Mana Recovery Rate per 10 Intelligence on Allocated Passives in Radius
2% reduced Mana Recovery Rate per 10 Intelligence on Unallocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Tempered Mind via Vial of Transcendence
uniques.flavourText:
A keen mind sees what others do not,
makes connections where others do not,
and is dangerous in a way that others are not.

uniques.name: Transcendent Spirit
explicitModifiers: -1 Dexterity per 1 Dexterity on Allocated Passives in Radius
3% increased Movement Speed per 10 Dexterity on Allocated Passives in Radius
+125 to Accuracy Rating per 10 Dexterity on Unallocated Passives in Radius
2% reduced Movement Speed per 10 Dexterity on Unallocated Passives in Radius
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Tempered Spirit via Vial of Transcendence
uniques.flavourText:
Take comfort knowing that, even in death,
we may serve our Queen and fuel her empire.

uniques.name: Tremor Rod
implicitModifiers: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
+2 to Level of Socketed Spell Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Blastchain Mine
explicitModifiers: Mines can be Detonated an additional time
uniques.flavourText:
The best way to gain the element of surprise,
is to let your enemy learn your plans,
and execute them - twice.

uniques.name: Triad Grip
explicitModifiers: Minions convert 25% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage per Red Socket
Minions convert 25% of Physical Damage to Cold Damage per Green Socket
Minions convert 25% of Physical Damage to Lightning Damage per Blue Socket
Minions convert 25% of Physical Damage to Chaos Damage per White Socket
Minions have (5-10)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
uniques.flavourText: The secret of the elements lies within a square triangle.

uniques.name: Triumvirate Authority
explicitModifiers: +2 to Level of Socketed Vaal Gems
Socketed Vaal Skills deal 150% more Damage
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Atziri, Queen of the Vaal in The Apex of Sacrifice (3 stats) or in The Alluring Abyss (4 stats)
uniques.flavourText:
The priest that carried Yaomac's sigil was
granted one boon by each serpentine head.

uniques.name: Trolltimber Spire
explicitModifiers: 15% increased Area of Effect for Skills used by Totems
0.5% of Damage dealt by your Totems is Leeched to you as Life
You and your Totems Regenerate 0.5% of Life per second for each Summoned Totem
uniques.flavourText:
The problem with working fresh trolltimber:
by the time you've carved out one end,
the other has sprouted fresh roots!

uniques.name: Trypanon
explicitModifiers: This Weapon's Critical Strike Chance is 100%
uniques.flavourText:
"Though ingenious instruments have been found,
it seems surgery before thaumaturgy
was not so delicate."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3546

uniques.name: Tukohama's Fortress
explicitModifiers: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
uniques.flavourText:
Tukohama couldn't lose a fight in his fortress,
So he carried his fortress to the fight.

uniques.name: Tulborn
implicitModifiers: Adds (14-29) to (42-47) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
Adds (120-140) to (150-170) Cold Damage to Spells
explicitModifiers: Gain a Power Charge on Killing a Frozen Enemy
Cold Exposure you inflict applies an extra -12% to Cold Resistance
+(20-25) Mana gained on Killing a Frozen Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Tul Breach or from Tul, Creeping Avalanche
uniques.flavourText:
We remember the stillness.
Then the great fall.
The pain of separation.
We return once more.

uniques.name: Tulfall
implicitModifiers: Adds (14-29) to (42-47) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitModifiers: Gain a Power Charge on Killing a Frozen Enemy
Adds 50 to 70 Cold Damage to Spells per Power Charge
Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges
Gain a Frenzy Charge on reaching Maximum Power Charges
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Tulborn using Blessing of Tul
uniques.flavourText:
We fracture and splinter.
We pierce our sides.
But in the great freeze we are forged anew.

uniques.name: Twyzel
explicitModifiers: Attacks fire (1-2) additional Projectile when in Off Hand
Attacks have (40-60)% increased Area of Effect when in Main Hand
uniques.flavourText:
Life persisted,
hardened, twisted.

uniques.name: Ulaman's Gaze
explicitModifiers: Projectiles have 4% chance to be able to Chain when colliding with terrain per
Searching Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 20%
uniques.flavourText: The Sovereign of the Well seeks dominion over the light.

uniques.name: Umbilicus Immortalis
explicitModifiers: Flasks do not apply to you
Flasks you Use apply to your Raised Zombies and Spectres
uniques.flavourText:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3

uniques.name: Unending Hunger
explicitModifiers: Minions have (6-8)% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Raised Spectres have a 50% chance to gain Soul Eater for 20 seconds on Kill
uniques.flavourText:
They roamed, they fed, they grew,
Killing as they went,
Conquer though they may,
Their hearts will never be content.

uniques.name: Ungil's Gauche
explicitModifiers: +12% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
uniques.flavourText:
Unwieldy and garish became graceful
and deadly in Ungil's nimble hands.

uniques.name: Ungil's Harmony
explicitModifiers: Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
uniques.flavourText: Gentle anger, raging calm.

uniques.name: United in Dream
explicitModifiers: Minions have 60% chance to Poison Enemies on Hit
Minions Recover 10% of Life on Killing a Poisoned Enemy
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Severed in Sleep using Blessing of Chayula
uniques.flavourText:
They grow fat and ripe in slumber.
To be fed upon when he wakes.

uniques.name: Unlight Extant
explicitModifiers: +1 to Level of all Chaos Spell Skill Gems
Chaos Skills inflict up to 15 Withered Debuffs on Hit for (5-7) seconds
Cannot Inflict Wither on targets that are not on Full Life
uniques.flavourText:
Beyond the edge of existence, there
shines violet, naught but pain...
one lantern carries a single flame.

uniques.name: Unnatural Instinct
explicitModifiers: Allocated Small Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing
Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Small Passive Skills in Radius
uniques.flavourText:
"I don't know how I know,
I just know that I know."

uniques.name: Unstable Payload
explicitModifiers: (8-12)% Chance for Traps to Trigger an additional time
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText: Saboteurs, like chefs, have their own secret recipes.

uniques.name: Unyielding Flame
explicitModifiers: Trigger Commandment of Inferno on Critical Strike
(8-12)% increased Attack Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
(8-12)% increased Cast Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.sourceText: Drops in The Lord's Labyrinth
uniques.flavourText:
An Emperor must conquer his own darkness
before he can act as a beacon of light.

uniques.name: Usurper's Penance
explicitModifiers: Attacks have 15% chance to cause Bleeding
+4% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding per Frenzy Charge
Bleeding you inflict deals Damage 4% faster per Frenzy Charge
(20-30)% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Critical Strike at Close Range
uniques.flavourText: Bloodlust begets suffering.

uniques.name: Utula's Hunger
explicitModifiers: +(700-1000) to maximum Life if there are no Life Modifiers on other Equipped Items
uniques.flavourText: The world will end in a divine stomach once Kitava has eaten all that lives.

uniques.name: Uul-Netol's Embrace
explicitModifiers: Trigger Level 20 Bone Nova when you Hit a Bleeding Enemy
25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
uniques.sourceText: Upgraded from Uul-Netol's Kiss using Blessing of Uul-Netol
uniques.flavourText:
At last she holds us,
and so we turn to dust.

uniques.name: Uul-Netol's Kiss
explicitModifiers: Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit
Exerted Attacks Knock Enemies Back on Hit
uniques.sourceText: Drops in Uul-Netol Breach or from Uul-Netol, Unburdened Flesh
uniques.flavourText:
We feel the Mother's love
and beg to return to her womb.

uniques.name: Uul-Netol's Vow
explicitModifiers: Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from Equipped Body Armour
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Breachlord in a Flawless Breachstone
uniques.flavourText:
The time is nigh.
War has come.
We dream as one.

uniques.name: Uzaza's Meadow
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Ahuatotli, the Blind
uniques.flavourText:
Cold winds blasted what little grew on the icy surface.
The gifts of the land lay hidden deeper,
and only patience and persistence would free them.

This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Uzaza's Mountain
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Kurgal, the Blackblooded
uniques.flavourText:
The narrow path turned to rough rocks that led towards the sky.
One last obstacle in a life-long journey
to find a land they could call home.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Uzaza's Valley
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Aul, the Crystal King
uniques.flavourText:
Sheltered beneath thick ice,
the river ferried fat fish towards the sea.
But the First King knew the river's secret,
and the fish were not the only ones who grew fat.

This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.

uniques.name: Vaal Caress
explicitModifiers: +5 to Level of Socketed Vaal Gems
-5 to Level of Socketed Non-Vaal Gems
You gain Onslaught for 20 seconds on using a Vaal Skill
uniques.flavourText:
"The gems are strangely human at times.
They simply love to be held."
- Doryani, First Seer to the Queen

uniques.name: Vaal Sentencing
explicitModifiers: (80-120)% increased Vaal Skill Critical Strike Chance
uniques.sourceText: No longer obtainable
uniques.flavourText:
In their final days, every crime was punishable by death.
Atziri's empire ran on blood, but the blood was running dry.

uniques.name: Valako's Sign
explicitModifiers: 40% increased Damage with Hits against Shocked Enemies
1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Shocked Enemies
uniques.flavourText:
A gift from Valako,
appointing Kiloava as the Herald of War.
A title Kaom claimed when he ended Kiloava's bloodline.

uniques.name: Valyrium
explicitModifiers: Stun Threshold is based on Energy Shield instead of Life
uniques.flavourText: They will rise and fall in fire and blood.

uniques.name: Varunastra
explicitModifiers: Counts as all One Handed Melee Weapon Types
uniques.flavourText:
"Painful suicide in the hands of a fool,
Creative death in the hands of a master."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 2992

uniques.name: Veil of the Night
explicitModifiers: Reflects 1 to (180-220) Lightning Damage to Attackers on Block
uniques.flavourText:
The seeds of greatness are planted in darkness,
Watered by suffering,
Tended by desperation,
And bloom steel flowers of victory.

uniques.name: Venarius' Astrolabe
implicitModifiers: Has Elder, Shaper and all Conqueror Influences
explicitModifiers: The stars are aligned if you have 6 Influence types among other Equipped Items
You have Elemental Conflux if the stars are aligned
+(1-3) to Level of all Elemental Skill Gems if the stars are aligned
+(1-3) to Level of all Elemental Support Gems if the stars are aligned
uniques.sourceText: Drops from Incarnation of Neglect in Moment of Loneliness
uniques.flavourText:
"You grew up an orphan, and for that, you blame me.
Fair enough. So... why not let me erase that pain from your mind?
Then we can all stand united against the demons at the door..."

uniques.name: Venopuncture
implicitModifiers: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitModifiers: 25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
You are Chilled while you are Bleeding
Non-Chilled Enemies you inflict Bleeding on are Chilled
Bleeding Enemies you Kill with Hits Shatter
uniques.flavourText:
There is a way to survive the bite of an ice snake,
but few have the resolve to attempt it.

uniques.name: Ventor's Gamble
explicitModifiers: (-15-15)% reduced Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
uniques.flavourText:
In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

uniques.name: Veruso's Ambition
uniques.flavourText:
"Follow me if you desire better for yourself, and for your
families. Follow me if you hunger for more than this!"

uniques.name: Veruso's Battering Rams
explicitModifiers: 4% increased Melee Damage per Endurance Charge
You cannot be Shocked while at maximum Endurance Charges
uniques.flavourText:
With unending determination and resolve he destroyed first the gates,
then the constructs guarding the tomb on the other side.

uniques.name: Vessel of Vinktar
explicitModifiers: Shocks nearby Enemies during Effect, causing 10% increased Damage taken
You are Shocked during Effect, causing 50% increased Damage taken
Damage Penetrates 10% Lightning Resistance during Effect
